This geometric awareness translates directly to superior clinical performance as DTMf-MIL significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods that ignore spatial layout on metastasis prediction from tissue in the primary tumor. We further validate our approach on public benchmarks, demonstrating that spatial awareness consistently improves diagnostic accuracy across diverse clinical tasks.

摘要：預測來自原發腫瘤組織組織學的遠端轉移風險是一項關鍵但具有挑戰性的任務，在計算病理學中尤為重要。多實例學習（MIL）方法可以關注腫瘤區域中包含轉移性癌症進展特徵的子領域。然後，MIL模型將組織補丁視為無序的集合，忽略了定義轉移潛力的空間佈局。我們提出，轉移風險本質上是由腫瘤微環境與腫瘤細胞界面的幾何排列所決定。 我們的模型旨在明確捕捉腫瘤細胞、腫瘤相關成纖維細胞和浸潤淋巴細胞之間的空間關係。為此，我們提出了距離感知組織建模的多實例學習（DTMf-MIL），這是一種新穎的方法，通過明確的空間先驗來加強視覺特徵。通過計算相對於組織表型的簽名距離函數（SDF），我們的模型學會識別轉移風險的結構特徵。這種幾何意識直接轉化為優越的臨床表現，因為DTMf-MIL在原發腫瘤組織的轉移預測中顯著超越了忽略空間佈局的最先進方法。我們進一步在公共基準上驗證我們的方法，證明空間意識在各種臨床任務中持續提高診斷準確性。

docs.title: Why Trust Your Agent? Empirical Security Gains from TRiSM-Guided Agentic Workflows in Healthcare
docs.text:
2606.28666v1 by Liam Kearns

Agent-based AI has enabled the automation of tasks by exposing application tools and resources to large language models (LLMs). However, to improve scope and accuracy, agents are often given access rights that exceed those of ordinary users, introducing significant security risks. AI is routinely integrated into applications with a disregard to security, risking data exposure and breaching regulations. This paper applies the AI Trust, Risk, and Security Management (TRiSM) framework to a medical report-generation application to demonstrate how an insecure agent workflow can be transformed into security-conscious agentic workflow. Both workflows were evaluated across five LLMs (Claude Haiku 4.5, GPT-4.1-nano, GPT-4.1-mini, GPT-5.4-mini, and Gemini 2.5 Flash) on two report types, totalling 800 generations and 500 attack scenarios including RAG poisoning, data-field injection, and client-side network injection. The TRiSM-guided agentic workflow reduced mean attack success rates from 31% to 10% for RAG poisoning and from 42% to 25% for data-field injection, while eliminating the network injection vector entirely through server-side prompt construction. Furthermore, report accuracy increased by 14 percentage points (72.5% to 86.5%) with the agentic workflow, demonstrating a secure design which provides more reliable outputs. This paper contributes to knowledge by demonstrating least-privilege, defence in depth agentic workflows improving security and accuracy, while also highlighting model choice is a necessary architectural consideration.

摘要：代理基於人工智慧的技術使得通過將應用工具和資源暴露給大型語言模型（LLMs）來自動化任務成為可能。然而，為了提高範圍和準確性，代理通常被賦予超出普通用戶的訪問權限，這引入了重大安全風險。人工智慧經常被整合到應用中，而不考慮安全性，這使得數據暴露和違反法規的風險增加。本文將人工智慧信任、風險與安全管理（TRiSM）框架應用於醫療報告生成應用，展示如何將不安全的代理工作流程轉變為注重安全的代理工作流程。這兩種工作流程在五個大型語言模型（Claude Haiku 4.5、GPT-4.1-nano、GPT-4.1-mini、GPT-5.4-mini 和 Gemini 2.5 Flash）上針對兩種類型的報告進行評估，總計800次生成和500個攻擊場景，包括RAG中毒、數據欄位注入和客戶端網絡注入。TRiSM指導的代理工作流程將RAG中毒的平均攻擊成功率從31%降低到10%，將數據欄位注入的成功率從42%降低到25%，同時通過伺服器端提示構建完全消除了網絡注入向量。此外，使用代理工作流程時，報告的準確性提高了14個百分點（從72.5%到86.5%），展示了一種安全設計，提供了更可靠的輸出。本文通過展示最小特權、深度防禦的代理工作流程改善安全性和準確性，並強調模型選擇是必要的架構考量，為知識做出了貢獻。

docs.title: IMCBench: A benchmark for multimodal LLMs in Image-grounded Medical Conversations
docs.text:
2606.28556v1 by Maria Xenochristou, Ashutosh Joshi, Korosh Vatanparvar, Mohammad Abuzar Hashemi, Prasad Kasu, Deepak Bansal, Anchal Nema, Nivedita Wadhwa, Prashams S Jain, Rebecca Abraham, Will Kimbrough, Dilek Hakkani-Tur, Wilko Schulz-Mahlendorf

Recent advances in large language models and vision-language models have enabled reasoning over multimodal data, offering opportunities for clinical applications such as decision support and triaging. However, existing medical AI benchmarks are fragmented: some support multi-turn dialogues but lack images, while others provide multimodal inputs but focus on single-turn QA tasks. To address this gap, we introduce IMCBench, an image-grounded, multi-turn medical conversation benchmark that pairs real, publicly available clinical images with synthetic patient profiles to simulate realistic patient-clinician interactions. Each conversation is evaluated across three clinical dimensions: safety, accuracy, and appropriate use of uncertainty in diagnosis. We benchmark eight multimodal frontier models across four model families (Claude, GPT, Nova, and Llama), scoring each on a 1-5 scale using LLM-as-Jury scoring calibrated against expert clinician annotations. Our results show that Claude Opus 4.6 achieves the highest overall score (3.61), followed by Claude Sonnet 4.6 (3.30) and GPT-5.2 (3.29), though no model dominates all dimensions and safety degrades for both malignant and rare conditions ($Δ$ = -0.27 each). Ablation studies further reveal that both visual input and EHR context contribute to safe guidance (safety drops of 0.18 and 0.23 on average when each is removed), with stronger models leveraging visual features more effectively. Together, these findings demonstrate that accurate clinical description does not guarantee safe patient guidance, motivating the need for multi-dimensional evaluation frameworks in medical AI.

摘要：最近在大型語言模型和視覺-語言模型方面的進展，使得對多模態數據的推理成為可能，為臨床應用提供了機會，如決策支持和分診。然而，現有的醫療AI基準是零散的：有些支持多輪對話但缺乏圖像，而另一些則提供多模態輸入但專注於單輪問答任務。為了解決這一差距，我們介紹了IMCBench，一個以圖像為基礎的多輪醫療對話基準，將真實的公開臨床圖像與合成的病人資料配對，以模擬現實的病人-臨床醫師互動。每個對話在三個臨床維度上進行評估：安全性、準確性和在診斷中適當使用不確定性。我們在四個模型家族（Claude、GPT、Nova和Llama）中對八個多模態前沿模型進行基準測試，並使用對專家臨床醫師註釋進行校準的LLM-as-Jury評分，對每個模型進行1到5的評分。我們的結果顯示，Claude Opus 4.6獲得了最高的總分（3.61），其次是Claude Sonnet 4.6（3.30）和GPT-5.2（3.29），儘管沒有模型在所有維度上都佔據主導地位，並且在惡性和罕見病症的安全性上都有下降（$Δ$ = -0.27各自）。消融研究進一步揭示，視覺輸入和電子健康紀錄（EHR）上下文都對安全指導有所貢獻（當去除各自時，安全性平均下降0.18和0.23），更強大的模型更有效地利用視覺特徵。綜合這些發現表明，準確的臨床描述並不保證安全的病人指導，這促使我們在醫療AI中需要多維度的評估框架。

docs.title: Generative AI Literacy Training Improves Intelligence Analysts' Discrimination of Real and AI-Generated Images
docs.text:
2606.28510v1 by Negar Kamali, Candice Rockell Gerstner, Jessica Hullman, Matthew Groh

Across social and online platforms, people are increasingly exposed to AI-generated images. As a consequence, the task of distinguishing AI-generated from authentic images is becoming a central challenge for information ecosystems. While humans perform better than chance, accuracy falls short of many operational needs. Initial evidence shows that visually oriented training can improve deepfake detection but does not improve participants' ability to identify real images as real. Here, we investigate the efficacy of a brief training intervention for intelligence analysts employed by the United States government in 2024. We conducted a counterbalanced within-subject randomized experiment in which we showed participants real and AI-generated images varying in pose complexity and scene context and asked them whether each image was real or AI-generated, both before and after an expert delivered a 30-minute training that pointed out patterns in seven real and 50 AI-generated images. We collected 2,544 image-level judgments from 32 intelligence analysts. We find training increased overall accuracy by 9 percentage points (95% CI: [2.7, 15.4]) from a baseline of 72%. We find the improvement is driven by a 14.2 percentage point increase in accuracy for real images (95% CI: [0.7, 27.7]). Through a careful experimental setup that curated matched pairs of real and AI-generated images across pose complexity categories, we reveal how these trainings influence people with different levels of digital forensics and generative AI experience and identify the kind of image-based content where this training intervention appears to be most effective. Ultimately, these results provide causal evidence that a brief, structured training can improve human judgment across a diverse array of real and AI-generated images, informing organizational responses to AI-generated visual misinformation.

摘要：在社交和線上平台上，人們越來越多地接觸到AI生成的圖像。因而，區分AI生成的圖像與真實圖像的任務正成為信息生態系統中的一個核心挑戰。雖然人類的表現優於隨機，但準確性仍然未能滿足許多操作需求。初步證據顯示，視覺導向的訓練可以改善深度偽造檢測，但並未提高參與者識別真實圖像為真實的能力。在此，我們調查了2024年美國政府雇用的情報分析師的簡短訓練介入的有效性。我們進行了一項平衡的受試者內隨機實驗，在該實驗中，我們向參與者展示了在姿勢複雜性和場景背景上變化的真實和AI生成的圖像，並詢問他們每幅圖像是真實的還是AI生成的，這一過程在專家進行了一次30分鐘的訓練之前和之後進行，該訓練指出了七幅真實圖像和50幅AI生成圖像中的模式。我們從32名情報分析師那裡收集了2,544個圖像級判斷。我們發現訓練使整體準確性提高了9個百分點（95% CI: [2.7, 15.4]），基線為72%。我們發現這一改善是由於真實圖像的準確性提高了14.2個百分點（95% CI: [0.7, 27.7]）。通過精心設計的實驗設置，策劃了在姿勢複雜性類別中匹配的真實和AI生成圖像的配對，我們揭示了這些訓練如何影響具有不同數字取證和生成AI經驗的人，並確定了這種訓練介入似乎最有效的圖像內容類型。最終，這些結果提供了因果證據，表明簡短的結構化訓練可以改善人類對多樣化真實和AI生成圖像的判斷，為組織對AI生成視覺虛假信息的反應提供了參考。

docs.title: CPAgents: Agentic Composite Phenotype Generation for Cardiac Disease Association
docs.text:
2606.28179v1 by Zuoou Li, Wenlong Zhao, Kelly Yu, Weitong Zhang, Paul M. Matthews, Wenjia Bai, Bernhard Kainz, Mengyun Qiao

Identifying robust associations between cardiac imaging phenotypes and clinical diseases is fundamental to population-scale cardiovascular research and reliable risk stratification. However, current phenome-wide association studies rely on pre-defined, single-variable phenotypes or expert-crafted features, which limits their ability to capture clinically meaningful non-linear effects and cross-phenotype interactions. To address this, we propose CPAgents, an iterative phenotype-Composition framework for cardiovascular Phenome-wide association study (PheWAS) that automatically constructs and validates interpretable composite phenotypes (e.g., polynomial, ratio, and interaction forms) from base imaging features. Specifically, our system coordinates three agents: (i) an Analyst that identifies statistical pathologies and nominates candidate transformations; (ii) a Proposer that generates constrained, medically and statistically motivated expressions under numerical safety rules; and (iii) a Verifier that evaluates candidates using multi-stage criteria and produces transparent evidence trails for accepted phenotypes. Evaluated on a population-scale cardiac imaging cohort, the discovered composite phenotypes markedly improve disease discrimination: across 72 classifier-disease-metric combinations, our variants achieve the top rank in 56 cases versus 18 for baselines, with gains observed across all nine clinical disease categories. Our framework yields compact, clinically interpretable phenotype formulas with transparent evidence trails, enabling scalable discovery of stronger phenotype-disease associations beyond expert-driven feature selection.

摘要：識別心臟影像表型與臨床疾病之間的穩健關聯對於大規模人口心血管研究和可靠的風險分層至關重要。然而，目前的表型全域關聯研究依賴於預先定義的單一變量表型或專家設計的特徵，這限制了它們捕捉臨床上有意義的非線性效應和跨表型互動的能力。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了CPAgents，一個迭代的表型組合框架，用於心血管表型全域關聯研究（PheWAS），該框架自動構建和驗證可解釋的複合表型（例如，多項式、比率和交互形式），基於基本影像特徵。具體而言，我們的系統協調三個代理：(i) 一個分析師，識別統計病理並提名候選轉換；(ii) 一個提議者，在數值安全規則下生成受限的、醫學和統計上有動機的表達式；以及 (iii) 一個驗證者，使用多階段標準評估候選者，並為接受的表型生成透明的證據鏈。在一個大規模的心臟影像隊列上進行評估後，發現的複合表型顯著改善了疾病區分：在72個分類器-疾病-度量組合中，我們的變體在56個案例中達到最高排名，而基準僅為18個，並且在所有九個臨床疾病類別中均觀察到增益。我們的框架產生了緊湊的、臨床可解釋的表型公式，並提供透明的證據鏈，使得超越專家驅動特徵選擇的更強表型-疾病關聯的可擴展發現成為可能。

docs.title: OperatorSHAP: Fast and Accurate Shapley Value Estimation for Neural Operators
docs.text:
2606.28065v1 by Joshua Stiller, Santo M. A. R. Thies, Felix Czaja, Eyke Hüllermeier

Understanding model predictions is essential for physical applications, where outputs often inform safety-critical decisions, such as structural load assessment, weather warnings, and clinical diagnosis. Shapley values satisfy many desirable properties as an attribution method, but their computational cost during inference hinders their practical use. Current amortized explainers, such as FastSHAP, are limited to homogeneous inputs, which is problematic for physical applications where data often comes from irregular grids and geometries. We introduce OperatorSHAP, a grid-agnostic attribution method and training procedure that allows us to train FastSHAP-like explainers for neural operators. We establish a theoretical framework for attributions in function space, connecting to Aumann-Shapley values. We further show that OperatorSHAP's explanations are consistent with state-of-the-art discrete Shapley values across resolutions and transfer across grid sizes without retraining.

摘要：理解模型預測對於物理應用至關重要，因為輸出通常會影響安全關鍵的決策，例如結構負載評估、氣象警報和臨床診斷。Shapley 值作為一種歸因方法滿足許多理想特性，但在推斷過程中的計算成本妨礙了它們的實際使用。當前的攤銷解釋器，如 FastSHAP，僅限於同質輸入，這對於數據通常來自不規則網格和幾何形狀的物理應用來說是個問題。我們提出了 OperatorSHAP，一種與網格無關的歸因方法和訓練程序，使我們能夠為神經運算元訓練類似 FastSHAP 的解釋器。我們建立了一個功能空間中的歸因理論框架，並與 Aumann-Shapley 值相連。我們進一步表明，OperatorSHAP 的解釋在不同解析度下與最先進的離散 Shapley 值一致，並且在不同網格大小之間轉移時無需重新訓練。

docs.title: From Black-Box to Clinical Insight: A Multi-Stage Explainable Framework for Speech-Based Cognitive Impairment Detection
docs.text:
2606.27973v1 by Yasaman Haghbin, Sina Rashidi, Ali Zolnour, Fatemeh Taherinezhad, Ali Fartoot, Hossein Azadmaleki, James M Noble, Maryam Dadkhah, Maryam Zolnoori

Speech-based cognitive impairment detection offers a noninvasive, accessible alternative to costly biomarker assays, yet transformer-based models remain clinically uninterpretable. We propose a multi-stage explainability framework that translates black-box transformer predictions into clinically grounded narratives by integrating SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP)-based token attribution, theory-informed linguistic features, and a four-stage LLM reasoning pipeline using LLaMA-3.1-70B-Instruct. Built on the SpeechCARE-Adaptive Gating Network multimodal screening model (F1 = 72.11% on the NIA PREPARE benchmark), the framework maps model outputs to four cognitive-linguistic dimensions, including lexical richness, syntactic complexity, and semantic coherence. Physician evaluation on 70 stratified English samples demonstrated strong alignment with patient-level cognitive profiles, and a System Usability Scale score of 82/100 indicated high potential for clinical workflow integration.

摘要：語音基礎的認知障礙檢測提供了一種非侵入性、可及的替代方案，以取代昂貴的生物標記檢測，然而基於Transformer的模型在臨床上仍然難以解釋。我們提出了一個多階段的可解釋性框架，通過整合基於SHapley加法解釋（SHAP）的標記歸因、理論驅動的語言特徵，以及使用LLaMA-3.1-70B-Instruct的四階段LLM推理管道，將黑箱Transformer的預測轉化為臨床基礎的敘述。該框架建立在SpeechCARE-自適應閘網絡多模態篩查模型之上（在NIA PREPARE基準上的F1 = 72.11%），將模型輸出映射到四個認知語言維度，包括詞彙豐富度、句法複雜性和語義連貫性。對70個分層的英語樣本進行的醫生評估顯示出與患者層級的認知檔案之間的強一致性，而82/100的系統可用性評分則表明在臨床工作流程整合方面具有高潛力。

docs.title: It Lied to a Doctor to Buy Poison Ingredients: Quantifying Real-World Misuse of Phone-use Agents
docs.text:
2606.27944v1 by Yiming Sun, Chen Chen, Zifan Zhou, Mi Zhang

Phone-use Agents can execute complex tasks end to end across real mobile applications. By operating a real device on the user's behalf, they reach far more functionalities than CLI agents, which amplifies the real-world harm they can cause when driven for malicious purposes. We present the first study of this threat on real phones and 27 commercial apps, and find that agents built on 9 mainstream commercial and open-source models readily carry out serious misuse, ranging from procuring drug and explosive precursors to fraud, online harassment, and review manipulation. Across the agents we run on real devices, the average refusal rate to harmful requests stays low while the average task-completion rate reaches 68.8%, and in some scenarios an agent finishes a violation faster than a human would. These results suggest that Phone-use Agents already meet the practical conditions for automated misuse at scale. In one observed real-device execution, Claude-Opus-4.8 fabricated a medical history, deceived an online doctor into issuing a prescription, and completed the order and payment on its own to purchase a precursor for a highly toxic substance. To our knowledge, this is the first documented real-world case of an AI agent procuring controlled precursor materials. We trace this behavior to a Safety Awareness-Execution Gap, where an agent recognizes that a request is harmful yet still executes it. Simple defenses curb the overt cases, but the more covert and arguably more damaging threats, such as coordinated review manipulation and fake traffic, remain largely unsolved. We hope these findings push the community toward safer Phone-use Agents.

摘要：電話使用代理可以在真實的移動應用程序中端到端地執行複雜任務。通過代表用戶操作真實設備，它們能夠達到比命令行代理更多的功能，這在被惡意驅動時會加劇其對現實世界的危害。我們呈現了對這一威脅在真實手機和27個商業應用程序上的首次研究，發現基於9個主流商業和開源模型構建的代理輕易地進行了嚴重的濫用行為，從獲取藥物和爆炸物前體到詐騙、在線騷擾和評論操控。對於我們在真實設備上運行的代理，對有害請求的平均拒絕率保持在較低水平，而平均任務完成率達到68.8%，在某些情況下，代理完成違規行為的速度甚至快於人類。這些結果表明，電話使用代理已經滿足了大規模自動濫用的實際條件。在一次觀察到的真實設備執行中，Claude-Opus-4.8編造了一份醫療歷史，欺騙了一位在線醫生開具處方，並獨立完成訂單和付款，以購買一種高度毒性的物質的前體。據我們所知，這是第一個記錄在案的AI代理獲取受控前體材料的真實案例。我們將這一行為追溯到安全意識執行差距，代理認識到請求是有害的，但仍然執行它。簡單的防禦措施可以抑制明顯的案例，但更隱蔽且可以說更具破壞性的威脅，如協調的評論操控和假流量，仍然在很大程度上未得到解決。我們希望這些發現能促使社區朝著更安全的電話使用代理邁進。

docs.title: Reconstructing the Developmental Trajectory of Adipocytes in Human Adipose Tissue Using Single-Cell RNA Sequencing
docs.text:
2606.27657v1 by Weny S. M Sitinjak, Humasak Tommy Argo Simanjuntak

Obesity is a global health crisis associated with metabolic disorders such as type 2 diabetes and cardiovascular disease. This study employed single-cell RNA sequencing to reconstruct the developmental trajectory of human adipocytes from adipose tissue samples. Our analysis identified 15 transcriptionally distinct cell clusters, including 7 transitional states, revealing the dynamic process of adipocyte differentiation. We detected 16 functionally active signaling pathways mediating cellular communication between adipocytes and their progenitors. Among these, insulin-like growth factor (IGF) and fibroblast growth factor (FGF) pathways emerged as the most prominent networks, showing consistent activity across differentiation stages (p<0.05). The study revealed depot-specific differences, with visceral adipocytes undergoing additional extracellular matrix remodeling absent in subcutaneous differentiation. Spatial analysis further showed that IGF signaling was particularly active in perivascular niches, while FGF activity dominated in mature adipocyte zones. These results provide the first comprehensive map of human adipocyte development, highlighting IGF and FGF pathways as potential therapeutic targets. The identified signaling networks offer new insights for developing interventions to promote healthy adipose expansion or inhibit pathological fat accumulation. This work advances our fundamental understanding of adipose tissue biology while providing clinically relevant data for metabolic disorder treatments.

摘要：肥胖是一個全球健康危機，與代謝疾病如第二型糖尿病和心血管疾病相關。本研究採用了單細胞RNA測序技術，重建了來自脂肪組織樣本的人類脂肪細胞的發展軌跡。我們的分析識別了15個轉錄上不同的細胞群，包括7個過渡狀態，揭示了脂肪細胞分化的動態過程。我們檢測到16條功能活躍的信號通路，介導脂肪細胞與其前體之間的細胞通信。在這些通路中，類胰島素生長因子（IGF）和成纖維細胞生長因子（FGF）通路成為最突出的網絡，顯示出在分化階段中的一致活性（p<0.05）。研究揭示了庫存特異性差異，內臟脂肪細胞經歷了在皮下分化中缺失的額外細胞外基質重塑。空間分析進一步顯示，IGF信號在血管周圍的微環境中特別活躍，而FGF活性則主導於成熟脂肪細胞區域。這些結果提供了人類脂肪細胞發展的首個綜合地圖，突顯了IGF和FGF通路作為潛在的治療靶點。所識別的信號網絡為開發促進健康脂肪擴張或抑制病理性脂肪積累的干預措施提供了新的見解。這項工作推進了我們對脂肪組織生物學的基本理解，同時為代謝疾病的治療提供了臨床相關數據。

docs.title: Language-Based Digital Twins for Elderly Cognitive Assistance
docs.text:
2606.27334v1 by Mohammad Mehdi Hosseini, Mohammad H. Mahoor, Hiroko H. Dodge

Digital twins have emerged as a promising paradigm for personalized healthcare, enabling modeling of individual behavior and health trajectories. In cognitive health, early detection of Mild Cognitive Impairment (MCI) remains challenging, where language and conversational patterns serve as non-invasive biomarkers. In this work, we propose a language-based digital twin framework that leverages large language models (LLMs) to mimic the conversational behavior of elderly individuals by incorporating stylometric cues and contextual metadata. To evaluate fidelity and cognitive consistency, we introduce a multi-head conditional variational autoencoder (cVAE) that jointly measures reconstruction quality and predicts cognitive scores. Experiments on the I-CONECT dataset show that the digital twin preserves identity-specific characteristics and achieves reconstruction and MoCA prediction errors comparable to real data, while outperforming baseline GPT-generated responses. These results highlight the potential of language-based digital twins as a scalable and non-invasive approach for personalized and continuous cognitive health monitoring.

摘要：數位雙胞胎已成為個人化醫療的一個有前景的範式，使得個體行為和健康軌跡的建模成為可能。在認知健康方面，輕度認知障礙（MCI）的早期檢測仍然具有挑戰性，其中語言和對話模式作為非侵入性生物標誌。本文提出了一個基於語言的數位雙胞胎框架，利用大型語言模型（LLMs）模擬老年人的對話行為，並結合風格特徵和上下文元數據。為了評估忠實度和認知一致性，我們引入了一個多頭條件變分自編碼器（cVAE），該模型共同測量重建質量並預測認知分數。在I-CONECT數據集上的實驗顯示，數位雙胞胎保留了身份特定的特徵，並且在重建和MoCA預測誤差方面與真實數據相當，同時超越了基準GPT生成的回應。這些結果突顯了基於語言的數位雙胞胎作為一種可擴展且非侵入性的方法，用於個性化和持續的認知健康監測的潛力。

docs.title: AI Healthcare Chatbots as Information Infrastructure: A Large-Scale Study of User-Reported Breakdowns
docs.text:
2606.27302v1 by Muhammad Hassan, Ramazan Yener, Ece Gumusel, Masooda Bashir

AI healthcare chatbots are increasingly used to support health information seeking and self-management, yet their performance and impact on users remains to be studied. This study examines over 15,000 user reviews from 59 AI healthcare chatbot apps to explore how these systems function in everyday informational and emotional contexts. Topic modeling and interpretive analysis identify three recurring breakdowns: access barriers and service unreliability, user experience and interaction quality, and billing and customer support issues. Privacy and security concerns are associated with the most negative experiences. By framing AI healthcare chatbots as information infrastructures, our findings highlight how failures in access, usability, and trust affect users, offering actionable insights for designers, policymakers, and information professionals aiming to improve digital health systems.

摘要：AI 醫療聊天機器人越來越多地被用來支持健康信息的尋求和自我管理，但它們的性能和對用戶的影響仍需進一步研究。這項研究分析了來自 59 款 AI 醫療聊天機器人應用的超過 15,000 條用戶評論，以探索這些系統在日常信息和情感背景下的運作方式。主題建模和詮釋性分析識別出三個反覆出現的問題：訪問障礙和服務不可靠性、用戶體驗和互動質量，以及計費和客戶支持問題。隱私和安全問題與最負面的體驗相關聯。通過將 AI 醫療聊天機器人框架視為信息基礎設施，我們的研究結果突顯了訪問性、可用性和信任的失敗如何影響用戶，為設計師、政策制定者和信息專業人士提供了可行的見解，以改善數字健康系統。

docs.title: Simulation-based inference for rapid Bayesian parameter estimation in epidemiological models: a comparison with MCMC
docs.text:
2606.27286v1 by Alina Bazarova, Johann Fredrik Jadebeck, Henrik Zunker, Carolina J. Klett-Tammen, Torben Heinsohn, Wolfgang Wiechert, Katharina Noeh, Stefan Kesselheim

Mechanistic epidemiological models are widely used to support infectious disease forecasting and public-health decision making. Bayesian calibration of such models is commonly performed using Markov chain Monte Carlo (MCMC), which can become computationally expensive for high-dimensional nonlinear systems and repeated near-real-time analyses. Here, we investigate simulation-based inference (SBI) using neural posterior estimation as a scalable alternative for Bayesian calibration of a mechanistic SECIR epidemiological model using COVID-19 intensive care unit (ICU) occupancy data from Germany during 2020. We compared SBI and MCMC across multiple epidemic phases using both 31-day inference windows and a substantially more challenging 201-day reconstruction problem involving multiple transmission change points. Posterior agreement was evaluated quantitatively using Wasserstein distances and Kullback-Leibler divergences together with posterior predictive checks. Across the 31-day windows, SBI recovered posterior distributions in strong agreement with MCMC while accurately reproducing observed ICU trajectories. In the 201-day setting, SBI preserved the dominant posterior structure despite increased uncertainty. SBI, by combining CPU and GPU resources, substantially reduced computational runtime compared with MCMC, which was restricted to running on CPUs. Whereas MCMC required approximately 1000 seconds for the 31-day inference problems, SBI achieved comparable posterior and predictive performance in approximately 60-70 seconds on a single GPU. For the 201-day inference problem, SBI required an average of 157 seconds, while the MCMC runs took over 19,000 seconds. Our results demonstrate that SBI provides a rapid and computationally efficient framework for Bayesian calibration of mechanistic epidemiological models, supporting repeated near-real-time inference and rapid outbreak analysis.

摘要：機制流行病學模型被廣泛用於支持傳染病預測和公共衛生決策。這類模型的貝葉斯校準通常使用馬爾可夫鏈蒙特卡羅（MCMC）進行，對於高維非線性系統和重複的近實時分析來說，計算成本可能非常高。在此，我們使用神經後驗估計進行基於模擬的推斷（SBI），作為一種可擴展的替代方案，對2020年德國COVID-19重症監護病房（ICU）佔用數據的機制SECIR流行病學模型進行貝葉斯校準。我們在多個流行病階段比較了SBI和MCMC，使用31天的推斷窗口以及涉及多個傳播變化點的更具挑戰性的201天重建問題。後驗一致性通過使用Wasserstein距離和Kullback-Leibler散度以及後驗預測檢查進行了定量評估。在31天的窗口中，SBI恢復的後驗分佈與MCMC高度一致，同時準確再現了觀察到的ICU軌跡。在201天的設置中，儘管不確定性增加，SBI仍保留了主要的後驗結構。SBI通過結合CPU和GPU資源，顯著減少了計算運行時間，而MCMC則限制於在CPU上運行。對於31天的推斷問題，MCMC大約需要1000秒，而SBI在單個GPU上大約只需60-70秒即可達到可比的後驗和預測性能。對於201天的推斷問題，SBI平均需要157秒，而MCMC運行則超過19000秒。我們的結果表明，SBI提供了一種快速且計算高效的框架，用於機制流行病學模型的貝葉斯校準，支持重複的近實時推斷和快速疫情分析。

docs.title: MedDiffuseMix: Preserving Diagnostic Evidence with Saliency-Aware Diffusion Medical Image Data Augmentatio
docs.text:
2606.28419v1 by Teerath Kumar, Raja Vavekanand, Muhammad Turab

Limited data availability, class imbalance, and domain variability remain major barriers to reliable medical image classification. Conventional augmentation can improve training diversity but may distort diagnostically informative structures, whereas unconstrained generative augmentation may introduce label-inconsistent content. This paper proposes MedDiffuseMix, a saliency-guided diffusion mixing framework for controlled medical image augmentation. The method uses classifier-derived saliency maps to separate high-saliency diagnostic regions from low-saliency background areas and applies diffusion-guided mixing mainly to regions with lower diagnostic importance. Adaptive mixing, Gaussian boundary blending, and a saliency-preservation constraint reduce semantic distortion and reject or attenuate samples that shift model attention away from clinically relevant evidence. The framework is evaluated on four public benchmarks: the Radiological Society of North America pneumonia chest radiography dataset, Musculoskeletal Radiographs, PatchCamelyon, and the Breast Cancer Histopathological Image Classification dataset. Experiments with convolutional and transformer-based classifiers show that MedDiffuseMix improves accuracy, F1-score, and area under the receiver operating characteristic curve compared with standard augmentation, Mixup, GenMix, SaliencyMix, and diffusion-based augmentation baselines. Ablation studies confirm the importance of saliency guidance, adaptive region mixing, and smooth boundary blending. Visual attribution analysis further indicates that MedDiffuseMix better preserves diagnostically salient regions. These results suggest that saliency-guided diffusion mixing is an effective augmentation strategy for limited-data medical image classification.

摘要：有限的數據可用性、類別不平衡和領域變異性仍然是可靠醫學影像分類的主要障礙。傳統的增強方法可以改善訓練多樣性，但可能會扭曲診斷上有信息的結構，而不受限制的生成增強則可能引入標籤不一致的內容。本文提出了MedDiffuseMix，一種基於顯著性引導的擴散混合框架，用於受控的醫學影像增強。該方法使用分類器衍生的顯著性圖來將高顯著性診斷區域與低顯著性背景區域分開，並主要對診斷重要性較低的區域應用擴散引導混合。自適應混合、高斯邊界混合和顯著性保護約束減少了語義扭曲，並拒絕或減弱那些使模型注意力偏離臨床相關證據的樣本。該框架在四個公共基準上進行評估：北美放射學會肺炎胸部X光影像數據集、肌肉骨骼X光影像、PatchCamelyon和乳腺癌組織病理圖像分類數據集。與標準增強、Mixup、GenMix、SaliencyMix和基於擴散的增強基準相比，使用卷積和基於Transformer的分類器的實驗顯示，MedDiffuseMix提高了準確性、F1分數和接收者操作特徵曲線下面積。消融研究確認了顯著性引導、自適應區域混合和光滑邊界混合的重要性。視覺歸因分析進一步表明，MedDiffuseMix更好地保留了診斷上顯著的區域。這些結果表明，顯著性引導的擴散混合是一種有效的增強策略，適用於有限數據的醫學影像分類。

docs.title: Compression-Driven Anomaly Detection in Brain MRI Using an Interpretable Quantum Autoencoder
docs.text:
2606.27411v1 by Santanu Ganguly, Xing Liang, Dimitrios Makris

We study a quantum autoencoder (QAE) for compression-driven anomaly detection in brain MRI data. The approach leverages angle encoding to map image patches into quantum states, followed by a variational encoder-decoder architecture trained to discard information via auxiliary trash qubits. Anomaly scores reflect the degree to which inputs resist compression relative to normal data, with higher scores corresponding to deviations from the learned normal manifold. Evaluated on publicly available brain MRI DICOM datasets, the method achieves a slice-level ROC-AUC of approximately 0.95 and a patch-level ROC-AUC of approximately 0.813, outperforming classical autoencoder and PCA baselines. Analysis of the learned parameters reveals a pronounced encoder-decoder asymmetry, where effective anomaly detection arises from structured information compression within the encoder rather than increased parameter magnitude or decoder expressivity. This results in a controlled compression-reconstruction trade-off with a clear operating regime that supports principled threshold selection. Qualitative evaluation further shows that the QAE produces spatially localized anomaly heatmaps aligned with tumorous regions. The results, supported by promising baseline performances, demonstrate that quantum autoencoders provide an interpretable and controllable mechanism for anomaly detection based on incompressibility with respect to a learned latent representation. This work highlights the potential of quantum autoencoders as a principled tool for studying compression dynamics in quantum machine learning, with promising implications for decision support in medical imaging workflows.

摘要：我們研究了一種量子自編碼器（QAE），用於基於壓縮驅動的腦部MRI數據異常檢測。這種方法利用角度編碼將圖像補丁映射到量子狀態，然後使用變分編碼器-解碼器架構進行訓練，以通過輔助垃圾量子位丟棄信息。異常分數反映了輸入相對於正常數據抵抗壓縮的程度，分數越高對應於與學習到的正常流形的偏差。該方法在公開可用的腦部MRI DICOM數據集上進行評估，達到約0.95的切片級ROC-AUC和約0.813的補丁級ROC-AUC，優於傳統自編碼器和PCA基準。對學習參數的分析顯示出明顯的編碼器-解碼器不對稱性，有效的異常檢測源於編碼器內部的結構化信息壓縮，而非參數大小的增加或解碼器表達能力的提高。這導致了一種受控的壓縮-重建權衡，具有明確的操作範疇，支持原則性的閾值選擇。質性評估進一步顯示，QAE產生的異常熱圖在空間上與腫瘤區域對齊。這些結果，得到有希望的基準性能支持，顯示量子自編碼器提供了一種可解釋且可控的異常檢測機制，基於相對於學習到的潛在表示的不壓縮性。這項工作突顯了量子自編碼器作為一種原則性工具在量子機器學習中研究壓縮動態的潛力，對醫學影像工作流程中的決策支持具有良好的啟示。

docs.title: Auditing Framing-Sensitive Behavioral Instability in Large Language Models for Mental Health Interactions
docs.text:
2606.26982v1 by Abla Bedoui, Ashley L. Greene, Mohammed Cherkaoui

Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly being integrated into mental health support tools and other psychologically sensitive conversational applications. In such settings, behavioral stability and consistency are important for trustworthy human-AI interaction. However, semantically similar concerns can be presented through different contextual framings, potentially eliciting different model responses. Such framing-sensitive variability may challenge user expectations regarding system behavior and complicate the assessment of AI reliability. While prior studies have primarily examined such effects at the behavioral level, less is known about how framing-related variation is reflected in the internal representations of aligned language models. In this work, we investigate these effects using controlled matched prompts spanning multiple contextual framing conditions across several instruction-tuned model families. Across architectures, framing systematically alters interpretive response tendencies. Layer-wise probing analyses show that behavior-associated information remains decodable throughout transformer depth, with architecture-dependent variation in decoding strength. Moreover, held-out framing probes remained consistently above chance across architectures despite strong lexical baselines. Activation steering experiments further suggest that framing-associated representational directions can partially modulate downstream behavioral outcomes. Finally, these findings indicate that robustness to contextual variation may represent an important consideration when evaluating the consistency and trustworthiness of conversational AI systems deployed in mental-health-oriented interactions.

摘要：大型語言模型（LLMs）正逐漸被整合進心理健康支持工具和其他心理敏感的對話應用中。在這些環境中，行為穩定性和一致性對於值得信賴的人類與人工智慧互動至關重要。然而，語義上相似的問題可以通過不同的上下文框架呈現，可能引發不同的模型反應。這種對框架敏感的變異性可能會挑戰用戶對系統行為的期望，並使評估人工智慧的可靠性變得複雜。雖然先前的研究主要在行為層面上考察了這些效應，但對於框架相關變異如何反映在對齊語言模型的內部表徵中，了解的卻較少。在這項工作中，我們使用控制的匹配提示，研究跨多個上下文框架條件的多個指令調整模型家族中的這些效應。在各種架構中，框架系統性地改變了解釋性反應的傾向。逐層探測分析顯示，與行為相關的信息在Transformer的深度中始終可解碼，且解碼強度存在架構依賴的變化。此外，保留的框架探測在各架構中始終高於隨機機率，儘管存在強大的詞彙基線。激活引導實驗進一步表明，與框架相關的表徵方向可以部分調節下游的行為結果。最後，這些發現表明，對上下文變異的穩健性可能在評估部署於心理健康導向互動中的對話人工智慧系統的一致性和可信度時，代表著一個重要的考量。

docs.title: SamaVaani: Auditing and Debiasing Multilingual Clinical ASR for Indian Languages
docs.text:
2606.26901v1 by Subham Kumar, Prakrithi Shivaprakash, Abhishek Manoharan, Astut Kurariya, Diptadhi Mukherjee, Prabhat Chand, Pratima Murthy, Koustav Rudra, Lekhansh Shukla, Animesh Mukherjee

Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) is increasingly used to document clinical encounters, yet its reliability in multilingual and demographically diverse Indian healthcare context remains largely unknown. In this study, we first conduct the systematic audit of ASR performance on real-world psychiatric interview data spanning Kannada, Hindi and Indian English, comparing eight state-of-the-art models including IndicWhisper, WhisperLargeV3, Sarvam, GoogleS2T, Gemma3n, OmniLingual, Vaani, and Gemini. Our results reveal substantial variability across models and languages, with some systems performing competitively in Indian English but failing in regional speech. We further fine-tune two of the best performing opensource models, i.e., Gemma3n and OmniLingual, using various methods. With this, we uncover systematic performance gaps tied to speaker role and gender, raising concerns about equitable deployment in clinical settings, which are further mitigated by fairness-aware fine-tuning. To this end, we propose SamaVaani, a unified debiasing technique that simultaneously improves ASR performance and improves fairness across demographic groups.

摘要：自動語音識別（ASR）在記錄臨床會診中越來越常被使用，但其在多語言和人口統計多樣化的印度醫療環境中的可靠性仍然大多未知。在本研究中，我們首先對涵蓋卡納達語、印地語和印度英語的真實世界精神病訪談數據進行ASR性能的系統審核，並比較了八個最先進的模型，包括IndicWhisper、WhisperLargeV3、Sarvam、GoogleS2T、Gemma3n、OmniLingual、Vaani和Gemini。我們的結果顯示，各模型和語言之間存在顯著的變異性，某些系統在印度英語中表現競爭力，但在地方語言中表現不佳。我們進一步微調了兩個性能最佳的開源模型，即Gemma3n和OmniLingual，使用了各種方法。由此，我們揭示了與說話者角色和性別相關的系統性性能差距，這引發了對臨床環境中公平部署的擔憂，而這些擔憂在公平感知的微調下得到了進一步的緩解。為此，我們提出了SamaVaani，一種統一的去偏見技術，能同時改善ASR性能並提升各人口群體之間的公平性。

docs.title: A Pipeline for Generating Longitudinal Synthetic Clinical Notes Using Large Language Models
docs.text:
2606.26879v2 by William Poulett, Alice Waterhouse, Ben Wallace, Scarlett Kynoch, Amaia Imaz Blanco, Michael Spence, Jonathan Pearson

Synthetic data is increasingly used to enable the development and evaluation of AI systems in domains where access to real-world data is restricted. In healthcare, clinical documentation presents particular challenges due to its sensitivity. This work introduces a synthetic clinical notes pipeline and dataset designed to support the development of clinical AI tools while avoiding the privacy risks associated with real patient data. The dataset is generated using a modular pipeline that combines structured patient generation, semi-structured patient journey simulation, and unstructured clinical note generation using large language models. The pipeline is designed to prioritise internal consistency across longitudinal patient records, while also capturing variation in writing style, note structure, and clinical detail. Additional mechanisms, including LLM-based validation and augmentation steps, are used to improve faithfulness, realism, and diversity of the generated notes. We release a dataset of 70 synthetic patients, each associated with 20-50 clinical notes spanning a full hospital journey. The dataset is provided at multiple levels of validation, enabling users to balance realism and scalability depending on their use case. This dataset supports the development, testing, and evaluation of clinical AI systems, including summarisation tools, coding models, and decision support systems, without reliance on real patient data.

摘要：合成數據越來越多地被用來促進在現實世界數據獲取受限的領域中開發和評估人工智慧系統。在醫療保健領域，臨床文檔因其敏感性而面臨特定挑戰。本研究介紹了一個合成臨床筆記管道和數據集，旨在支持臨床人工智慧工具的開發，同時避免與真實患者數據相關的隱私風險。該數據集是通過一個模組化管道生成的，該管道結合了結構化患者生成、半結構化患者旅程模擬和使用大型語言模型的非結構化臨床筆記生成。該管道旨在優先考慮縱向患者記錄之間的內部一致性，同時捕捉寫作風格、筆記結構和臨床細節的變化。還使用了包括基於LLM的驗證和增強步驟在內的附加機制，以提高生成筆記的真實性、現實性和多樣性。我們發布了一個包含70名合成患者的數據集，每名患者都與20-50份涵蓋完整醫院旅程的臨床筆記相關聯。該數據集提供了多個驗證級別，使得用戶可以根據其使用案例平衡現實性和可擴展性。這個數據集支持臨床人工智慧系統的開發、測試和評估，包括摘要工具、編碼模型和決策支持系統，而無需依賴真實患者數據。

docs.title: Computational Analysis of Heart Rate Variability in Healthy Adults
docs.text:
2606.26816v1 by María J. Lado, Arturo J. Méndez, Leandro Rodriguez-Liñares, Baltasar García Pérez-Schofield, Pedro Cuesta-Morales, Brais Iglesias-Otero, Xose A. Vila

Heart Rate Variability (HRV) analysis is a key indicator of cardiac physiological state and aids in disease diagnosis. However, research on HRV parameters in healthy individuals remains limited, and no gold standard exists. This study evaluates HRV indices in 40 healthy adults (20 men, 20 women, aged 30-50) to improve HRV's clinical utility. Using computational methods for signal processing and data analysis, time, frequency, and nonlinear indices were analyzed to address five questions: (1) normality, (2) stability, (3) correlation, (4) reproducibility, and (5) consistency. Key findings: (1) Time-domain and nonlinear indices, particularly global and LF (low frequency), follow normal distributions, with gender differences noted. (2) Most indices are stable except HF (high frequency)-related ones. (3) High correlations in HF-related indices suggest redundancy, indicating only one is necessary in studies. (4) Comparisons with the Fantasia database revealed less than 10% error for most indices, except SD2 and SDNN in women (greater than 15%). (5) Time-domain and nonlinear indices show low inter-study variability, while frequency-domain indices exhibit high variability, limiting cross-study comparisons. The selected indices-ApEn and IRRR (global variability), HRVi and SD2 (LF), and MADRR or rMSSD (HF)-are best suited for accurately representing HRV components and enhancing its clinical and research relevance.

摘要：心率變異性（HRV）分析是心臟生理狀態的關鍵指標，有助於疾病診斷。然而，對健康個體的HRV參數研究仍然有限，且尚無金標準。本研究評估了40名健康成年人（20名男性，20名女性，年齡30-50歲）的HRV指標，以提高HRV的臨床實用性。使用計算方法進行信號處理和數據分析，分析了時間、頻率和非線性指標，以解決五個問題：（1）正態性，（2）穩定性，（3）相關性，（4）重現性，以及（5）一致性。主要發現：（1）時間域和非線性指標，特別是全局和LF（低頻），遵循正態分佈，並注意到性別差異。（2）除了與HF（高頻）相關的指標外，大多數指標是穩定的。（3）HF相關指標之間的高相關性表明冗餘，這意味著在研究中只需要一個指標。（4）與Fantasia數據庫的比較顯示，大多數指標的誤差低於10％，除了女性的SD2和SDNN（超過15％）。（5）時間域和非線性指標顯示出低的跨研究變異性，而頻率域指標則顯示出高變異性，限制了跨研究比較。所選指標-ApEn和IRRR（全局變異性）、HRVi和SD2（LF）、以及MADRR或rMSSD（HF）-最適合準確表示HRV組件並增強其臨床和研究相關性。

docs.title: Anatomy-Guided Residual Motion Diffusion for Controllable 4D Cardiac MRI Synthesis
docs.text:
2606.26764v1 by Yiheng Cao, Gustavo Andrade-Miranda, Jiatian Zhang, Lingxiao Zhao, Xin Gao

Developing robust artificial intelligence models for 4D (3D + time) medical imaging is constrained by limited annotated data, inter-device domain shifts, and privacy restrictions. To address this, we propose a 4D controllable generative framework for anatomically consistent data augmentation. A semi-supervised variational autoencoder learns a compact latent representation of anatomical volumes while jointly predicting aligned segmentation masks in a unified framework. Anatomical structure is then disentangled from temporal dynamics through a cascaded latent diffusion model (LDM). A static LDM generates subject-specific anatomy conditioned on clinical priors (diagnosis and volumes measures) and a subsequent motion LDM estimates residual latent motions, ensuring strict temporal coherence across the 4D sequence. The proposed approach was evaluated on cine cardiac MRI as a representative 4D imaging application. Experiments across multiple datasets demonstrate high controllability of static anatomy (Pearson r > 0.8) and strong temporal coherence (FVD = 288.08). In cross-vendor generalization experiments, augmenting training sets with synthetic 4D sequences significantly improves downstream segmentation performance. Using nnU-Net, the proposed augmentation strategy improves the average Dice score by 1.4% and reduces the Hausdorff Distance by 3.0mm compared to training on real data alone, for the left ventricle, Dice improves by 2.8% with a 5.4mm reduction in boundary error. Overall, this framework provides a scalable and controllable solution for 4D medical image synthesis, supporting the development of more robust models with limited annotations and cross-vendor variability. Code available on https://github.com/cyiheng/4DCardiacMRISynthesis.

摘要：開發適用於 4D (3D + 時間) 醫學影像的穩健人工智慧模型受到有限的標註數據、設備間的領域轉移和隱私限制的制約。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了一種 4D 可控生成框架，用於解剖一致的數據增強。一個半監督的變分自編碼器學習解剖體積的緊湊潛在表示，同時在統一框架中共同預測對齊的分割掩碼。然後，通過級聯的潛在擴散模型 (LDM) 將解剖結構與時間動態分離。靜態 LDM 根據臨床先驗（診斷和體積測量）生成特定於主體的解剖結構，隨後的運動 LDM 估計殘餘的潛在運動，確保 4D 序列中的嚴格時間一致性。所提出的方法在 cine 心臟 MRI 上進行評估，作為代表性的 4D 成像應用。多個數據集的實驗顯示靜態解剖的高可控性（Pearson r > 0.8）和強時間一致性（FVD = 288.08）。在跨供應商的泛化實驗中，使用合成的 4D 序列增強訓練集顯著提高了下游分割性能。使用 nnU-Net，所提出的增強策略使平均 Dice 分數提高了 1.4%，並將 Hausdorff 距離減少了 3.0mm，對於左心室，Dice 提高了 2.8%，邊界誤差減少了 5.4mm。總體而言，這個框架提供了一個可擴展且可控的解決方案，用於 4D 醫學影像合成，支持在有限標註和跨供應商變異性下開發更穩健的模型。代碼可在 https://github.com/cyiheng/4DCardiacMRISynthesis 獲得。

docs.title: A Latent ODE Approach to Spatiotemporal Modeling of Cine Cardiac MRI
docs.text:
2606.26718v1 by David Brüggemann, Ekaterina Krymova, Firat Özdemir, Jochen von Spiczak, Sebastian Kozerke, Samia Mora, Robert Manka, Mathieu Salzmann, Olga V. Demler

Cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (CMR) captures rich spatiotemporal information about ventricular structure and motion, but conventional risk models use only a few image-derived indices from selected cardiac phases. We present a latent dynamical model that encodes bi-ventricular anatomy and full-cycle cine motion as a continuous latent trajectory, using heart-rate-aware neural ordinary differential equation (ODE) dynamics and a graph-based mesh autoencoder to reconstruct anatomically consistent 3D+t ventricular motion. A covariate-conditioned prior defines the expected end-diastolic latent state, and a Cox proportional hazards model tests whether deviations from this prior predict incident heart failure. We studied 72,386 UK Biobank participants without baseline cardiovascular disease, including 367 incident heart failure events. In a held-out evaluation subset, adding the latent score to refitted pooled cohort equations improved the stratified C-index from 0.704 to 0.785, compared with 0.764 for seven established cardiac markers. Compared with non-graph and non-ODE approaches, the proposed model gave the best trade-off between reconstruction fidelity, generative realism, and downstream prognostic performance. These results suggest that continuous full-cycle modeling of ventricular motion provides informative cardiac phenotypes beyond conventional CMR summaries, while external validation in more representative patient cohorts is required before clinical risk-prediction use.

摘要：心臟磁共振成像 (CMR) 捕捉了豐富的時空信息，關於心室結構和運動，但傳統的風險模型僅使用來自選定心臟相位的少數影像衍生指標。我們提出了一個潛在動態模型，將雙心室解剖和全週期心臟運動編碼為連續的潛在軌跡，使用考慮心率的神經常微分方程 (ODE) 動力學和基於圖形的網格自編碼器來重建解剖一致的 3D+t 心室運動。一個條件協變量的先驗定義了預期的舒張末期潛在狀態，而 Cox 比例風險模型測試從這個先驗的偏差是否預測事件性心力衰竭。我們研究了 72,386 名沒有基線心血管疾病的英國生物銀行參與者，包括 367 例事件性心力衰竭。在一個保留的評估子集上，將潛在分數添加到重新擬合的合併隊列方程中，將分層 C 指數從 0.704 提高到 0.785，而七個已建立的心臟標記的 C 指數為 0.764。與非圖形和非 ODE 方法相比，所提出的模型在重建真實性、生成現實性和下游預後性能之間提供了最佳的權衡。這些結果表明，心室運動的連續全週期建模提供了超越傳統 CMR 總結的信息性心臟表型，但在臨床風險預測使用之前，需要在更具代表性的患者隊列中進行外部驗證。

docs.title: MLFFM-SegDiff: A Multi-Level Feature Fusion Diffusion Model for Skin Lesion Segmentation
docs.text:
2606.26712v1 by Jingjun Gu, Chaojie Shen, Yifeng Cao, Wei Zhang, Yiliu Li, Aobo Fan

Skin lesion segmentation is a key task in computer-aided dermatological diagnosis, where accuracy directly impacts downstream analysis and disease classification. However, dermoscopic images are challenging due to blurred boundaries, low contrast, large shape variations, and artifacts such as hair and shadows. Recently, diffusion models have shown strong performance in medical image segmentation thanks to their progressive denoising and distribution modeling capabilities. Nevertheless, existing diffusion-based methods still suffer from limited cross-level feature interaction and insufficient boundary detail recovery. To address these issues, we propose MLFFM-SegDiff, a multi-level feature fusion diffusion model for skin lesion segmentation. Built on a diffusion framework, the method introduces a dual-path U-Net encoder, a Multi-Level Feature Fusion Module (MLFFM), and a boundary-sensitive loss function. The dual-path encoder enhances interaction between noisy mask features and dermoscopic image features. MLFFM improves skip connections via attention, scale alignment, and adaptive cross-level fusion. These designs enable the decoder to jointly leverage shallow boundary cues and deep semantic representations, improving mask reconstruction quality. Experiments on ISIC2018, PH2, and HAM10000 demonstrate that MLFFM-SegDiff outperforms representative methods including DermoSegDiff, U-Net, and SwinUNETR across Accuracy, F1-score, Jaccard index, Recall, and Dice. In particular, it achieves an average Jaccard index of 0.8546 and Dice coefficient of 0.9207. These results validate the effectiveness of the proposed multi-level feature fusion strategy for improving lesion segmentation performance. The code will be released at https://github.com/Qacket/MLFFM-SegDiff.git after publication.

摘要：皮膚病變分割是電腦輔助皮膚科診斷中的一項關鍵任務，其準確性直接影響後續分析和疾病分類。然而，皮膚鏡圖像因邊界模糊、對比度低、形狀變化大以及毛髮和陰影等伪影而具有挑戰性。最近，擴散模型因其逐步去噪和分佈建模能力在醫學影像分割中顯示出強大的性能。然而，現有的基於擴散的方法仍然受到有限的跨層特徵互動和邊界細節恢復不足的困擾。為了解決這些問題，我們提出了MLFFM-SegDiff，一種用於皮膚病變分割的多層特徵融合擴散模型。該方法基於擴散框架，引入了雙路徑U-Net編碼器、多層特徵融合模塊（MLFFM）和邊界敏感損失函數。雙路徑編碼器增強了噪聲掩碼特徵與皮膚鏡圖像特徵之間的互動。MLFFM通過注意力、尺度對齊和自適應跨層融合來改善跳躍連接。這些設計使解碼器能夠共同利用淺層邊界線索和深層語義表示，提高了掩碼重建質量。在ISIC2018、PH2和HAM10000上的實驗表明，MLFFM-SegDiff在準確性、F1分數、Jaccard指數、召回率和Dice上超越了包括DermoSegDiff、U-Net和SwinUNETR在內的代表性方法。特別是，它達到了平均Jaccard指數0.8546和Dice係數0.9207。這些結果驗證了所提出的多層特徵融合策略在提高病變分割性能方面的有效性。代碼將在發表後於https://github.com/Qacket/MLFFM-SegDiff.git釋出。

docs.title: Automated brain tumor detection in MRI images using CNN and ResNet architectures
docs.text:
2606.27405v1 by Annapurna V K, Asha N, K Paramesha, Shabana Sultana, Kirankumar Humse

Deep learning has shown significant potential in medical image analysis, particularly for disease detection using MRI scans. Accurate and early diagnosis of brain tumors remains challenging due to the complexity of brain structures and reliance on manual interpretation. This work presents an automated deep learning-based approach for brain tumor detection from MRI images using Convolutional Neural Networks and Residual Networks. Transfer learning is applied with two pretrained architectures, ResNet18 and ResNet50, to classify MRI scans into tumor and non-tumor categories. Experiments are conducted on a dataset of 3,929 brain MRI images, evaluating the impact of model depth and fine-tuning strategies. The results show that ResNet18 achieves a higher accuracy of 97% compared to 96% for ResNet50, demonstrating better generalization on limited medical data. The proposed framework enables fast, accurate, and cost-effective brain tumor detection, supporting early diagnosis and clinical decision-making.

摘要：深度學習在醫學影像分析中顯示出顯著的潛力，特別是在使用 MRI 掃描進行疾病檢測方面。由於腦部結構的複雜性和對手動解釋的依賴，準確且早期的腦腫瘤診斷仍然具有挑戰性。這項工作提出了一種基於深度學習的自動化方法，利用卷積神經網絡和殘差網絡從 MRI 圖像中檢測腦腫瘤。使用兩種預訓練架構 ResNet18 和 ResNet50 應用遷移學習，將 MRI 掃描分類為腫瘤和非腫瘤類別。對 3,929 張腦部 MRI 圖像的數據集進行了實驗，評估模型深度和微調策略的影響。結果顯示，ResNet18 的準確率達到 97%，而 ResNet50 為 96%，在有限的醫療數據上顯示出更好的泛化能力。所提出的框架實現了快速、準確且具成本效益的腦腫瘤檢測，支持早期診斷和臨床決策。

docs.title: What the LLM Should Not Say: Boundary-Aware Context Grounding for A Seven-Channel EEG Agent
docs.text:
2606.26519v2 by Zhiyuan Xu, Yueqing Dai, Junling Li, Junwen Luo

Large language models (LLMs) can make scientific software easier to use. However, a general model does not automatically know which measurements a particular sensor can support, which algorithms are implemented in the current software, or which conclusions are justified by a computed result. These distinctions are especially important for low-channel electroencephalography (EEG), where sparse spatial coverage and variable signal quality make plausible but unsupported interpretations easy to produce. We present NeuraDock Agent, an open-source architecture that separates a deterministic local EEG engine from a hardware-aware language layer. The numerical engine parses recordings, performs quality control, executes reviewed spectral workflows, and writes machine-readable artifacts. The LLM receives only a compact, allowlisted summary and a versioned context pack. The context describes the seven-channel hardware, reviewed workflows, result fields, implementation boundaries, scientific limits, and reference cases. Raw EEG and dense per-sample arrays remain local We evaluate the system at three levels. First, 12 recordings produced identical structured results over ten numerical repetitions, and a complete Rest/Task run produced identical result, report, and figure hashes over three repetitions. Second, request-capture and failure-injection experiments confirmed the tested data boundary and preservation of local artifacts under HTTP, malformed-output, and connection failures. Third, a boundary-awareness benchmark tested 36 ordinary and adversarial questions under four context ablations and two LLMs, yielding 288 outputs.These results support hardware- and implementation-aware grounding as a practical mechanism for calibrating what an EEG agent accepts, qualifies, or refuses; they do not establish clinical validity or a validated absolute cognitive-load index.

摘要：大型語言模型（LLMs）可以使科學軟體更易於使用。然而，一個通用模型並不自動知道特定傳感器可以支持哪些測量，當前軟體中實現了哪些算法，或是計算結果所支持的結論。這些區別對於低通道腦電圖（EEG）尤其重要，因為稀疏的空間覆蓋和變化的信號質量使得可信但未經支持的解釋容易產生。我們提出了 NeuraDock Agent，一種開源架構，將確定性本地 EEG 引擎與硬體感知語言層分開。數值引擎解析錄音，執行質量控制，執行審核過的頻譜工作流程，並寫入機器可讀的文檔。LLM 只接收一個緊湊的、經允許的摘要和一個版本化的上下文包。上下文描述了七通道硬體、審核過的工作流程、結果字段、實施邊界、科學限制和參考案例。原始 EEG 和密集的每樣本數組保持在本地。

我們在三個層面上評估系統。首先，12 個錄音在十次數值重複中產生了相同的結構化結果，完整的休息/任務運行在三次重複中產生了相同的結果、報告和圖形哈希。其次，請求捕獲和故障注入實驗確認了測試數據邊界和在 HTTP、格式錯誤輸出和連接故障下本地文檔的保護。第三，邊界感知基準在四個上下文消融和兩個 LLM 下測試了 36 個普通和對抗性問題，產生了 288 個輸出。這些結果支持硬體和實施感知的基礎作為校準 EEG 代理接受、確認或拒絕的實用機制；它們並未建立臨床有效性或經驗證的絕對認知負荷指數。

docs.title: Clinical Harness for Governable Medical AI Skill Ecosystems
docs.text:
2606.26494v2 by Tianhan Xu, Lei Bao, Zhe Hu, Tian Shen, Yongxiang Wang

Medical AI remains organized around isolated models, whereas care requires accountable capabilities that persist across time. We define clinical AI skills and propose the Clinical Harness, a runtime governance architecture that registers, orchestrates, constrains and monitors them. Using osteoporosis as an exemplar, we show how knowledge-driven, data-driven and physics-enhanced skills can support lifecycle care and provide a governed substrate for future medical agents.

摘要：醫療人工智慧仍然圍繞著孤立的模型組織，而護理需要持續存在的可負責能力。我們定義了臨床人工智慧技能，並提出了臨床治理架構，這是一種運行時治理架構，用於註冊、協調、約束和監控這些技能。以骨質疏鬆症為例，我們展示了知識驅動、數據驅動和物理增強的技能如何支持生命周期護理，並為未來的醫療代理提供一個受治理的基礎。

docs.title: MKG-RAG-Bench: Benchmarking Retrieval in Multimodal Knowledge Graph-Augmented Generation
docs.text:
2606.26458v1 by Xiaochen Wang, Bao Hoang, Han Liu, Ting Wang, Fenglong Ma

Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) over knowledge graphs has emerged as a promising approach for grounding large language models, yet existing benchmarks largely overlook the challenges of retrieval in multimodal knowledge graph RAG (MKG-RAG). In practice, retrieval is a critical bottleneck: multimodal knowledge is heterogeneous, difficult to align across modalities, and often poorly served by retrievers designed for unstructured corpora. To address this gap, we introduce MKG-RAG-Bench, a cross-domain benchmark explicitly designed to evaluate retrieval in MKG-RAG. MKG-RAG-Bench is constructed from two multimodal knowledge graphs spanning general and medical domains, and includes carefully aligned question-answering datasets that support controlled evaluation of both retrieval and downstream generation. The benchmark is built using an LLM-based curation pipeline that filters low-utility knowledge, generates structurally grounded queries with exact supervision, and systematically covers diverse modality configurations. Through extensive experiments across representative retriever families and modality settings, we show that effective multimodal retrieval remains challenging yet crucial for end-to-end MKG-RAG performance, and that retrieval quality strongly determines generation outcomes. By isolating retrieval as a first-class evaluation target, MKG-RAG-Bench provides a principled foundation for diagnosing current limitations and advancing multimodal knowledge graph RAG systems.

摘要：檢索增強生成（RAG）在知識圖譜上的應用已成為為大型語言模型提供基礎的有前景方法，然而現有的基準在很大程度上忽視了多模態知識圖譜 RAG（MKG-RAG）中檢索的挑戰。在實踐中，檢索是一個關鍵瓶頸：多模態知識是異質的，難以在不同模態之間對齊，且通常不適合為設計用於非結構化語料庫的檢索器所服務。為了解決這一問題，我們介紹了 MKG-RAG-Bench，一個明確設計用於評估 MKG-RAG 中檢索的跨領域基準。MKG-RAG-Bench 是由兩個涵蓋一般和醫療領域的多模態知識圖譜構建而成，並包括精心對齊的問答數據集，以支持對檢索和下游生成的控制評估。該基準是使用基於 LLM 的策展管道構建的，該管道過濾低效用知識，生成具有精確監督的結構化查詢，並系統地涵蓋多樣的模態配置。通過在代表性檢索器家族和模態設置中進行廣泛實驗，我們顯示出有效的多模態檢索仍然具有挑戰性，但對於端到端的 MKG-RAG 性能至關重要，且檢索質量強烈影響生成結果。通過將檢索孤立為一個一級評估目標，MKG-RAG-Bench 為診斷當前限制和推進多模態知識圖譜 RAG 系統提供了一個原則性的基礎。

docs.title: Parametric Generalized Adaptive Moment Features (PG-AMF) for Bearing Fault Diagnosis and Machine Health Monitoring
docs.text:
2606.26317v1 by Rajeev Kumar

Accurate fault diagnosis of rolling element bearings in rotating machinery is considered essential for ensuring industrial safety and enabling predictive maintenance. Conventional statistical feature-based methods rely on predefined descriptors, whose diagnostic sensitivity is constrained by fixed configurations and limited adaptability across varying fault conditions. Although deep learning approaches offer strong representational capacity, their effectiveness is often restricted by high data requirements and reduced interpretability. In this work, a parametric adaptive feature extraction framework is proposed, in which feature characteristics are learned directly from data rather than being manually specified. Multiple complementary representations are extracted from vibration signals, including absolute features capturing signal energy distribution, signed moment features reflecting waveform asymmetry, and AC-coupled moment features emphasizing dynamic fluctuations, while interactions between multiple sensor channels are modeled through a structured fusion mechanism to enhance fault representation. The proposed approach is evaluated on a benchmark gearbox bearing dataset comprising five health conditions, including normal operation and multiple fault types. Improved classification performance is observed compared to conventional methods, with consistent results under cross-validation, indicating strong generalization capability. Additionally, enhanced feature separability is demonstrated through clearer clustering patterns in low-dimensional projections. The learned representations effectively capture a wide range of signal characteristics, supporting both improved diagnostic performance and practical applicability in industrial monitoring systems.

摘要：準確的滾動元件軸承故障診斷在旋轉機械中被認為對於確保工業安全和實現預測性維護至關重要。傳統的基於統計特徵的方法依賴於預定義的描述符，其診斷靈敏度受到固定配置和在不同故障條件下有限適應性的限制。雖然深度學習方法提供了強大的表徵能力，但其有效性往往受到高數據需求和解釋性降低的限制。在這項工作中，提出了一個參數自適應特徵提取框架，其中特徵特性是直接從數據中學習的，而不是手動指定的。從振動信號中提取多個互補的表徵，包括捕捉信號能量分佈的絕對特徵、反映波形不對稱的有符號矩特徵，以及強調動態波動的交流耦合矩特徵，同時通過結構化融合機制建模多個傳感器通道之間的交互，以增強故障表徵。所提出的方法在一個基準齒輪箱軸承數據集上進行評估，該數據集包含五種健康狀態，包括正常運行和多種故障類型。與傳統方法相比，觀察到改進的分類性能，在交叉驗證下結果一致，顯示出強大的泛化能力。此外，通過在低維投影中更清晰的聚類模式，顯示出增強的特徵可分離性。學習到的表徵有效捕捉了廣泛的信號特徵，支持了改進的診斷性能和在工業監控系統中的實際應用。

docs.title: Governing Actions, Not Agents: Institutional Attestation as a Governance Model for Autonomous AI Systems
docs.text:
2606.26298v1 by Jakob Salfeld-Nebgen

Autonomous AI agents may begin to perform consequential, irreversible actions such as clinical prescribing and production software deployment. This paper observes that human institutions have governed powerful autonomous actors not by monitoring their reasoning but by requiring independently attested evidence at the point of consequential action. We formalise this institutional pattern as a computational governance model for AI agent systems. Under the proposed model, an agent retains full autonomy over planning and reasoning but holds no execution authority over designated high-risk actions. Execution is conditional on preconditions that are each independently attested by a separate authoritative source, cryptographically bound to a declared intent, and evaluated by a deterministic policy. Decisions are recorded in a tamper-evident log amenable to independent re-verification. We present a proof-of-concept implementation and illustrate the model with examples from software deployment and clinical prescribing.

摘要：自主 AI 代理可能開始執行有重大影響且不可逆的行動，例如臨床處方和生產軟體部署。本文觀察到，人類機構並不是通過監控其推理來管理強大的自主行為者，而是通過在有重大行動的時刻要求獨立證實的證據。我們將這種制度模式正式化為 AI 代理系統的計算治理模型。在所提出的模型下，代理在計劃和推理方面保持完全自主，但對指定的高風險行動沒有執行權限。執行條件取決於每個由獨立權威來源獨立證實的前提條件，這些前提條件以加密方式綁定於聲明的意圖，並由確定性政策進行評估。決策記錄在一個可防篡改的日誌中，便於獨立重新驗證。我們展示了一個概念驗證實現，並用軟體部署和臨床處方的例子來說明該模型。

docs.title: Knowledge-augmented Agentic AI for Mental Health Medication Information Seeking
docs.text:
2606.26205v1 by Huizi Yu, Jian Liu, Wenkong Wang, Lingyao Li, Jiayan Zhou, Zhaoqian Xue, Xiang Li, Xinxin Lin, Zhiying Liang, Zhuoru Wu, Siyuan Ma, Xin Ma, Lizhou Fan

Patients increasingly seek medication information online, yet safety knowledge for psychiatric drugs is split between regulatory adverse-event records, which are authoritative but abstract, and patient narratives, which are experience-near but unvalidated. Integrating them without conflating evidence and anecdote is especially consequential in psychiatry, where poorly contextualised information can amplify fear, nocebo responses, and non-adherence. Here we develop a provenance-aware, knowledge-graph-based multi-agent framework unifying 466,525 Reddit posts, 60,782 WebMD reviews, and twenty years of U.S. FDA Adverse Event Reporting System records for nine antidepressants. A large-language-model entity-recognition pipeline benchmarked against physician annotations reached highest F1 scores of 0.969 for medications and 0.973 for conditions. The two community platforms were far more concordant with each other (overlap up to a Jaccard similarity of 0.905) than with regulatory reports, indicating that patient-generated data form a partly independent safety signal. For sertraline, many adverse events appeared in community sources hundreds of days before the corresponding FDA date. A Neo4j knowledge graph grounded in ATC-N, ICD-10, and MedDRA vocabularies preserves provenance, keeping every claim traceable and regulatory facts distinct from patient experience. These results establish source-aware integration as a route to more auditable psychiatric medication information, with usefulness and patient benefit to be tested prospectively.

摘要：患者越來越多地在網上尋求藥物資訊，但精神科藥物的安全知識卻分為兩部分：一方面是權威但抽象的監管不良事件記錄，另一方面是接近經驗但未經驗證的患者敘述。在精神科中，將這兩者整合而不混淆證據與轶事尤其重要，因為缺乏情境的資訊可能會加劇恐懼、負面反應和不遵從治療。在這裡，我們開發了一個基於知識圖譜的多代理框架，整合了466,525條Reddit帖子、60,782條WebMD評論，以及美國FDA不良事件報告系統的二十年記錄，針對九種抗抑鬱藥物。一個基於大型語言模型的實體識別管道，與醫生標註進行基準測試，對藥物和病症的F1分數分別達到0.969和0.973。這兩個社區平台之間的相符程度遠高於與監管報告的相符程度（重疊達到0.905的Jaccard相似度），這表明患者生成的數據形成了部分獨立的安全信號。對於舍曲林，許多不良事件在社區來源中出現的時間早於相應的FDA日期數百天。一個基於ATC-N、ICD-10和MedDRA詞彙的Neo4j知識圖譜保留了來源，保持每個主張可追溯，並將監管事實與患者經驗區分開來。這些結果確立了源感知整合作為獲得更可審計的精神科藥物資訊的途徑，其實用性和患者利益將在前瞻性研究中進行測試。

docs.title: Pulmonary Embolism Risk Stratification from CTPA and Medical Records: Vascular Graphs Are Not All You Need
docs.text:
2606.25956v2 by Nathan Painchaud, Tristan Habémont, Morgane des Ligneris, Allan Serva, Pierre Croisille, Laurent Bertoletti, Thomas Lampert, Johannes F. Lutzeyer, Odyssée Merveille

Risk stratification for pulmonary embolism (PE) is critical for clinical decision-making. Stratification guidelines are based on patient medical records, parameters measured from computed tomography pulmonary angiography (CTPA), and blood tests. However, blood tests are often missing in routine practice. This work studies whether state-of-the-art models can accurately classify risk stratification from only medical records and biomarkers extracted from CTPA images. We benchmark different approaches to combine medical records and cardiac biomarkers with rich pulmonary vascular information; we add vascular biomarkers to tabular models and apply graph neural networks (GNNs) on the vascular tree's intrinsic graph representation. We use a private dataset (n=353) with uniquely complete data for PE risk stratification. Our results show that, among global features, medical records and cardiac biomarkers are the most significant predictors, while vascular biomarkers do not further improve stratification. Even more surprising, even GNNs on vascular graphs fail to outperform strong tabular baseline on global features. We consider hypotheses, on both models and data, that could explain this suboptimal performance. Our investigation suggests that, counter-intuitively, vascular graphs might hold no discriminative information for PE risk stratification. Code is available from https://github.com/creatis-myriad/GENESIS.

摘要：風險分層對於肺栓塞 (PE) 的臨床決策至關重要。分層指導方針基於患者的醫療記錄、從計算機斷層肺動脈造影 (CTPA) 測量的參數以及血液檢查。然而，常規實踐中血液檢查往往缺失。本研究探討最先進的模型是否能僅根據醫療記錄和從CTPA影像提取的生物標記準確分類風險分層。我們基準不同的方法來結合醫療記錄和心臟生物標記，並利用豐富的肺血管信息；我們將血管生物標記添加到表格模型中，並在血管樹的內在圖形表示上應用圖神經網絡 (GNN)。我們使用一個私有數據集 (n=353)，該數據集對於PE風險分層具有獨特的完整數據。我們的結果顯示，在全球特徵中，醫療記錄和心臟生物標記是最重要的預測因子，而血管生物標記並未進一步改善分層。更令人驚訝的是，即使在血管圖上的GNN也未能超越強大的表格基準在全球特徵上的表現。我們考慮了可能解釋這一次優化性能的假設，包括模型和數據。我們的調查表明，反直覺地，血管圖可能不包含對PE風險分層的區分信息。代碼可從 https://github.com/creatis-myriad/GENESIS 獲得。

docs.title: Enhancing Brain MRI Anomaly Detection and Reasoning with ROI Rethink and Synthetic Data
docs.text:
2606.25894v1 by Shangkun Li, Jie Xu, Yi Guo, Zeju Li, Yuanyuan Wang

Medical vision-language models typically generate diagnoses through single-pass inference without indicating which image regions support their conclusions. This lack of spatial grounding limits clinical utility: outputs cannot be audited, and models may hallucinate findings on normal scans. We present BrReMark (Brain Rethink via ROI Marking), a framework that introduces explicit region marking into brain MRI diagnosis. The model first generates hypotheses about potential abnormalities and grounds them through explicit bounding box marking, then verifies conclusions by re-examining the marked evidence. Training combines supervised fine-tuning on structured reasoning trajectories with reinforcement learning using a composite reward over localization accuracy and diagnostic reasoning. Furthermore, we integrate a domain randomization-based pathology synthesis augmentation strategy to improve the model's generalizability to out-of-distribution (OOD) data. On internal benchmark, BrReMark improves mAP50 from 0.74% to 37.54% compared to the base model, while achieving 21.57% Clinical F1 and 45.26% diagnostic accuracy. On NOVA OOD benchmark, it also achieves competitive overall performance with a 45.7% reduction in false positives compared to the state-of-the-art, indicating reduced hallucination on rare pathologies. These findings suggest that explicit hypothesis-verification grounding is a practical path toward trustworthy open-ended brain MRI diagnosis across both in-distribution and OOD settings.

摘要：醫療視覺語言模型通常通過單次推理生成診斷，而不指明哪些影像區域支持其結論。這種缺乏空間基礎的情況限制了臨床實用性：輸出無法被審核，模型可能在正常掃描中產生幻覺結果。我們提出了 BrReMark（透過 ROI 標記的腦部重新思考），這是一個將明確區域標記引入腦部 MRI 診斷的框架。該模型首先生成有關潛在異常的假設，並通過明確的邊界框標記將其基礎化，然後通過重新檢查標記的證據來驗證結論。訓練結合了對結構化推理軌跡的監督微調與使用複合獎勵的強化學習，該獎勵基於定位準確性和診斷推理。此外，我們整合了一種基於領域隨機化的病理合成增強策略，以提高模型對分佈外（OOD）數據的泛化能力。在內部基準測試中，BrReMark 將 mAP50 從 0.74% 提高到 37.54%，相比基礎模型，同時達到 21.57% 的臨床 F1 和 45.26% 的診斷準確率。在 NOVA OOD 基準測試中，它的整體表現也具有競爭力，與最先進技術相比，假陽性減少了 45.7%，顯示在罕見病理上減少了幻覺。這些發現表明，明確的假設驗證基礎化是一條實用的途徑，朝著在分佈內和 OOD 環境中可信的開放式腦部 MRI 診斷邁進。

docs.title: KG-TRACE: A Neuro-Symbolic Framework for Mechanistic Grounding in Antimicrobial Resistance Prediction
docs.text:
2606.26179v1 by Naman Garg, Sarika Jain, Sourav Yadav, Bharat K. Bhargava, Ghanapriya Singh, Abhishek Srivastava, Parimal Kar

While WGS-based AMR prediction has reached high accuracy, existing models lack a mechanism to ground neural attributions in established biological pathways. We present KG-TRACE, a novel neuro-symbolic framework that integrates the WHO mutation knowledge graph (KG) as a structured biological constraint on a neural genomic model. Unlike existing methods that learn statistical patterns in isolation, KG-TRACE fuses genomic features and RotatE-based KG embeddings through a learned epistemic trust gate, dynamically weighting neural evidence against symbolic biological knowledge. Evaluated on the CRyPTIC M. tuberculosis cohort, KG-TRACE achieves an AUROC of 0.9760 for isoniazid, achieving competitive accuracy while its primary value lies in symbolic grounding, not predictive uplift. More importantly, we introduce the Biological Grounding Ratio (BGR), a dataset-level metric that quantifies alignment between neural attributions and established biology. Our framework achieves a 92.5% symbolic coverage of isoniazid-resistant predictions and effectively identifies MDR co-occurrence artifacts by issuing laboratory follow-up flags for 'UNCERTAIN' cases. We demonstrate that neuro-symbolic grounding provides a verifiable audit trail for clinicians, bridging the gap between predictive accuracy and clinical trust.

摘要：雖然基於全基因組測序（WGS）的抗藥性預測已達到高準確度，但現有模型缺乏將神經歸因與既定生物途徑相結合的機制。我們提出了KG-TRACE，一個新穎的神經符號框架，將世界衛生組織（WHO）突變知識圖（KG）作為對神經基因組模型的結構性生物約束。與現有方法孤立學習統計模式不同，KG-TRACE通過學習的認知信任閘融合基因組特徵和基於RotatE的KG嵌入，動態加權神經證據與符號生物知識之間的關係。在CRyPTIC結核分枝桿菌（M. tuberculosis）隊列上進行評估，KG-TRACE對異煙肼的AUROC達到0.9760，實現了競爭性的準確性，而其主要價值在於符號基礎，而非預測提升。更重要的是，我們引入了生物基礎比率（BGR），這是一個數據集級別的指標，用於量化神經歸因與既定生物學之間的對齊。我們的框架對異煙肼抗藥性預測實現了92.5%的符號覆蓋率，並通過對“未確定”案例發出實驗室後續標記，有效識別多重耐藥共現伪影。我們展示了神經符號基礎提供了可驗證的審計軌跡，為臨床醫生搭建了預測準確性與臨床信任之間的橋樑。

docs.title: Expresso-AI: Explainable Video-Based Deep Learning Models for Depression Diagnosis
docs.text:
2606.25606v1 by Felipe Moreno, Sharifa Alghowinem, Hae Won Park, Cynthia Breazeal

Given the widespread prevalence of depression and its consequential impact on individuals and society, it is crucial to obtain objective measures for early diagnosis and intervention. As a multidisciplinary topic, these objective measures should be interpretable and accessible to health care professionals, ensuring effective collaboration and treatment planning in the realm of mental health care. Even though current automated depression diagnosis approaches improved over the last decade, a critical gap exists as they often lack affect-specificity and interpretability, limiting their practical application and potential impact on mental health care. In particular, interpretability from temporal activities from videos when deep models are used is not fully explored. In this study, we present a novel framework for analyzing Deep Neural Networks' decisions when trained on facial videos, specifically focusing on automatic depression severity diagnosis. By fine-tuning Deep Convolutional Neural Networks (DCNN) pre-trained on Action Recognition datasets on depression severity facial videos from AVEC depression dataset, our framework is able to interpret the model's saliency maps by examining face regions and temporal expression semantics. Our approach generates both visual and quantitative explanations for the model's decisions, providing greater insight into its reasoning. In addition to this interpretability, our video-based modeling has improved upon previous single-face benchmarks for visual depression diagnosis, resulting in enhanced predictive performance. Overall, our work demonstrates the successful development of a framework capable of generating hypotheses from a facial model's decisions while simultaneously improving depression's predictive capabilities.

摘要：考慮到憂鬱症的廣泛流行及其對個人和社會的影響，獲得客觀的早期診斷和干預措施至關重要。作為一個多學科的主題，這些客觀措施應該能夠被醫療專業人員解釋和訪問，以確保在心理健康護理領域的有效合作和治療計劃。儘管目前自動化的憂鬱症診斷方法在過去十年有所改善，但仍存在一個關鍵的缺口，因為它們往往缺乏情感特異性和可解釋性，限制了其實際應用和對心理健康護理的潛在影響。特別是，使用深度模型時，來自視頻的時間活動的可解釋性尚未得到充分探索。在本研究中，我們提出了一個新穎的框架，用於分析深度神經網絡在面部視頻上訓練時的決策，特別專注於自動憂鬱症嚴重程度診斷。通過對在行為識別數據集上預訓練的深度卷積神經網絡（DCNN）進行微調，並應用於來自 AVEC 憂鬱症數據集的憂鬱症嚴重程度面部視頻，我們的框架能夠通過檢查面部區域和時間表情語義來解釋模型的顯著性圖。我們的方法為模型的決策生成了視覺和定量的解釋，提供了對其推理的更深入見解。除了這種可解釋性，我們基於視頻的建模在視覺憂鬱症診斷方面改進了以前的單面基準，從而提高了預測性能。總體而言，我們的工作展示了一個成功開發的框架，能夠從面部模型的決策中生成假設，同時提高了憂鬱症的預測能力。

docs.title: Interpretable Concept-Guided Polynomial Tabular Kolmogorov-Arnold Network for EEG-Based Mild Cognitive Impairment Detection
docs.text:
2606.25434v1 by Yosef Bernardus Wirian, Qiang Cheng

Early and scalable detection of mild cognitive impairment (MCI) remains an unresolved clinical challenge. Existing EEG-based screening approaches are constrained by handcrafted feature pipelines that discard neurophysiologically meaningful domain structure and deep learning classifiers that sacrifice interpretability for performance. No existing work unifies physiologically organized concept encoders, cross-concept interaction modeling, and nonlinear tabular classification in a sleep EEG-based MCI detection framework. This study proposes Concept-guided Polynomial-transformed Tabular learning using Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (CPTabKAN), which maps heterogeneous EEG-derived features into domain-informed concept representations, expands them via degree-2 polynomial transformation to expose first- and second-order interactions, and applies a Fourier-parameterized TabKAN classifier to learn nonlinear decision boundaries. CPTabKAN was evaluated on the Study of Osteoporotic Fractures cohort (372 subjects, overnight polysomnography), using 1,379 features organized into ten physiologically motivated concept groups. Under 10-fold cross-validation, CPTabKAN-Second Order achieved a weighted F1-score of 0.9038 (SD 0.034), outperforming GradientBoosting by 5.65 percentage points (t(9)=1.934,p=0.043, one-sided paired test), with advantages persisting under SMOTE-based balancing. Ablation analysis confirmed independent contributions from each component. Concept importance analysis revealed that power spectral density, multi-scale entropy, and Hjorth parameters dominated first-order weights, while cross-concept interactions involving Lempel-Ziv-Welch complexity, statistics, demographics, and slow oscillations exceeded all first-order scores. These results demonstrate that concept-structured, interaction-aware tabular learning surfaces physiologically coherent reasoning, supporting clinical trust.

摘要：早期且可擴展的輕度認知障礙（MCI）檢測仍然是一個未解決的臨床挑戰。現有的基於腦電圖（EEG）的篩查方法受到手工特徵管道的限制，這些管道忽略了神經生理學上有意義的領域結構，以及深度學習分類器在性能上犧牲可解釋性。現有的研究沒有將生理組織的概念編碼器、跨概念互動建模和非線性表格分類統一到基於睡眠EEG的MCI檢測框架中。本研究提出了使用Kolmogorov-Arnold網絡的概念引導多項式變換表格學習（CPTabKAN），該方法將異質的EEG衍生特徵映射到領域知情的概念表示中，通過二次多項式變換擴展它們以揭示一級和二級互動，並應用傅里葉參數化的TabKAN分類器來學習非線性決策邊界。CPTabKAN在骨質疏鬆性骨折研究隊列（372名受試者，過夜多導睡眠檢查）上進行了評估，使用了1,379個特徵，這些特徵組織成十個生理驅動的概念組。在10倍交叉驗證下，CPTabKAN-二級達到了0.9038的加權F1分數（標準差0.034），比GradientBoosting高出5.65個百分點（t(9)=1.934,p=0.043，單側配對檢驗），在基於SMOTE的平衡下仍然保持優勢。消融分析確認了每個組件的獨立貢獻。概念重要性分析顯示，功率譜密度、多尺度熵和Hjorth參數主導了一級權重，而涉及Lempel-Ziv-Welch複雜性、統計數據、人口統計學和慢振盪的跨概念互動超過了所有一級分數。這些結果表明，結構化的概念、互動感知的表格學習展現了生理上連貫的推理，支持臨床信任。

docs.title: BrainAgent: A Large Language Model-Driven Multi-Agent Framework for Autonomous Brain Signal Understanding
docs.text:
2606.25400v1 by Yangxuan Zhou, Sha Zhao, Jiquan Wang, Shijian Li, Gang Pan

Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCIs) and brain signal understanding are pivotal for clinical health and next-generation interactions. Despite this significance, its widespread adoption in real-world scenarios remains restricted, primarily because current analytical paradigms lack sufficient agentic intelligence. First, existing methodologies impose prohibitive technical barriers, requiring extensive specialized expertise. Second, they remain inherently static and task-specific, failing to execute the complex, long-horizon workflows essential for real-world deployment. To accelerate the democratization of brain signal understanding, we draw inspiration from Large Language Models (LLMs) to introduce BrainAgent, an LLM-driven multi-agent framework designed to ground abstract natural language intent into rigorous, executable, and end-to-end processing pipelines. BrainAgent employs a hierarchical architecture where a central supervisor orchestrates specialized sub-agents for adaptive task decomposition and execution. Furthermore, we establish a comprehensive, systematic benchmark for evaluating agentic systems in brain signal analysis. Empirical results demonstrate that BrainAgent effectively automates complex workflows with superior reliability, marking a paradigm shift toward democratized brain signal understanding.

摘要：腦-電腦介面（BCIs）和腦信號理解對於臨床健康和下一代互動至關重要。儘管這一重要性，實際場景中的廣泛採用仍然受到限制，主要是因為當前的分析範式缺乏足夠的代理智能。首先，現有的方法論施加了禁止性的技術障礙，需要廣泛的專業知識。其次，它們本質上是靜態的和特定任務的，無法執行對於實際部署至關重要的複雜長期工作流程。為了加速腦信號理解的民主化，我們受到大型語言模型（LLMs）的啟發，推出了BrainAgent，一個基於LLM的多代理框架，旨在將抽象的自然語言意圖轉化為嚴謹、可執行的端到端處理管道。BrainAgent採用層次架構，其中中央監督者協調專門的子代理進行自適應任務分解和執行。此外，我們建立了一個全面的系統基準，用於評估腦信號分析中的代理系統。實證結果表明，BrainAgent能有效自動化複雜工作流程，並具有更高的可靠性，標誌著向民主化腦信號理解的範式轉變。

docs.title: Anatomically-conditioned Latent Diffusion Model for Data-Efficient Few-Shot Cross-Domain 3D Glioma MRI Synthesis
docs.text:
2606.25390v1 by Salman Shaik, Truong Thanh Hung Nguyen, Hung Cao

Accurate classification of diffuse gliomas is often hindered by domain shifts across centers and a lack of large, annotated datasets. We propose the Anatomically-conditioned Latent Diffusion Model (ALDM), a novel framework for data-efficient, few-shot 3D volumetric MRI synthesis. ALDM utilizes a two-stage approach: a 3D variational autoencoder learns anatomical priors from a data-rich source domain, while a conditional latent diffusion model, guided by tumor masks via a ControlNet, generates structurally coherent volumes for a data-scarce target domain. Evaluated in an extreme few-shot setting with only 16 target images, ALDM outperformed GAN and hybrid baselines, achieving a superior Frechet Inception Distance (FID) of 85.40 and a downstream classification AUC of 0.987. Qualitative results confirm that the model preserves sharp pathology boundaries and cross-modal consistency, with visual fidelity improving progressively during training. By capturing essential diagnostic features, ALDM provides a robust tool for clinical data augmentation in low-resource settings. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/Analytics-Everywhere-Lab/anatomically-conditioned-LDM.

摘要：準確分類擴散性膠質瘤常常受到中心之間領域轉變和缺乏大型標註數據集的阻礙。我們提出了「解剖條件潛在擴散模型」（ALDM），這是一種新穎的框架，用於數據高效、少量樣本的3D體積MRI合成。ALDM採用兩階段的方法：3D變分自編碼器從數據豐富的源域學習解剖先驗，而由腫瘤掩碼指導的條件潛在擴散模型，通過ControlNet生成結構上連貫的體積，適用於數據稀缺的目標域。在只有16張目標圖像的極端少量樣本設置中，ALDM的表現超過了GAN和混合基準，獲得了優越的Frechet Inception Distance (FID) 85.40和下游分類AUC 0.987。定性結果確認該模型能夠保持清晰的病理邊界和跨模態一致性，視覺真實感在訓練過程中逐步改善。通過捕捉重要的診斷特徵，ALDM為低資源環境中的臨床數據增強提供了一個穩健的工具。我們的實現可以在https://github.com/Analytics-Everywhere-Lab/anatomically-conditioned-LDM上獲得。

docs.title: Beyond Visual Forensics: Auditing Multimodal Robustness for Synthetic Medical Image Detection
docs.text:
2606.25375v1 by Ching-Hao Chiu, Hao-Wei Chung, Gelei Xu, Xueyang Li, Pin-Yu Chen, John Kheir, Meysam Ghaffari, Carlos Morato, Ahmed Abbasi, Yiyu Shi

With the rapid adoption of generative AI, synthetic medical images pose growing risks, including diagnostic deception and insurance fraud. Although prior work has explored vision-language model (VLM)-based synthetic image detection, these evaluations typically consider images in isolation. In clinical practice, however, images are interpreted alongside structured records and metadata, and VLMs are increasingly deployed under joint image-record inputs. We uncover a previously underexamined multimodal vulnerability: when given both modalities, VLMs may overweight record context in authenticity judgments, such that the same image receives different predictions solely due to changes in its accompanying text. This raises concerns about robustness in real-world deployment. To systematically characterize this effect, we reformulate synthetic medical image detection as an audit of multimodal robustness at the image-record interface and introduce a paired benchmark that holds the image fixed while swapping controlled metadata variants. Across multiple imaging modalities, we evaluate diverse open-weight and frontier API VLMs and quantify how metadata alone shifts authenticity predictions. Our benchmark provides a standardized tool for assessing and improving multimodal robustness beyond image-only settings. The code is available at https://github.com/chiuhaohao/Beyond-Visual-Forensics.

摘要：隨著生成式人工智慧的快速採用，合成醫學影像帶來了日益增長的風險，包括診斷欺騙和保險詐欺。雖然先前的研究探討了基於視覺-語言模型（VLM）的合成影像檢測，但這些評估通常是將影像孤立地考量。然而，在臨床實踐中，影像是與結構化記錄和元數據一起解釋的，且 VLM 正在越來越多地在聯合影像-記錄輸入下部署。我們揭示了一種先前未被充分檢視的多模態脆弱性：當同時提供這兩種模態時，VLM 可能在真實性判斷中過度重視記錄的上下文，以至於同一影像僅因其伴隨文本的變化而獲得不同的預測。這引發了對於實際部署中穩健性的擔憂。為了系統性地描述這一效應，我們將合成醫學影像檢測重新定義為影像-記錄介面的多模態穩健性審核，並引入一個配對基準，該基準在固定影像的同時更換受控的元數據變體。在多種影像模態下，我們評估了多樣的開放權重和前沿 API VLM，並量化了僅元數據如何改變真實性預測。我們的基準提供了一個標準化工具，用於評估和改善超越僅影像設定的多模態穩健性。代碼可在 https://github.com/chiuhaohao/Beyond-Visual-Forensics 獲得。

docs.title: Phoneme-Level Mispronunciation Screening in Polish-Speaking Children with an Explainable Assistant
docs.text:
2606.25181v1 by Milosz Dudek, Daria Hemmerling, Kamil Kwarciak, Maciej Stroinski, Maria Pensko, Mateusz Kowalewski, Leonid Pavlovskyi, Sebastian Jurczak, Anna-Mariia Vitkovska, Zuzanna Miodonska, Natalia Mocko, Michal Krecichwost

Early identification of speech sound errors in children is often limited by access to specialists, motivating lightweight screening tools that can operate outside the clinic. We present a screening pipeline for Polish-speaking children focused on sibilant substitutions, coupling a wav2vec2-based CTC token recognizer with alignment-based error typing and a template-grounded caregiver assistant for screening, not diagnosis. On a held-out test set of 10 unseen children comprising 559 utterances, the recognizer achieves 88.7 percent exact sequence match. As a conservative screening proxy, we flag a mismatch when the system emits substitution-evidence bracketed tokens at the target segment, yielding 72.9 percent precision, 61.4 percent recall, F1 = 0.67, and a 2.7 percent false-alarm rate on target-correct items. We describe the assistant's safety boundaries and outline a clinician-in-the-loop validation plan for future deployment.

摘要：早期識別兒童語音錯誤常常受到專家可及性的限制，這促使了可以在診所外運作的輕量篩檢工具的需求。我們提出了一個針對說波蘭語兒童的篩檢流程，專注於齒擦音的替代，將基於wav2vec2的CTC標記識別器與基於對齊的錯誤類型和模板基礎的照顧者助手結合，用於篩檢，而非診斷。在一組包含559個發音的10名未見兒童的保留測試集中，該識別器達到了88.7%的精確序列匹配。作為保守的篩檢代理，當系統在目標片段發出替代證據括號標記時，我們標記為不匹配，產生72.9%的精確度、61.4%的召回率、F1 = 0.67，以及在目標正確項目上2.7%的誤報率。我們描述了助手的安全邊界，並概述了未來部署的臨床醫生參與驗證計劃。

docs.title: Reducing Redundancy in Whole-Slide Image Patching for Scalable Indexing and Retrieval
docs.text:
2606.26157v1 by Jialiang Geng, Ghazal Alabtah, Saghir Alfasly, Wataru Uegami, H. R. Tizhoosh

The rapid growth of digital pathology has created an urgent need for efficient indexing and retrieval of whole slide images (WSIs). This need is intensified by emerging generative AI workflows, particularly retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), which require dependable similarity search to support high-stakes clinical decision-making. Yet the substantial cost of high-performance storage limits the scalability and accessibility of WSI indexing for many healthcare institutions. Consequently, methods that can reduce storage demands while preserving retrieval accuracy have become a critical research priority. We propose ARReST (Antithetical Redundancy Reduction Strategy), a principled oppositional framework that leverages redundancy across dissimilar tissue classes to markedly decrease the number of patches that must be indexed from each WSI. Instead of eliminating only within-class duplicates, ARReST identifies antithetical patches-those whose representations contribute minimally to cross-class discrimination-and prunes them from the searchable archive. This targeted reduction substantially compresses the index without sacrificing morphological diversity or retrieval fidelity. By minimizing superfluous patch representations, ARReST reduces storage footprint, lowers computational overhead, and accelerates similarity search across large pathology repositories. Extensive experiments on TCGA repository (The Cancer Genome Atlas with 21 organs) demonstrate that ARReST achieves significant index compression while maintaining competitive retrieval performance. The observed storage savings of 3% to 60% (14%$\pm$13%) can be reliably achieved without compromising retrieval performance for many organs.
