Privacy and security concerns are associated with the most negative experiences. By framing AI healthcare chatbots as information infrastructures, our findings highlight how failures in access, usability, and trust affect users, offering actionable insights for designers, policymakers, and information professionals aiming to improve digital health systems.

摘要：AI 醫療聊天機器人越來越多地被用來支持健康信息的尋求和自我管理，但它們的性能和對用戶的影響仍需進一步研究。這項研究分析了來自 59 款 AI 醫療聊天機器人應用的超過 15,000 條用戶評論，以探索這些系統在日常信息和情感背景下的運作方式。主題建模和詮釋性分析識別出三個反覆出現的問題：訪問障礙和服務不可靠性、用戶體驗和互動質量，以及計費和客戶支持問題。隱私和安全問題與最負面的體驗相關聯。通過將 AI 醫療聊天機器人框架視為信息基礎設施，我們的研究結果突顯了訪問性、可用性和信任的失敗如何影響用戶，為設計師、政策制定者和信息專業人士提供了可行的見解，以改善數字健康系統。

docs.title: How to evaluate clustering with ground truth?
docs.text:
2606.27061v1 by Pasi Fränti

External indexes can be used for cluster evaluation when ground truth is available. We review the most common external validity indexes focusing on set-matching-based measures. We recommend centroid index (CI), because it is an intuitive cluster-level measure with an explainable result. If we need a more fine-tuned, point-level measure, there are more choices. Pair-set index (PSI) provides a normalized score which is not biased by cluster sizes. If all points should matter equally, then clustering accuracy (ACC) or any other set-matching measure is suitable.

摘要：外部指標可以在有真實標準的情況下用於叢集評估。我們回顧了最常見的外部有效性指標，重點關注基於集合匹配的度量。我們推薦重心指數（CI），因為它是一個直觀的叢集級別度量，並且結果易於解釋。如果我們需要更精細的點級度量，則有更多選擇。配對集合指數（PSI）提供了一個標準化的分數，不受叢集大小的偏見。如果所有點都應該同等重要，那麼叢集準確性（ACC）或任何其他集合匹配度量都是合適的。

docs.title: Adaptive Utility driven Resource Orchestration for Resilient AI (AURORA-AI)
docs.text:
2606.27005v1 by Rahul Umesh Mhapsekar, Ilias Cherkaoui, Lizy Abraham, Indrakshi Dey

Modern AI systems are increasingly deployed under non-stationary computational, demographic, and operational conditions in which static resource allocation strategies degrade both predictive performance and human-centric properties such as fairness and explainability. This paper presents AURORA-AI, an Adaptive Utility-driven Resource Orchestration framework for Resilient AI that unifies Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman feedback control, Lyapunov-based stability monitoring, and a fairness-aware composite utility into a single closed-loop policy.The framework continuously redistributes computational budget across a population of heterogeneous AI models so that the global utility, defined jointly over predictive performance, demographic parity, cost, latency, robustness, and interpretability, remains maximised under disruption. The framework is evaluated in a stress-rich discrete-time simulation that concurrently injects demographic bias shocks, gradual concept drift, and abrupt black-swan disruptions, and is compared against five established controllers including Static, Round Robin, Greedy, LinUCB, and a deep reinforcement-learning agent based on Proximal Policy Optimisation. AURORA-AI achieves immediate recovery from the black-swan event compared to eighty-eight time steps for the Static baseline and twenty-two for Proximal Policy Optimisation, lifts the alpha-quantile and the super-quantile by twenty-nine and twenty-five percent respectively, simultaneously reduces the mean and maximum demographic parity gap, and increases the fraction of Lyapunov-stable operating steps. These results indicate that fairness-aware adaptive orchestration grounded in stability theory is a practical and theoretically motivated path toward resilient human-centric AI deployment.

摘要：現代的人工智慧系統越來越多地在非靜態的計算、人口統計和操作條件下部署，在這些條件下，靜態資源分配策略會降低預測性能以及以人為中心的特性，如公平性和可解釋性。本文提出了AURORA-AI，一個以適應性效用驅動的資源編排框架，用於韌性AI，該框架將Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman反饋控制、基於Lyapunov的穩定性監測和公平性意識的綜合效用統一為一個閉環策略。該框架持續在一群異質AI模型中重新分配計算預算，以便在中斷情況下，定義在預測性能、人口統計平等、成本、延遲、穩健性和可解釋性上的全球效用保持最大化。該框架在一個壓力豐富的離散時間模擬中進行評估，該模擬同時注入人口統計偏見衝擊、逐漸的概念漂移和突發的黑天鵝中斷，並與五個已建立的控制器進行比較，包括靜態、輪詢、貪婪、LinUCB，以及基於近端策略優化的深度強化學習代理。與靜態基準的八十八個時間步和近端策略優化的二十二個時間步相比，AURORA-AI實現了對黑天鵝事件的立即恢復，分別提升了alpha分位數和超分位數二十九和二十五個百分點，同時減少了平均和最大的人口統計平等差距，並增加了Lyapunov穩定操作步驟的比例。這些結果表明，基於穩定性理論的公平性意識適應性編排是一條實用且理論上有動機的道路，朝向韌性的人為中心AI部署。

docs.title: Auditing Framing-Sensitive Behavioral Instability in Large Language Models for Mental Health Interactions
docs.text:
2606.26982v1 by Abla Bedoui, Ashley L. Greene, Mohammed Cherkaoui

Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly being integrated into mental health support tools and other psychologically sensitive conversational applications. In such settings, behavioral stability and consistency are important for trustworthy human-AI interaction. However, semantically similar concerns can be presented through different contextual framings, potentially eliciting different model responses. Such framing-sensitive variability may challenge user expectations regarding system behavior and complicate the assessment of AI reliability. While prior studies have primarily examined such effects at the behavioral level, less is known about how framing-related variation is reflected in the internal representations of aligned language models. In this work, we investigate these effects using controlled matched prompts spanning multiple contextual framing conditions across several instruction-tuned model families. Across architectures, framing systematically alters interpretive response tendencies. Layer-wise probing analyses show that behavior-associated information remains decodable throughout transformer depth, with architecture-dependent variation in decoding strength. Moreover, held-out framing probes remained consistently above chance across architectures despite strong lexical baselines. Activation steering experiments further suggest that framing-associated representational directions can partially modulate downstream behavioral outcomes. Finally, these findings indicate that robustness to contextual variation may represent an important consideration when evaluating the consistency and trustworthiness of conversational AI systems deployed in mental-health-oriented interactions.

摘要：大型語言模型（LLMs）正逐漸被整合進心理健康支持工具和其他心理敏感的對話應用中。在這些環境中，行為穩定性和一致性對於值得信賴的人類與人工智慧互動至關重要。然而，語義上相似的問題可以通過不同的上下文框架呈現，可能引發不同的模型反應。這種對框架敏感的變異性可能會挑戰用戶對系統行為的期望，並使評估人工智慧的可靠性變得複雜。雖然先前的研究主要在行為層面上考察了這些效應，但對於框架相關變異如何反映在對齊語言模型的內部表徵中，了解的卻較少。在這項工作中，我們使用控制的匹配提示，研究跨多個上下文框架條件的多個指令調整模型家族中的這些效應。在各種架構中，框架系統性地改變了解釋性反應的傾向。逐層探測分析顯示，與行為相關的信息在Transformer的深度中始終可解碼，且解碼強度存在架構依賴的變化。此外，保留的框架探測在各架構中始終高於隨機機率，儘管存在強大的詞彙基線。激活引導實驗進一步表明，與框架相關的表徵方向可以部分調節下游的行為結果。最後，這些發現表明，對上下文變異的穩健性可能在評估部署於心理健康導向互動中的對話人工智慧系統的一致性和可信度時，代表著一個重要的考量。

docs.title: A Pipeline for Generating Longitudinal Synthetic Clinical Notes Using Large Language Models
docs.text:
2606.26879v2 by William Poulett, Alice Waterhouse, Ben Wallace, Scarlett Kynoch, Amaia Imaz Blanco, Michael Spence, Jonathan Pearson

Synthetic data is increasingly used to enable the development and evaluation of AI systems in domains where access to real-world data is restricted. In healthcare, clinical documentation presents particular challenges due to its sensitivity. This work introduces a synthetic clinical notes pipeline and dataset designed to support the development of clinical AI tools while avoiding the privacy risks associated with real patient data. The dataset is generated using a modular pipeline that combines structured patient generation, semi-structured patient journey simulation, and unstructured clinical note generation using large language models. The pipeline is designed to prioritise internal consistency across longitudinal patient records, while also capturing variation in writing style, note structure, and clinical detail. Additional mechanisms, including LLM-based validation and augmentation steps, are used to improve faithfulness, realism, and diversity of the generated notes. We release a dataset of 70 synthetic patients, each associated with 20-50 clinical notes spanning a full hospital journey. The dataset is provided at multiple levels of validation, enabling users to balance realism and scalability depending on their use case. This dataset supports the development, testing, and evaluation of clinical AI systems, including summarisation tools, coding models, and decision support systems, without reliance on real patient data.

摘要：合成數據越來越多地被用來促進在現實世界數據獲取受限的領域中開發和評估人工智慧系統。在醫療保健領域，臨床文檔因其敏感性而面臨特定挑戰。本研究介紹了一個合成臨床筆記管道和數據集，旨在支持臨床人工智慧工具的開發，同時避免與真實患者數據相關的隱私風險。該數據集是通過一個模組化管道生成的，該管道結合了結構化患者生成、半結構化患者旅程模擬和使用大型語言模型的非結構化臨床筆記生成。該管道旨在優先考慮縱向患者記錄之間的內部一致性，同時捕捉寫作風格、筆記結構和臨床細節的變化。還使用了包括基於LLM的驗證和增強步驟在內的附加機制，以提高生成筆記的真實性、現實性和多樣性。我們發布了一個包含70名合成患者的數據集，每名患者都與20-50份涵蓋完整醫院旅程的臨床筆記相關聯。該數據集提供了多個驗證級別，使得用戶可以根據其使用案例平衡現實性和可擴展性。這個數據集支持臨床人工智慧系統的開發、測試和評估，包括摘要工具、編碼模型和決策支持系統，而無需依賴真實患者數據。

docs.title: Fortress and Gatekeeper: Theorizing Transitive Trust in Third-Party Cybersecurity Risk Governance
docs.text:
2606.26866v1 by Yijun Chen, Misita Anwar

Third-party vendors, such as analytics platforms, cloud services, identity providers, and software suppliers, are increasingly embedded in digital service delivery. While these arrangements enable scale and specialization, they also move customer data and security-relevant practices into environments that customers rarely see, select, or evaluate. This paper examines this problem through a document analysis of the November 2025 OpenAI-Mixpanel security incident. The incident serves as an illustrative case for showing how a security event in a vendor environment can become a governance and accountability problem for the focal organization that maintains the customer relationship. Drawing on organizational trust research and agency theory, the paper argues that third-party cybersecurity risk is both a trust relationship and a delegation problem. Customers trust the visible service provider, while the provider relies on vendors whose security practices are only partially visible and controllable. The paper develops the concept of transitive trust, where customer trust in a digital service depends on the security practices of vendors authorized by that service provider. It then presents the Fortress and Gatekeeper framework, which explains cybersecurity governance boundaries through trust and data flows rather than formal organizational ownership alone. The analysis develops four propositions concerning vendor integration, metadata exposure, vendor assurance, and data proliferation. The paper contributes to cybersecurity governance scholarship by explaining how delegated data processing creates customer-facing accountability and by identifying implications for vendor tiering, data classification, contractual design, continuous assurance, and data minimization.

摘要：第三方供應商，如分析平台、雲端服務、身份提供者和軟體供應商，正日益融入數位服務的交付中。雖然這些安排使得規模和專業化成為可能，但它們也將客戶數據和與安全相關的實踐移入客戶鮮少見到、選擇或評估的環境中。本文通過對2025年11月OpenAI-Mixpanel安全事件的文件分析來探討這一問題。該事件作為一個示範案例，顯示了供應商環境中的安全事件如何成為維護客戶關係的核心組織的治理和問責問題。本文借鑒組織信任研究和代理理論，認為第三方網絡安全風險既是信任關係，也是委託問題。客戶信任可見的服務提供者，而該提供者則依賴於那些安全實踐僅部分可見和可控的供應商。本文發展了傳遞信任的概念，即客戶對數位服務的信任依賴於該服務提供者授權的供應商的安全實踐。接著，本文提出了堡壘與守門人框架，通過信任和數據流而非僅僅依賴正式的組織所有權來解釋網絡安全治理邊界。分析發展了四個關於供應商整合、元數據暴露、供應商保證和數據擴散的命題。本文通過解釋委託數據處理如何創造面向客戶的問責，並識別供應商分層、數據分類、合同設計、持續保證和數據最小化的含義，為網絡安全治理的學術研究做出了貢獻。

docs.title: KARLA: Knowledge-base Augmented Retrieval for Language Models
docs.text:
2606.26807v1 by Francois Crespin, Fabian M. Suchanek, Nils Holzenberger

We propose a new method that allows an LLM to automatically pull in factual knowledge from a knowledge base during token generation. This means that (1)~factual knowledge in the LLM output can be updated without retraining the LLM, (2)~facts in the LLM output can be traced to the knowledge base for transparency and explainability, and (3)~smaller models can achieve the same factual accuracy as larger models. Our core idea is to train the model to produce special tokens that trigger a query to the knowledge base. Our experiments show that our method improves factual grounding in both short and long-form generation, and allows factual revisions to take effect through KB edits rather than parameter updates.

摘要：我們提出了一種新方法，允許大型語言模型在生成標記的過程中自動從知識庫中提取事實知識。這意味著 (1)~大型語言模型輸出的事實知識可以在不重新訓練模型的情況下進行更新，(2)~大型語言模型輸出的事實可以追溯到知識庫，以實現透明性和可解釋性，以及 (3)~較小的模型可以達到與較大模型相同的事實準確性。我們的核心思想是訓練模型生成特殊標記，以觸發對知識庫的查詢。我們的實驗表明，我們的方法在短文和長文生成中都改善了事實基礎，並且允許通過知識庫編輯而非參數更新來實現事實修訂。

docs.title: Robust Onion: Peeling Open Vocab Object Detectors Under Noise
docs.text:
2606.26734v2 by Priyank Pathak, Mukilan Karuppasamy, Aaditya Baranwal, Shruti Vyas, Yogesh S Rawat

The impact of real-world noise on Open Vocabulary Object Detectors (OV-ODs) remains poorly understood due to their architectural complexity. We present our comprehensive analysis Robust Onion, an empirical study that uses controlled synthetic visual degradations to peel OV-ODs layer-by-layer, revealing how, why, and where robustness degrades, systematically analyzing feature collapse. Our findings reveal that models with similar vision backbones exhibit comparable robustness, driven by similar feature collapse at similar layers, while factors such as pretraining strategy, architectural nuances, and caption supervision contribute little. Robustness is primarily governed by the image domain rather than annotations, explaining the similar robustness impact on COCO and LVIS, and why datasets like ODinW-13 can give an impression of inflated robustness due to large, isolated objects. Finally, we validate our insights by improving robustness on real-world BDD100K, WiderFace, and VisDRONE via our lightweight plug-and-play NN & TK0 approach, using 96x fewer trainable parameters than end-to-end training. We also explain the prior works' robustness observations.

摘要：現實世界噪音對開放詞彙物體檢測器（OV-ODs）的影響仍然不甚了解，這是由於其架構的複雜性。我們提出了我們的綜合分析 Robust Onion，這是一項實證研究，使用受控的合成視覺退化逐層剝離 OV-ODs，揭示了穩健性如何、為何以及在何處退化，並系統地分析特徵崩潰。我們的研究結果顯示，具有相似視覺骨幹的模型表現出可比較的穩健性，這是由於相似層次的特徵崩潰所驅動，而預訓練策略、架構細微差異和標註監督等因素貢獻不大。穩健性主要受圖像領域的支配，而非標註，這解釋了 COCO 和 LVIS 上相似的穩健性影響，以及為何像 ODinW-13 這樣的數據集可能給人一種膨脹穩健性的印象，因為它們包含大型孤立物體。最後，我們通過我們的輕量級即插即用 NN & TK0 方法，在真實世界的 BDD100K、WiderFace 和 VisDRONE 上提高了穩健性，使用的可訓練參數比端到端訓練少 96 倍。我們還解釋了先前工作的穩健性觀察結果。

docs.title: Explainable Ensemble-Based Machine Learning Models for Detecting the Presence of Cirrhosis in Hepatitis C Patients
docs.text:
2606.26561v1 by Abrar Alotaibi, Lujain Alnajrani, Nawal Alsheikh, Alhatoon Alanazy, Salam Alshammasi, Meshael Almusairii, Shoog Alrassan, Aisha Alansari

Hepatitis C is a liver infection caused by a virus, which results in mild to severe inflammation of the liver. Over many years, hepatitis C gradually damages the liver, often leading to permanent scarring, known as cirrhosis. Patients sometimes have moderate or no symptoms of liver illness for decades before developing cirrhosis. Cirrhosis typically worsens to the point of liver failure. Patients with cirrhosis may also experience brain and nerve system damage, as well as gastrointestinal hemorrhage. Treatment for cirrhosis focuses on preventing further progression of the disease. Detecting cirrhosis earlier is therefore crucial for avoiding complications. Machine learning (ML) has been shown to be effective at providing precise and accurate information for use in diagnosing several diseases. Despite this, no studies have so far used ML to detect cirrhosis in patients with hepatitis C. This study obtained a dataset consisting of 28 attributes of 2038 Egyptian patients from the ML Repository of the University of California at Irvine. Four ML algorithms were trained on the dataset to diagnose cirrhosis in hepatitis C patients: a Random Forest, a Gradient Boosting Machine, an Extreme Gradient Boosting, and an Extra Trees model. The Extra Trees model outperformed the other models achieving an accuracy of 96.92%, a recall of 94.00%, a precision of 99.81%, and an area under the receiver operating characteristic curve of 96% using only 16 of the 28 features.

摘要：肝炎 C 是由病毒引起的肝臟感染，會導致肝臟輕度至重度的炎症。多年來，肝炎 C 逐漸損害肝臟，通常導致永久性疤痕，稱為肝硬化。患者有時在發展為肝硬化之前，會在數十年內出現中度或無肝病症狀。肝硬化通常會惡化到肝功能衰竭的地步。肝硬化患者也可能經歷大腦和神經系統損傷，以及腸胃出血。肝硬化的治療重點在於防止疾病進一步惡化。因此，及早檢測肝硬化對於避免併發症至關重要。機器學習 (ML) 已被證明在提供準確和精確的信息以用於診斷幾種疾病方面是有效的。儘管如此，迄今為止尚未有研究使用 ML 來檢測肝炎 C 患者的肝硬化。本研究獲得了一個數據集，該數據集包含來自加州大學爾灣分校的 ML 資源庫中 2038 名埃及患者的 28 個屬性。四種 ML 算法在該數據集上進行訓練，以診斷肝炎 C 患者的肝硬化：隨機森林、梯度提升機、極端梯度提升和額外樹模型。額外樹模型的表現優於其他模型，達到 96.92% 的準確率、94.00% 的召回率、99.81% 的精確率，以及僅使用 28 個特徵中的 16 個時，接收者操作特徵曲線下面積為 96%。

docs.title: NeuraDock Visual Cognitive Load Agent Tutorial: A Quality-Gated Open-Source EEG Workflow for Alpha Dynamics and Real-Time Applications
docs.text:
2606.26518v1 by Zhiyuan Xu, Yueqing Dai, Junling Li, Junwen Luo

This tutorial paper provides a step-by-step, reproducible walkthrough of NeuraDock Agent, an open-source EEG agent focused on Alpha dynamics and visual cognitive-load analysis. The goal is practical: a reader should be able to install the agent, run EEG preprocessing and quality control, generate Alpha dynamics figures, perform within-subject Rest/Task visual cognitive-load comparison, run the public mini-dataset analyses and compare them with the reference validation summary, start an online dashboard, call the real-time API from an external application, and use the LLM interpretation layer to explain quality risks. Existing EEG toolkits provide excellent offline analysis, but assembling a real-time, quality-gated cognitive-load pipeline often requires manually bridging acquisition, custom QC, Alpha feature extraction, and a web API; this tutorial closes that offline-to-online gap. The tutorial uses a quality-gated workflow: downstream Alpha and workload metrics are computed only after preprocessing and QC gating rather than directly from raw EEG. In the included mini-dataset validation, the agent processed 18 recordings, generated 10 within-subject comparisons, observed task-related posterior Alpha suppression in 7 of 10 contrasts, estimated initial evidence of within-subject repeatability, and benchmarked local online API latency. The tutorial is intended for researchers, developers, and applied teams who want a transparent path from EEG files to real-time visual cognitive-load prototypes.

摘要：這篇教程論文提供了一個逐步的、可重現的 NeuraDock Agent 操作流程，這是一個專注於 Alpha 動態和視覺認知負荷分析的開源 EEG 代理。其目標是實用的：讀者應能夠安裝該代理，運行 EEG 預處理和質量控制，生成 Alpha 動態圖，執行受試者內部的休息/任務視覺認知負荷比較，運行公共迷你數據集分析並將其與參考驗證摘要進行比較，啟動在線儀表板，從外部應用調用實時 API，並使用 LLM 解釋層來解釋質量風險。現有的 EEG 工具包提供了出色的離線分析，但組建一個實時的、質量門檻的認知負荷管道通常需要手動橋接數據採集、自定義 QC、Alpha 特徵提取和網絡 API；這個教程填補了離線到在線的空白。該教程使用了一個質量門檻的工作流程：下游的 Alpha 和工作負荷指標僅在預處理和 QC 門檻後計算，而不是直接從原始 EEG 中計算。在包含的迷你數據集驗證中，該代理處理了 18 次錄音，生成了 10 次受試者內部比較，在 10 個對比中觀察到 7 次與任務相關的後部 Alpha 抑制，估計了受試者內部重複性的初步證據，並基準測試了本地在線 API 的延遲。該教程旨在為希望從 EEG 文件到實時視覺認知負荷原型的研究人員、開發者和應用團隊提供透明的路徑。

docs.title: Clinical Harness for Governable Medical AI Skill Ecosystems
docs.text:
2606.26494v2 by Tianhan Xu, Lei Bao, Zhe Hu, Tian Shen, Yongxiang Wang

Medical AI remains organized around isolated models, whereas care requires accountable capabilities that persist across time. We define clinical AI skills and propose the Clinical Harness, a runtime governance architecture that registers, orchestrates, constrains and monitors them. Using osteoporosis as an exemplar, we show how knowledge-driven, data-driven and physics-enhanced skills can support lifecycle care and provide a governed substrate for future medical agents.

摘要：醫療人工智慧仍然圍繞著孤立的模型組織，而護理需要持續存在的可負責能力。我們定義了臨床人工智慧技能，並提出了臨床治理架構，這是一種運行時治理架構，用於註冊、協調、約束和監控這些技能。以骨質疏鬆症為例，我們展示了知識驅動、數據驅動和物理增強的技能如何支持生命周期護理，並為未來的醫療代理提供一個受治理的基礎。

docs.title: Retrieval-Warmed Energy-Based Reasoning: A Five-Arm Ablation Methodology for Diffusion-as-Inference on Structured Reasoning Tasks
docs.text:
2606.26476v1 by Libo Sun, Po-Wei Harn, Zewei Zhang, Peixiong He, Xiao Qin

Warm-started diffusion samplers accelerate iterative inference, but it is rarely clear which part of the pipeline carries the gain. We study \textbf{retrieval-warmed energy-based reasoning (RW-EBR)} -- an IRED energy-based diffusion model \cite{du2024ired} augmented with a Modern Hopfield trajectory memory -- and contribute a \textbf{five-arm ablation methodology} (oracle, best-constant, per-query-random, shuffled, aligned) that separates three confounded effects: class-prior bias shift, stochastic warm-starting, and graph-aligned value reuse. The diagnostic decomposition is adapted from LLM-RAG evaluation \cite{ru2024ragchecker}. On \textbf{connectivity-2} (Erdős--Rényi all-pairs reachability), the aligned-vs-shuffled-oracle swing reaches \textbf{$+35$\,pp} balanced accuracy on a fixed 1{,}000-graph validation-set diagnostic, with value distribution and retrieval mechanics fixed, only per-graph alignment destroyed, while per-query random initialisation falls below cold -- per-graph alignment, not bias shift or stochasticity, dominates. Yet the \emph{deployable} cold-prediction pipeline misses the acceptance gate at stored-value quality. The same diagnostic logic, stopped at the key-quality screen, applied to \textbf{Sudoku} with a task-specific key encoder produces a clean negative at a \emph{different} component -- key quality, under the current setup. The decomposition names the first blocking component on each task. The setting -- graph reachability refined by an iterative diffusion sampler, with explainability of failure modes as the lens -- places the work within structured and spatio-temporal reasoning.

摘要：暖啟動的擴散取樣器加速了迭代推斷，但通常不清楚管道中的哪一部分帶來了增益。我們研究了\textbf{檢索加熱的基於能量的推理 (RW-EBR)}——一種增強了現代霍普菲爾德軌跡記憶的IRED基於能量的擴散模型\cite{du2024ired}——並貢獻了一種\textbf{五臂消融方法}（oracle、best-constant、per-query-random、shuffled、aligned），以分離三個混淆效應：類別先驗偏差轉移、隨機暖啟動和圖對齊值重用。診斷分解是從LLM-RAG評估\cite{ru2024ragchecker}改編而來。在\textbf{connectivity-2}（Erdős--Rényi全對可達性）上，對齊與隨機oracle的差異達到了\textbf{$+35$\,pp}的平衡準確率，在固定的1{,}000圖驗證集診斷上，值分佈和檢索機制固定，僅破壞每圖對齊，而每查詢隨機初始化則低於冷啟動——每圖對齊，而非偏差轉移或隨機性，主導了結果。然而，\emph{可部署}的冷預測管道錯過了存儲值質量的接受閘。相同的診斷邏輯，在關鍵質量篩選處停止，應用於\textbf{數獨}，使用特定任務的關鍵編碼器，產生了一個在\emph{不同}組件上的乾淨負結果——在當前設置下的關鍵質量。該分解命名了每個任務上的第一個阻塞組件。這一設置——通過迭代擴散取樣器精煉的圖可達性，以失敗模式的可解釋性作為透鏡——將這項工作置於結構化和時空推理之內。

docs.title: Accelerating Returns and the Qualitative Engine for Science
docs.text:
2606.26359v1 by Guojun Liao

Ray Kurzweil described a thesis of accelerating returns, which is the most influential narratives in discussions of technological progress. Its central claim is that advances in multiple technological fields, especially compute, artificial intelligence, brain science, and biotechnology, interact in such a way that progress becomes self-amplifying and approximately exponential. This paper gives a simple mathematical interpretation of that claim and then argues that, even if such acceleration is real, it does not by itself resolve the central problem of scientific discovery. The reason is that accelerating returns apply most naturally to executional and infrastructural capability, whereas genuine discovery often depends on a different capacity: qualitative reasoning about when a current framework is structurally inadequate and what conceptual move is needed next. Recent ARC-AGI-3 results sharpen this distinction: humans solve the benchmark at ceiling, whereas frontier AI systems remain below 1%, indicating that the gap between current AI and human flexible reasoning is still very large. At the same time, Demis Hassabis has emphasized that humans must retain their sense of meaning and what they choose to focus their lives on, a reminder that the future of AI is not only a technical forecast but also a question of what forms of human understanding are worth preserving and transmitting. This paper positions the Qualitative Engine for Science (QES) [3] as a response to that missing capacity. In this view, the Kurzweil theory helps explain why quantitative capability may accelerate, while QES addresses the central problem in scientific discovery that acceleration alone does not solve. Its value does not depend on when AGI arrives, but on the fact that the processes of scientific discovery themselves constitute a form of human wisdom worth preserving, organizing, and making accessible.

摘要：雷·庫茲韋爾描述了一個加速回報的論點，這是技術進步討論中最具影響力的敘事之一。其核心主張是多個技術領域的進展，特別是計算、人工智慧、大腦科學和生物技術，彼此互動，使得進步變得自我增強並大約呈指數增長。本文對該主張給出了簡單的數學解釋，然後論證即使這種加速是真實的，它本身並不能解決科學發現的核心問題。原因在於，加速回報最自然地應用於執行和基礎設施能力，而真正的發現往往依賴於不同的能力：對於當前框架何時結構性不足以及下一步需要什麼概念性變革的定性推理。最近的ARC-AGI-3結果加強了這一區別：人類在上限處解決基準，而前沿AI系統仍然低於1%，這表明當前AI與人類靈活推理之間的差距仍然非常大。同時，德米斯·哈薩比斯強調人類必須保持對意義的感知以及他們選擇專注於生活的事物，這提醒我們AI的未來不僅僅是技術預測，也是關於哪些形式的人類理解值得保留和傳承的問題。本文將科學的定性引擎（QES）[3]定位為對這一缺失能力的回應。在這種觀點下，庫茲韋爾理論有助於解釋為什麼定量能力可能加速，而QES則解決了科學發現中僅靠加速無法解決的核心問題。它的價值不依賴於AGI何時到來，而在於科學發現的過程本身構成了一種值得保留、組織和使其可及的人類智慧。

docs.title: Governing Actions, Not Agents: Institutional Attestation as a Governance Model for Autonomous AI Systems
docs.text:
2606.26298v1 by Jakob Salfeld-Nebgen

Autonomous AI agents may begin to perform consequential, irreversible actions such as clinical prescribing and production software deployment. This paper observes that human institutions have governed powerful autonomous actors not by monitoring their reasoning but by requiring independently attested evidence at the point of consequential action. We formalise this institutional pattern as a computational governance model for AI agent systems. Under the proposed model, an agent retains full autonomy over planning and reasoning but holds no execution authority over designated high-risk actions. Execution is conditional on preconditions that are each independently attested by a separate authoritative source, cryptographically bound to a declared intent, and evaluated by a deterministic policy. Decisions are recorded in a tamper-evident log amenable to independent re-verification. We present a proof-of-concept implementation and illustrate the model with examples from software deployment and clinical prescribing.

摘要：自主 AI 代理可能開始執行有重大影響且不可逆的行動，例如臨床處方和生產軟體部署。本文觀察到，人類機構並不是通過監控其推理來管理強大的自主行為者，而是通過在有重大行動的時刻要求獨立證實的證據。我們將這種制度模式正式化為 AI 代理系統的計算治理模型。在所提出的模型下，代理在計劃和推理方面保持完全自主，但對指定的高風險行動沒有執行權限。執行條件取決於每個由獨立權威來源獨立證實的前提條件，這些前提條件以加密方式綁定於聲明的意圖，並由確定性政策進行評估。決策記錄在一個可防篡改的日誌中，便於獨立重新驗證。我們展示了一個概念驗證實現，並用軟體部署和臨床處方的例子來說明該模型。

docs.title: Accelerating Skill Assessment in Chess: A Drift-Diffusion-Enhanced Elo Rating System
docs.text:
2606.26267v1 by Tianyuan Zhou, Zhizheng Fu, Tianming Yang

Rating systems such as Elo serve as the gold standard for matchmaking in competitive chess. However, they inherently suffer from response lag due to their exclusive reliance on match outcomes, neglecting the granular quality of gameplay. Nevertheless, incorporating move-by-move information into rating adjustments presents a significant challenge given the substantial noise and the vastness of the game-state space. To address this, we propose the Drift-Diffusion-Enhanced Elo Rating System (DD-Elo), a novel skill assessment framework inspired by the drift diffusion model (DDM) from cognitive neuroscience. By modeling skill expression as a decision-making process, our model integrates move-level data to capture rapid skill fluctuations. We provide a rigorous mathematical derivation proving that DD-Elo maintains a bounded deviation from the traditional Elo system, ensuring theoretical alignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DD-Elo adapts to skill changes faster than Elo. Our findings suggest that DD-Elo offers an explainable, highly responsive, and backward-compatible solution for chess rating ecosystems. The implementation code is publicly available at https://github.com/Aquila-zhou1/DD-Elo .

摘要：評分系統如Elo作為競技棋類配對的黃金標準。然而，它們固有地受到反應延遲的影響，因為它們僅依賴比賽結果，忽略了遊戲過程的細微品質。儘管如此，將逐步移動信息納入評分調整中仍然是一個重大挑戰，因為遊戲狀態空間的噪音和廣度都相當龐大。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了漂移擴散增強Elo評分系統（DD-Elo），這是一個受到認知神經科學中的漂移擴散模型（DDM）啟發的新型技能評估框架。通過將技能表現建模為決策過程，我們的模型整合了逐步數據，以捕捉快速的技能波動。我們提供了嚴謹的數學推導，證明DD-Elo與傳統Elo系統保持有界偏差，確保理論上的一致性。廣泛的實驗表明，DD-Elo對技能變化的適應速度快於Elo。我們的研究結果表明，DD-Elo為棋類評分生態系統提供了一個可解釋、高度響應且向後兼容的解決方案。實施代碼可在 https://github.com/Aquila-zhou1/DD-Elo 獲得。

docs.title: Knowledge-augmented Agentic AI for Mental Health Medication Information Seeking
docs.text:
2606.26205v1 by Huizi Yu, Jian Liu, Wenkong Wang, Lingyao Li, Jiayan Zhou, Zhaoqian Xue, Xiang Li, Xinxin Lin, Zhiying Liang, Zhuoru Wu, Siyuan Ma, Xin Ma, Lizhou Fan

Patients increasingly seek medication information online, yet safety knowledge for psychiatric drugs is split between regulatory adverse-event records, which are authoritative but abstract, and patient narratives, which are experience-near but unvalidated. Integrating them without conflating evidence and anecdote is especially consequential in psychiatry, where poorly contextualised information can amplify fear, nocebo responses, and non-adherence. Here we develop a provenance-aware, knowledge-graph-based multi-agent framework unifying 466,525 Reddit posts, 60,782 WebMD reviews, and twenty years of U.S. FDA Adverse Event Reporting System records for nine antidepressants. A large-language-model entity-recognition pipeline benchmarked against physician annotations reached highest F1 scores of 0.969 for medications and 0.973 for conditions. The two community platforms were far more concordant with each other (overlap up to a Jaccard similarity of 0.905) than with regulatory reports, indicating that patient-generated data form a partly independent safety signal. For sertraline, many adverse events appeared in community sources hundreds of days before the corresponding FDA date. A Neo4j knowledge graph grounded in ATC-N, ICD-10, and MedDRA vocabularies preserves provenance, keeping every claim traceable and regulatory facts distinct from patient experience. These results establish source-aware integration as a route to more auditable psychiatric medication information, with usefulness and patient benefit to be tested prospectively.

摘要：患者越來越多地在網上尋求藥物資訊，但精神科藥物的安全知識卻分為兩部分：一方面是權威但抽象的監管不良事件記錄，另一方面是接近經驗但未經驗證的患者敘述。在精神科中，將這兩者整合而不混淆證據與轶事尤其重要，因為缺乏情境的資訊可能會加劇恐懼、負面反應和不遵從治療。在這裡，我們開發了一個基於知識圖譜的多代理框架，整合了466,525條Reddit帖子、60,782條WebMD評論，以及美國FDA不良事件報告系統的二十年記錄，針對九種抗抑鬱藥物。一個基於大型語言模型的實體識別管道，與醫生標註進行基準測試，對藥物和病症的F1分數分別達到0.969和0.973。這兩個社區平台之間的相符程度遠高於與監管報告的相符程度（重疊達到0.905的Jaccard相似度），這表明患者生成的數據形成了部分獨立的安全信號。對於舍曲林，許多不良事件在社區來源中出現的時間早於相應的FDA日期數百天。一個基於ATC-N、ICD-10和MedDRA詞彙的Neo4j知識圖譜保留了來源，保持每個主張可追溯，並將監管事實與患者經驗區分開來。這些結果確立了源感知整合作為獲得更可審計的精神科藥物資訊的途徑，其實用性和患者利益將在前瞻性研究中進行測試。

docs.title: Pulmonary Embolism Risk Stratification from CTPA and Medical Records: Vascular Graphs Are Not All You Need
docs.text:
2606.25956v2 by Nathan Painchaud, Tristan Habémont, Morgane des Ligneris, Allan Serva, Pierre Croisille, Laurent Bertoletti, Thomas Lampert, Johannes F. Lutzeyer, Odyssée Merveille

Risk stratification for pulmonary embolism (PE) is critical for clinical decision-making. Stratification guidelines are based on patient medical records, parameters measured from computed tomography pulmonary angiography (CTPA), and blood tests. However, blood tests are often missing in routine practice. This work studies whether state-of-the-art models can accurately classify risk stratification from only medical records and biomarkers extracted from CTPA images. We benchmark different approaches to combine medical records and cardiac biomarkers with rich pulmonary vascular information; we add vascular biomarkers to tabular models and apply graph neural networks (GNNs) on the vascular tree's intrinsic graph representation. We use a private dataset (n=353) with uniquely complete data for PE risk stratification. Our results show that, among global features, medical records and cardiac biomarkers are the most significant predictors, while vascular biomarkers do not further improve stratification. Even more surprising, even GNNs on vascular graphs fail to outperform strong tabular baseline on global features. We consider hypotheses, on both models and data, that could explain this suboptimal performance. Our investigation suggests that, counter-intuitively, vascular graphs might hold no discriminative information for PE risk stratification. Code is available from https://github.com/creatis-myriad/GENESIS.

摘要：風險分層對於肺栓塞 (PE) 的臨床決策至關重要。分層指導方針基於患者的醫療記錄、從計算機斷層肺動脈造影 (CTPA) 測量的參數以及血液檢查。然而，常規實踐中血液檢查往往缺失。本研究探討最先進的模型是否能僅根據醫療記錄和從CTPA影像提取的生物標記準確分類風險分層。我們基準不同的方法來結合醫療記錄和心臟生物標記，並利用豐富的肺血管信息；我們將血管生物標記添加到表格模型中，並在血管樹的內在圖形表示上應用圖神經網絡 (GNN)。我們使用一個私有數據集 (n=353)，該數據集對於PE風險分層具有獨特的完整數據。我們的結果顯示，在全球特徵中，醫療記錄和心臟生物標記是最重要的預測因子，而血管生物標記並未進一步改善分層。更令人驚訝的是，即使在血管圖上的GNN也未能超越強大的表格基準在全球特徵上的表現。我們考慮了可能解釋這一次優化性能的假設，包括模型和數據。我們的調查表明，反直覺地，血管圖可能不包含對PE風險分層的區分信息。代碼可從 https://github.com/creatis-myriad/GENESIS 獲得。

docs.title: Explainable Control Framework (XCF) based on Fuzzy Model-Agnostic Explanation and LLM Agent-Supported Interface
docs.text:
2606.25941v1 by Faliang Yin, Hak-Keung Lam, David Watson

Increasing demand for precise and reliable control in complex scenarios has led to the development of increasingly sophisticated controllers, including data-driven approaches employing closed box models and mathematically rigorous yet complex designs. This complexity highlights the needs for explainable control that can provide human-understandable insights into controller behavior. In this paper, an explainable control framework (XCF) along with supporting algorithms and user interface are proposed to explain how controllers determine their control actions and their underlying working mechanism. The novel contributions of this work are threefold: First, the XCF is designed to provide model-agnostic explanations for controllers in closed-loop systems and can optionally refine local explanations by system response dynamics. Second, a novel explanation method, hierarchical fuzzy model-agnostic explanation for control systems (HFMAE-C), is proposed based on the designed framework. The HFMAE-C employs a fuzzy logic system to approximate the controller's behavior and system dynamics, providing sample, local, domain and universe level explanations via IF-THEN rules revealing the controller's decision logic and salience values quantifying the contribution of system states to control actions. Third, a large language model agent-supported user interface is developed to automatically analyze user requirements, select appropriate algorithms, interpret the generated explanations to a natural language report, and provide interactive consultation. Case studies on inverted pendulum system and Turtlebot obstacle avoidance demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method through simulated user experiments and quantitative comparisons with mainstream explainable control approaches.

摘要：隨著對於在複雜情境中精確且可靠控制需求的增加，越來越多的先進控制器被開發出來，包括使用封閉盒模型和數學上嚴謹但複雜設計的數據驅動方法。這種複雜性突顯了可解釋控制的需求，該控制能夠提供人類可理解的控制器行為見解。在本論文中，提出了一個可解釋控制框架（XCF），以及支持算法和用戶界面，以解釋控制器如何確定其控制行動及其背後的工作機制。這項工作的創新貢獻有三個方面：首先，XCF旨在為封閉迴路系統中的控制器提供模型無關的解釋，並可以選擇根據系統響應動態來細化局部解釋。其次，基於設計的框架，提出了一種新穎的解釋方法，即控制系統的層次模糊模型無關解釋（HFMAE-C）。HFMAE-C利用模糊邏輯系統來近似控制器的行為和系統動態，通過IF-THEN規則提供樣本、本地、領域和宇宙級別的解釋，揭示控制器的決策邏輯和量化系統狀態對控制行動貢獻的顯著性值。第三，開發了一個大型語言模型代理支持的用戶界面，自動分析用戶需求，選擇合適的算法，將生成的解釋轉化為自然語言報告，並提供互動諮詢。對倒立擺系統和Turtlebot障礙物避免的案例研究通過模擬用戶實驗和與主流可解釋控制方法的定量比較，展示了所提方法的有效性。

docs.title: Expresso-AI: Explainable Video-Based Deep Learning Models for Depression Diagnosis
docs.text:
2606.25606v1 by Felipe Moreno, Sharifa Alghowinem, Hae Won Park, Cynthia Breazeal

Given the widespread prevalence of depression and its consequential impact on individuals and society, it is crucial to obtain objective measures for early diagnosis and intervention. As a multidisciplinary topic, these objective measures should be interpretable and accessible to health care professionals, ensuring effective collaboration and treatment planning in the realm of mental health care. Even though current automated depression diagnosis approaches improved over the last decade, a critical gap exists as they often lack affect-specificity and interpretability, limiting their practical application and potential impact on mental health care. In particular, interpretability from temporal activities from videos when deep models are used is not fully explored. In this study, we present a novel framework for analyzing Deep Neural Networks' decisions when trained on facial videos, specifically focusing on automatic depression severity diagnosis. By fine-tuning Deep Convolutional Neural Networks (DCNN) pre-trained on Action Recognition datasets on depression severity facial videos from AVEC depression dataset, our framework is able to interpret the model's saliency maps by examining face regions and temporal expression semantics. Our approach generates both visual and quantitative explanations for the model's decisions, providing greater insight into its reasoning. In addition to this interpretability, our video-based modeling has improved upon previous single-face benchmarks for visual depression diagnosis, resulting in enhanced predictive performance. Overall, our work demonstrates the successful development of a framework capable of generating hypotheses from a facial model's decisions while simultaneously improving depression's predictive capabilities.

摘要：考慮到憂鬱症的廣泛流行及其對個人和社會的影響，獲得客觀的早期診斷和干預措施至關重要。作為一個多學科的主題，這些客觀措施應該能夠被醫療專業人員解釋和訪問，以確保在心理健康護理領域的有效合作和治療計劃。儘管目前自動化的憂鬱症診斷方法在過去十年有所改善，但仍存在一個關鍵的缺口，因為它們往往缺乏情感特異性和可解釋性，限制了其實際應用和對心理健康護理的潛在影響。特別是，使用深度模型時，來自視頻的時間活動的可解釋性尚未得到充分探索。在本研究中，我們提出了一個新穎的框架，用於分析深度神經網絡在面部視頻上訓練時的決策，特別專注於自動憂鬱症嚴重程度診斷。通過對在行為識別數據集上預訓練的深度卷積神經網絡（DCNN）進行微調，並應用於來自 AVEC 憂鬱症數據集的憂鬱症嚴重程度面部視頻，我們的框架能夠通過檢查面部區域和時間表情語義來解釋模型的顯著性圖。我們的方法為模型的決策生成了視覺和定量的解釋，提供了對其推理的更深入見解。除了這種可解釋性，我們基於視頻的建模在視覺憂鬱症診斷方面改進了以前的單面基準，從而提高了預測性能。總體而言，我們的工作展示了一個成功開發的框架，能夠從面部模型的決策中生成假設，同時提高了憂鬱症的預測能力。

docs.title: Low-Complexity Policy Tessellations in Structured Markov Decision Processes
docs.text:
2606.25593v1 by Fredy Pokou

We study optimal-policy geometry in structured Markov decision processes. While approximate dynamic programming and reinforcement learning typically approximate high-dimensional value functions, we show that optimal policies induce simpler decision tessellations. We propose boundary-based policy approximations that learn policy regions directly. A policy-loss decomposition links performance degradation to action margins and explains why errors concentrate near indifference boundaries. Inventory control and queue admission experiments show lower policy error, smaller value gaps, faster error decay, and stability than reinforcement learning baselines.

摘要：我們研究結構化馬可夫決策過程中的最佳政策幾何。雖然近似動態規劃和強化學習通常近似高維價值函數，但我們顯示最佳政策會產生更簡單的決策劃分。 我們提出基於邊界的政策近似，直接學習政策區域。政策損失分解將性能下降與行動邊際聯繫起來，並解釋為什麼錯誤集中在無差異邊界附近。庫存控制和隊列入場實驗顯示出比強化學習基準更低的政策錯誤、更小的價值差距、更快的錯誤衰減和更高的穩定性。

docs.title: Anatomically-conditioned Latent Diffusion Model for Data-Efficient Few-Shot Cross-Domain 3D Glioma MRI Synthesis
docs.text:
2606.25390v1 by Salman Shaik, Truong Thanh Hung Nguyen, Hung Cao

Accurate classification of diffuse gliomas is often hindered by domain shifts across centers and a lack of large, annotated datasets. We propose the Anatomically-conditioned Latent Diffusion Model (ALDM), a novel framework for data-efficient, few-shot 3D volumetric MRI synthesis. ALDM utilizes a two-stage approach: a 3D variational autoencoder learns anatomical priors from a data-rich source domain, while a conditional latent diffusion model, guided by tumor masks via a ControlNet, generates structurally coherent volumes for a data-scarce target domain. Evaluated in an extreme few-shot setting with only 16 target images, ALDM outperformed GAN and hybrid baselines, achieving a superior Frechet Inception Distance (FID) of 85.40 and a downstream classification AUC of 0.987. Qualitative results confirm that the model preserves sharp pathology boundaries and cross-modal consistency, with visual fidelity improving progressively during training. By capturing essential diagnostic features, ALDM provides a robust tool for clinical data augmentation in low-resource settings. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/Analytics-Everywhere-Lab/anatomically-conditioned-LDM.

摘要：準確分類擴散性膠質瘤常常受到中心之間領域轉變和缺乏大型標註數據集的阻礙。我們提出了「解剖條件潛在擴散模型」（ALDM），這是一種新穎的框架，用於數據高效、少量樣本的3D體積MRI合成。ALDM採用兩階段的方法：3D變分自編碼器從數據豐富的源域學習解剖先驗，而由腫瘤掩碼指導的條件潛在擴散模型，通過ControlNet生成結構上連貫的體積，適用於數據稀缺的目標域。在只有16張目標圖像的極端少量樣本設置中，ALDM的表現超過了GAN和混合基準，獲得了優越的Frechet Inception Distance (FID) 85.40和下游分類AUC 0.987。定性結果確認該模型能夠保持清晰的病理邊界和跨模態一致性，視覺真實感在訓練過程中逐步改善。通過捕捉重要的診斷特徵，ALDM為低資源環境中的臨床數據增強提供了一個穩健的工具。我們的實現可以在https://github.com/Analytics-Everywhere-Lab/anatomically-conditioned-LDM上獲得。

docs.title: Beyond Visual Forensics: Auditing Multimodal Robustness for Synthetic Medical Image Detection
docs.text:
2606.25375v1 by Ching-Hao Chiu, Hao-Wei Chung, Gelei Xu, Xueyang Li, Pin-Yu Chen, John Kheir, Meysam Ghaffari, Carlos Morato, Ahmed Abbasi, Yiyu Shi

With the rapid adoption of generative AI, synthetic medical images pose growing risks, including diagnostic deception and insurance fraud. Although prior work has explored vision-language model (VLM)-based synthetic image detection, these evaluations typically consider images in isolation. In clinical practice, however, images are interpreted alongside structured records and metadata, and VLMs are increasingly deployed under joint image-record inputs. We uncover a previously underexamined multimodal vulnerability: when given both modalities, VLMs may overweight record context in authenticity judgments, such that the same image receives different predictions solely due to changes in its accompanying text. This raises concerns about robustness in real-world deployment. To systematically characterize this effect, we reformulate synthetic medical image detection as an audit of multimodal robustness at the image-record interface and introduce a paired benchmark that holds the image fixed while swapping controlled metadata variants. Across multiple imaging modalities, we evaluate diverse open-weight and frontier API VLMs and quantify how metadata alone shifts authenticity predictions. Our benchmark provides a standardized tool for assessing and improving multimodal robustness beyond image-only settings. The code is available at https://github.com/chiuhaohao/Beyond-Visual-Forensics.

摘要：隨著生成式人工智慧的快速採用，合成醫學影像帶來了日益增長的風險，包括診斷欺騙和保險詐欺。雖然先前的研究探討了基於視覺-語言模型（VLM）的合成影像檢測，但這些評估通常是將影像孤立地考量。然而，在臨床實踐中，影像是與結構化記錄和元數據一起解釋的，且 VLM 正在越來越多地在聯合影像-記錄輸入下部署。我們揭示了一種先前未被充分檢視的多模態脆弱性：當同時提供這兩種模態時，VLM 可能在真實性判斷中過度重視記錄的上下文，以至於同一影像僅因其伴隨文本的變化而獲得不同的預測。這引發了對於實際部署中穩健性的擔憂。為了系統性地描述這一效應，我們將合成醫學影像檢測重新定義為影像-記錄介面的多模態穩健性審核，並引入一個配對基準，該基準在固定影像的同時更換受控的元數據變體。在多種影像模態下，我們評估了多樣的開放權重和前沿 API VLM，並量化了僅元數據如何改變真實性預測。我們的基準提供了一個標準化工具，用於評估和改善超越僅影像設定的多模態穩健性。代碼可在 https://github.com/chiuhaohao/Beyond-Visual-Forensics 獲得。

docs.title: Phoneme-Level Mispronunciation Screening in Polish-Speaking Children with an Explainable Assistant
docs.text:
2606.25181v1 by Milosz Dudek, Daria Hemmerling, Kamil Kwarciak, Maciej Stroinski, Maria Pensko, Mateusz Kowalewski, Leonid Pavlovskyi, Sebastian Jurczak, Anna-Mariia Vitkovska, Zuzanna Miodonska, Natalia Mocko, Michal Krecichwost

Early identification of speech sound errors in children is often limited by access to specialists, motivating lightweight screening tools that can operate outside the clinic. We present a screening pipeline for Polish-speaking children focused on sibilant substitutions, coupling a wav2vec2-based CTC token recognizer with alignment-based error typing and a template-grounded caregiver assistant for screening, not diagnosis. On a held-out test set of 10 unseen children comprising 559 utterances, the recognizer achieves 88.7 percent exact sequence match. As a conservative screening proxy, we flag a mismatch when the system emits substitution-evidence bracketed tokens at the target segment, yielding 72.9 percent precision, 61.4 percent recall, F1 = 0.67, and a 2.7 percent false-alarm rate on target-correct items. We describe the assistant's safety boundaries and outline a clinician-in-the-loop validation plan for future deployment.

摘要：早期識別兒童語音錯誤常常受到專家可及性的限制，這促使了可以在診所外運作的輕量篩檢工具的需求。我們提出了一個針對說波蘭語兒童的篩檢流程，專注於齒擦音的替代，將基於wav2vec2的CTC標記識別器與基於對齊的錯誤類型和模板基礎的照顧者助手結合，用於篩檢，而非診斷。在一組包含559個發音的10名未見兒童的保留測試集中，該識別器達到了88.7%的精確序列匹配。作為保守的篩檢代理，當系統在目標片段發出替代證據括號標記時，我們標記為不匹配，產生72.9%的精確度、61.4%的召回率、F1 = 0.67，以及在目標正確項目上2.7%的誤報率。我們描述了助手的安全邊界，並概述了未來部署的臨床醫生參與驗證計劃。

docs.title: Elo-Disentangled Player-Style Embeddings for Human Chess via Rating-Conditioned Residual Move Model
docs.text:
2606.25176v1 by Jason Carlson

We study representation learning for individual human chess style: a per-player embedding learned from a player's move history such that inner products measure stylistic similarity, while being approximately disentangled from playing strength (Elo). Our key design is a residual formulation: a rating-conditioned base move model (Maia-3 policy logits plus Stockfish-derived features, scored over Maia-2-proposed candidates) captures what a typical player of a given strength would play, and a frozen copy of it anchors a learned move encoder and a per-player vector z, so that z explains only deviations from rating-typical play. The base model improves move prediction over the strong Maia-3 policy by 27-37% relative NLL across the rating spectrum, with the largest gains at the top (2800+); Stockfish's marginal value grows monotonically with Elo (negligible at 900-1200, +0.085 nats at 2800+). On a shared Elo-stratified benchmark of 22,620 held-out decisions, top-1 move-matching rises monotonically from Maia-2 to Maia-3 to the Stockfish-augmented base (0.51 -> 0.57 -> 0.68): the base is +33% relative top-1 over Maia-2 and +19% over Maia-3 (30% lower NLL), with the engine-feature lift largest at high Elo. The player embedding adds little to raw move-matching on top of this base -- its marginal top-1 gain falls within the 95% confidence interval -- and its value is instead representational: z generalizes to held-out decisions without overfitting, re-identifies players from disjoint games above chance, and a linear probe recovers rating from z with only R^2 = 0.06 (no better nonlinearly), evidence it captures style on an Elo-orthogonal axis. We argue that a strong rating-conditioned base plus a compact, Elo-disentangled embedding -- separating typical play from individual deviation -- is an economical, interpretable model of individual style, an alternative to per-player preference fine-tuning.

摘要：我們研究個別人類棋風的表示學習：從玩家的走棋歷史中學習的每位玩家嵌入，使得內積可以衡量風格相似性，同時與棋力（Elo）大致解耦。我們的關鍵設計是一種殘差公式：一個基於評分的基本走棋模型（Maia-3 策略邏輯加上 Stockfish 衍生特徵，針對 Maia-2 提議的候選者進行評分）捕捉了給定棋力的典型玩家會下的棋，而它的凍結副本則為學習的走棋編碼器和每位玩家的向量 z 提供了基礎，使得 z 僅解釋與評分典型走棋的偏差。該基本模型在整個評分範圍內，相對於強大的 Maia-3 策略，將走棋預測提升了 27-37% 的相對 NLL，最高增益出現在頂部（2800+）；Stockfish 的邊際價值隨著 Elo 單調增長（在 900-1200 時微不足道，在 2800+ 時為 +0.085 nats）。在一個包含 22,620 個保留決策的共享 Elo 分層基準上，前 1 名的走棋匹配率從 Maia-2 到 Maia-3 再到 Stockfish 增強的基礎單調上升（0.51 -> 0.57 -> 0.68）：該基礎相對於 Maia-2 提升了 +33% 的前 1 名，並且相對於 Maia-3 提升了 +19%（NLL 低 30%），而引擎特徵的提升在高 Elo 時最大。這個玩家嵌入在此基礎上對原始走棋匹配的貢獻不大——其邊際前 1 名增益落在 95% 置信區間內——而其價值則是表徵性的：z 在不過擬合的情況下對保留決策進行了泛化，從不相關的棋局中重新識別玩家，並且線性探測從 z 中恢復評分的 R^2 僅為 0.06（非線性情況下沒有更好），證據表明它捕捉了在與 Elo 正交的軸上的風格。我們認為，強大的基於評分的基礎加上緊湊的、與 Elo 解耦的嵌入——將典型走棋與個別偏差分開——是一種經濟、可解釋的個人風格模型，是每位玩家偏好微調的替代方案。

docs.title: Reducing Redundancy in Whole-Slide Image Patching for Scalable Indexing and Retrieval
docs.text:
2606.26157v1 by Jialiang Geng, Ghazal Alabtah, Saghir Alfasly, Wataru Uegami, H. R. Tizhoosh

The rapid growth of digital pathology has created an urgent need for efficient indexing and retrieval of whole slide images (WSIs). This need is intensified by emerging generative AI workflows, particularly retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), which require dependable similarity search to support high-stakes clinical decision-making. Yet the substantial cost of high-performance storage limits the scalability and accessibility of WSI indexing for many healthcare institutions. Consequently, methods that can reduce storage demands while preserving retrieval accuracy have become a critical research priority. We propose ARReST (Antithetical Redundancy Reduction Strategy), a principled oppositional framework that leverages redundancy across dissimilar tissue classes to markedly decrease the number of patches that must be indexed from each WSI. Instead of eliminating only within-class duplicates, ARReST identifies antithetical patches-those whose representations contribute minimally to cross-class discrimination-and prunes them from the searchable archive. This targeted reduction substantially compresses the index without sacrificing morphological diversity or retrieval fidelity. By minimizing superfluous patch representations, ARReST reduces storage footprint, lowers computational overhead, and accelerates similarity search across large pathology repositories. Extensive experiments on TCGA repository (The Cancer Genome Atlas with 21 organs) demonstrate that ARReST achieves significant index compression while maintaining competitive retrieval performance. The observed storage savings of 3% to 60% (14%$\pm$13%) can be reliably achieved without compromising retrieval performance for many organs. The proposed strategy enables scalable, cost-efficient WSI indexing and is well-suited for next-generation retrieval-driven clinical AI systems.

摘要：數位病理學的快速增長創造了對整張幻燈片影像（WSIs）高效索引和檢索的迫切需求。這一需求因新興的生成性人工智慧工作流程，特別是增強檢索生成（RAG），而加劇，這些工作流程需要可靠的相似性搜索來支持高風險的臨床決策。然而，高性能存儲的可觀成本限制了許多醫療機構對WSI索引的可擴展性和可及性。因此，能夠在保持檢索準確性的同時減少存儲需求的方法已成為一項關鍵的研究優先事項。我們提出了ARReST（對立冗餘減少策略），這是一個原則性的對立框架，利用不同組織類別之間的冗餘，顯著減少每個WSI中必須索引的補丁數量。ARReST不僅僅是消除類內重複，而是識別對立補丁——那些其表徵對類間區分貢獻最小的補丁——並將其從可搜索的檔案中修剪掉。這種針對性的減少在不犧牲形態多樣性或檢索保真度的情況下，顯著壓縮了索引。通過最小化多餘的補丁表徵，ARReST減少了存儲佔用，降低了計算開銷，並加速了在大型病理資料庫中的相似性搜索。在TCGA資料庫（癌症基因組圖譜，涵蓋21個器官）上的廣泛實驗顯示，ARReST在保持競爭性檢索性能的同時，實現了顯著的索引壓縮。觀察到的存儲節省為3%到60%（14%$\pm$13%），在許多器官中可以可靠地實現，而不會妥協檢索性能。所提出的策略實現了可擴展、成本效益高的WSI索引，並非常適合下一代以檢索為驅動的臨床人工智慧系統。

docs.title: The Clinician's Veto: Navigating Trust, Liability, and Uncertainty in Autonomous AI Prescribing
docs.text:
2606.25108v1 by Eileanor LaRocco, Sarah Tan, Adarsh Subbaswamy, Anne Andrews, Andrew Taylor, Cree Gaskin, Chirag Agarwal

Autonomous AI systems are transitioning from advisory to autonomous roles for medication prescriptions. Recent United States bill H.R. 238 and Utah's prescription-renewal pilot both authorize AI to prescribe medications in an agentic capacity. While some regulatory guidelines suggest aggregate model performance metrics for clearance, they do not require i) calibrated per-prediction confidence for action-gated thresholds, ii) differentiated communication of uncertainty arising from model ignorance (epistemic) versus genuine clinical ambiguity (aleatoric), and iii) inferential transparency at the moment of decision that allows for liability allocation. Here, we present a regulatory and technical argument (tested with a survey of 136 U.S. prescribing clinicians) positioning these as minimum architectural requirements for safe autonomous prescribing. Our results suggest prescribing clinicians i) would not permit autonomous prescribing without a calibrated confidence-based escalation mechanism, ii) preferred a competing-options summary when uncertainty was aleatoric but shifted to abstention when uncertainty was epistemic, and iii) were only willing to accept additional liability when inferential transparency enabled a substantive judgment under acknowledged uncertainty. These findings indicate our recommended architectural features would encourage higher rates of clinician adoption, largely through collapsing much of what "autonomy" conventionally means. A system meeting these requirements would function less as an autonomous agent and more as a heavily supervised decision-support tool. As legislation and state pilots proceed, our technical argument backed by clinician perspectives provides opportunities for regulation to constrain the degree of autonomy ethically granted to AI in prescribing while aligning liability with the institutional actors who control system design and deployment.

摘要：自主 AI 系統正在從建議角色轉變為自主藥物處方角色。最近的美國法案 H.R. 238 和猶他州的處方續期試點都授權 AI 以代理身份開立藥物。雖然一些監管指導方針建議使用總體模型性能指標來進行批准，但它們並不要求 i) 針對行動門檻的每次預測進行校準的信心，ii) 區分由模型無知（認識論的）引起的不確定性與真正臨床模糊性（隨機的）之間的溝通，以及 iii) 在決策時的推理透明度，以便進行責任分配。在這裡，我們提出了一個監管和技術論點（通過對 136 名美國處方臨床醫師的調查進行測試），將這些視為安全自主處方的最低架構要求。我們的結果表明，處方臨床醫師 i) 不會允許在沒有基於校準信心的升級機制的情況下進行自主處方，ii) 在不確定性為隨機時偏好競爭選項摘要，但在不確定性為認識論時則轉向放棄，iii) 只有在推理透明度使得在承認不確定性的情況下能夠進行實質判斷時，才願意接受額外的責任。這些發現表明，我們推薦的架構特徵將促進臨床醫師的更高採納率，主要是通過縮減「自主性」的傳統意義。滿足這些要求的系統將更像是一個受到嚴格監督的決策支持工具，而不是一個自主代理。隨著立法和州試點的推進，我們基於臨床醫師觀點的技術論點為監管提供了機會，以倫理地限制授予 AI 在處方中的自主性程度，同時將責任與控制系統設計和部署的機構行為者對齊。

docs.title: Beyond Shapley: Efficient Computation of Asymmetric Shapley Values
docs.text:
2606.25103v1 by Ezequiel Companeetz, Santiago Cifuentes, Sergio Abriola

We address the problem of explainability in machine learning models through feature attribution methods. In particular, we consider a variant of Shapley values known as Asymmetric Shapley Values (ASV), which enables the incorporation of causal knowledge into model-agnostic explanations through the use of a causal graph. We show that in certain contexts in which the computation of SHAP is $#P$-hard, the exact computation of ASV can be done in polynomial time. To extend this algorithmic result, we introduce a notion of equivalence classes over the topological orderings of the underlying causal graph, which is useful to reduce the time to compute ASV. In particular, we present a polynomial-time algorithm (in the number of equivalence classes) to compute it whenever the causal graph is a rooted directed tree. Finally, we develop an algorithm for approximating ASV in arbitrary causal DAGs which relies on a procedure to sample topological orderings uniformly at random. To implement this sampling mechanism we leverage known algorithms as well as simpler alternatives. Our experimental results demonstrate the practical viability of the proposed approach in realistic causal structures.

摘要：我們通過特徵歸因方法來解決機器學習模型中的可解釋性問題。特別地，我們考慮一種稱為非對稱夏普利值（Asymmetric Shapley Values, ASV）的夏普利值變體，這使得通過使用因果圖將因果知識納入模型無關的解釋中成為可能。我們展示了在某些計算 SHAP 是 $#P$-困難的上下文中，ASV 的精確計算可以在多項式時間內完成。為了擴展這一算法結果，我們引入了一種關於基礎因果圖的拓撲排序的等價類的概念，這對於減少計算 ASV 的時間是有用的。特別地，我們提出了一種多項式時間算法（根據等價類的數量）來計算 ASV，當因果圖是一棵有根的有向樹時。最後，我們開發了一種在任意因果有向無循環圖（DAG）中近似 ASV 的算法，該算法依賴於一個隨機均勻抽樣拓撲排序的程序。為了實現這一抽樣機制，我們利用了已知的算法以及更簡單的替代方案。我們的實驗結果展示了所提出方法在現實因果結構中的實際可行性。

docs.title: Few-class Fidelity: Evaluating Explanations of Real-conditions CNN classifiers with Optimized Perturbations
docs.text:
2606.28391v1 by Wistan Marchadour, Pedro Soto Vega, Franck Vermet, Mathieu Hatt

The wide use of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) in numerous domains and real-world classification applications is justified by their high precision and automation speed, helping users concentrate on higher-expertise tasks. To better understand the models and avoid bias during deployment, eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) techniques can be used after training. But as the list of XAI solutions expand, comparisons between them diverge, and consensus over their evaluation cannot be reached. This paper proposes a variation of Fidelity-based XAI metrics, with a focus on real-conditions applications, where the number of classes is often low. The approach generates in-distribution, uncertainty-provoking perturbations, to ensure proper measurement of the XAI methods faithfulness. As demonstration of the evaluation framework usefulness, it is compared with human-centric object localization and segmentation metrics. Once applied to both medical and natural imaging applications, it highlights the intricate correlation between domain, data curation, and XAI solution choices in order to validate training of a new CNN model.

摘要：卷積神經網絡（CNN）在眾多領域和現實世界分類應用中的廣泛使用，得益於其高精度和自動化速度，幫助用戶專注於更高專業性的任務。為了更好地理解模型並在部署過程中避免偏見，可以在訓練後使用可解釋人工智慧（XAI）技術。但隨著XAI解決方案的列表不斷擴展，它們之間的比較出現分歧，對於其評估的共識無法達成。本文提出了一種基於忠實度的XAI指標變體，重點關注實際條件下的應用，其中類別數量通常較少。該方法生成分佈內的、不確定性引發的擾動，以確保對XAI方法忠實度的正確測量。作為評估框架有效性的示範，將其與以人為中心的物體定位和分割指標進行比較。一旦應用於醫療和自然影像應用，該方法突顯了領域、數據策展和XAI解決方案選擇之間的複雜關聯，以驗證新CNN模型的訓練。

docs.title: When Multi-Sensor Fusion Fails to Generalize: Cattle Posture Classification Under Animal-Level and Temporal Distribution Shift
docs.text:
2606.24986v1 by Leutrim Uka, Severino Pinto, Gundula Hoffmann, Marina M. -C. Höhne

Automated cattle posture-classification systems frequently report near-perfect accuracy, yet their robustness under realistic deployment conditions remains largely unknown. In particular, it is unclear whether multimodal sensor fusion improves generalisation or leads models to rely on context-specific signals that fail under distribution shift. Here, we evaluate the robustness of automated posture classification (lying versus standing) using collar accelerometers, rumen-bolus sensors, and environmental measurements collected from a pasture-based beef cattle herd across two consecutive years (2024-2025). XGBoost served as the primary model, with Logistic Regression, Random Forest, and Long Short-Term Memory networks evaluated as comparative baselines. Model robustness was assessed under progressively more stringent evaluation protocols, ranging from conventional random train-test splits to leave-one-animal-out validation and cross-year evaluation on an independent cohort of previously unseen animals recorded one year later. While multimodal models achieved strong within-year performance (macro-F1 0.94), the performance declined substantially under cross-year evaluation (macro-F1 0.49). Explainability analysis revealed persistent reliance on rumen-bolus activity and environmental variables even when predictive performance deteriorated. Distribution-shift diagnostics further confirmed substantial differences in feature distributions between recording years. Our findings demonstrate that commonly used evaluation protocols can substantially overestimate real-world performance and that multimodal sensor fusion may reduce, rather than improve, robustness under temporal distribution shift. More broadly, the results highlight that benchmark accuracy alone is insufficient to assess deployment readiness and underscore the need for robustness-centred evaluation in livestock-monitoring research.

摘要：自動化的牛隻姿勢分類系統經常報告接近完美的準確率，但它們在現實部署條件下的穩健性仍然大部分未知。特別是，目前尚不清楚多模態傳感器融合是否改善了泛化能力，或導致模型依賴於在分佈轉移下失效的特定上下文信號。在這裡，我們使用項圈加速度計、瘤胃球傳感器和從一個基於牧場的肉牛群中收集的環境測量，評估自動化姿勢分類（躺著與站立）的穩健性，這些數據收集跨越兩個連續年份（2024-2025）。XGBoost作為主要模型，邏輯回歸、隨機森林和長短期記憶網絡則被評估為比較基準。模型的穩健性在逐步更嚴格的評估協議下進行評估，這些協議從傳統的隨機訓練-測試劃分到留一隻動物驗證，以及在獨立的先前未見動物群體上進行跨年評估。雖然多模態模型在年度內表現強勁（宏F1 0.94），但在跨年評估中表現顯著下降（宏F1 0.49）。可解釋性分析顯示，即使在預測性能惡化的情況下，仍然持續依賴於瘤胃球活動和環境變數。分佈轉移診斷進一步確認了錄製年份之間特徵分佈的顯著差異。我們的研究結果表明，常用的評估協議可能會大幅高估現實世界的性能，而多模態傳感器融合可能在時間分佈轉移下減少而非改善穩健性。更廣泛地說，這些結果強調僅依賴基準準確率不足以評估部署準備性，並強調在牲畜監測研究中需要以穩健性為中心的評估。

docs.title: Themis: An explainable AI-enabled framework for Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback
docs.text:
2606.24622v1 by Andreas Chouliaras, Luke Connolly, Dimitris Chatzpoulos

Training safe Reinforcement Learning (RL) systems is inherently challenging, with no guarantee of avoiding unwanted behaviors. The most effective defenses against this are (i) transparency through explainability and (ii) alignment via human feedback. While both show promising results, no publicly available framework currently combines them. To address this, we introduce Themis, an XAI-enabled testing and evaluation framework for Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback. Themis supports over 200 widely used environments and is easily configurable for experiments in RL, transparency, and alignment. Our results show that Themis can train reward models that match or outperform the environment's true reward signal using human preferences. We also provide a cloud-based platform for collecting human feedback and managing experiments. It is user-friendly, auto-scalable, and supports large participant groups across multiple experiments without extra development overhead. Tests show Themis can support one thousand users in back-to-back experiments on a modest commercial machine.

摘要：訓練安全的強化學習（RL）系統本質上具有挑戰性，並無法保證避免不希望的行為。對此最有效的防禦措施是（i）透過可解釋性實現透明度和（ii）通過人類反饋實現對齊。雖然這兩者都顯示出有希望的結果，但目前沒有公開的框架將它們結合在一起。為了解決這個問題，我們介紹了 Themis，一個基於人類反饋的強化學習的 XAI 啟用測試和評估框架。Themis 支援超過 200 個廣泛使用的環境，並且易於配置以進行 RL、透明度和對齊的實驗。我們的結果顯示，Themis 可以訓練出與環境的真實獎勵信號相匹配或超越的獎勵模型，使用人類偏好。我們還提供了一個基於雲的平台，用於收集人類反饋和管理實驗。它用戶友好、自動擴展，並支援多個實驗中的大型參與者群體，而無需額外的開發開銷。測試顯示，Themis 可以在一台適度的商業機器上支持一千名用戶進行連續實驗。

docs.title: A specialized reasoning large language model for accelerating rare disease diagnosis: a randomized AI physician assistance trial
docs.text:
2606.24510v1 by Haichao Chen, Songchi Zhou, Zhengyun Zhao, Shikai Hu, Xianghong Jin, Hongwei Ji, Li He, Shuli Li, Yiming Qin, Xin Tan, Runfeng Shi, Yih Chung Tham, Jiaye Zhu, Ye Li, Ye Jin, Longhao Cao, Dawei Li, Honghan Wu, Hongqiu Gu, Guanqiao Li, Tudor Groza, Chunying Li, Dian Zeng, Weihong Yu, Gareth Baynam, Saumya Shekhar Jamuar, Min Shen, Shuyang Zhang, Bin Sheng, Sheng Yu, Tien Yin Wong

Rare diseases affect millions of individuals worldwide, yet timely diagnosis remains a major public health challenge due to scarcity of specialized clinical expertise. While large language models (LLMs) show promise to support rare disease diagnosis, current models are constrained by insufficient clinical deployability, limited clinically grounded evidence, and scarcity of training data. Here we present RaDaR (Rare Disease navigatoR), an open-source, compact reasoning LLM (32B parameters) for rare disease diagnosis. RaDaR was trained with 49,170 publicly available free-text cases and 104,666 synthetic cases with reasoning-enhanced training. RaDaR showed the strongest performance among evaluated open-source models, including the 671B DeepSeek-R1, across public benchmarks and four external validation centers. In a retrospective cohort, RaDaR prioritized the final diagnosis before documented clinical suspicion in 61.06 percent of cases, corresponding to a potential lead time of 1.87 months and 50.18 percent of the within-center interval. In a randomized physician-assistance trial, RaDaR assistance improved physicians' rare-disease diagnostic accuracy by 21.44 percentage points compared with internet search alone. Synthetic-data ablations suggested that phenotype-anchored narratives provide useful training signal for long-tail rare diseases, with a monotonic scaling trend within the tested data range. Together, RaDaR and its development and validation framework provide a deployable rare-disease reasoning model and a reproducible development framework for diagnostic AI under data scarcity.

摘要：罕見疾病影響著全球數百萬人，但由於缺乏專業的臨床專長，及時診斷仍然是一個主要的公共衛生挑戰。雖然大型語言模型（LLMs）在支持罕見疾病診斷方面顯示出潛力，但目前的模型受到臨床可部署性不足、臨床基礎證據有限和訓練數據稀缺的限制。在這裡，我們介紹RaDaR（罕見疾病導航器），這是一個開源的、緊湊的推理LLM（32B參數）用於罕見疾病診斷。RaDaR使用49,170個公開可用的自由文本案例和104,666個合成案例進行了推理增強的訓練。RaDaR在評估的開源模型中顯示出最強的表現，包括671B的DeepSeek-R1，在公共基準和四個外部驗證中心中均如此。在一項回顧性隊列研究中，RaDaR在61.06%的案例中優先考慮了最終診斷，這對應於潛在的提前時間為1.87個月和50.18%的中心內間隔。在一項隨機醫生協助試驗中，RaDaR的協助使醫生的罕見疾病診斷準確性提高了21.44個百分點，相較於僅依賴互聯網搜索。合成數據的消融實驗表明，基於表型的敘事為長尾罕見疾病提供了有用的訓練信號，在測試的數據範圍內呈現單調增長的趨勢。總之，RaDaR及其開發和驗證框架提供了一個可部署的罕見疾病推理模型和一個可重複的診斷AI開發框架，適用於數據稀缺的情況。

docs.title: RetiSEM: Generalising Causal Models for Fragmented Biomedical Data
docs.text:
2606.24488v1 by Inam Ullah, Imran Razzak, Shoaib Jameel

Learning causal models from fragmented biomedical data is challenging because clinical, molecular, and imaging variables are often incomplete or not jointly observed. We propose RetiSEM, a domain-constrained structural equation modelling (SEM) framework for causal graph recovery and mediation analysis under limited multimodal resources. This proposed work organises variables into biologically informed blocks, applies forbidden-edge constraints, and decomposes pathway-level effects into TE, NDE, and NIE components. We evaluate RetiSEM across ten synthetic benchmark scenarios that vary in dimensionality, nonlinearity, causal depth, and pathway structure, together with a fragmented real-world setting that combines NHANES clinical variables with externally derived retinal representations. This approach achieves lower structural error and higher causal accuracy than unconstrained baselines across the synthetic benchmarks. In the real-data analysis, retinal variables behave mainly as downstream biomarker-like indicators, with smaller but detectable indirect effects. These findings support our strategy as an interpretable framework for testing structured causal hypotheses in limited-resource biomedical AI. The code and resources for this work are publicly available at: https://github.com/Inamullah-Colab/ReitSEM.

摘要：從碎片化的生物醫學數據中學習因果模型是具有挑戰性的，因為臨床、分子和影像變數往往是不完整的或未共同觀察到的。我們提出了RetiSEM，一種受限於領域的結構方程模型（SEM）框架，用於在有限的多模態資源下進行因果圖恢復和中介分析。這項提議的工作將變數組織成生物學上有意義的區塊，應用禁止邊約束，並將路徑層級效應分解為TE、NDE和NIE組件。我們在十個合成基準場景中評估RetiSEM，這些場景在維度、非線性、因果深度和路徑結構上各不相同，並結合了一個碎片化的真實世界設置，該設置將NHANES臨床變數與外部推導的視網膜表示結合在一起。這種方法在合成基準中實現了比不受限基準更低的結構誤差和更高的因果準確性。在真實數據分析中，視網膜變數主要作為下游生物標誌物類似的指標，具有較小但可檢測的間接效應。這些發現支持我們的策略作為一個可解釋的框架，用於在資源有限的生物醫學AI中測試結構化的因果假設。這項工作的代碼和資源可在以下網址公開獲得：https://github.com/Inamullah-Colab/ReitSEM。

docs.title: Quantifying Explainable AI-introduced signal noise on ECG data with Spectral Entropy
docs.text:
2606.24974v1 by David A. Kelly, Nathan Blake

Explainability techniques are used to assess the output of various deep learning models. This is especially true in healthcare, where models need to be trusted and decisions justified. Explainability (XAI) tools use heuristics which often add signal noise to the explanation "core". It is not always obvious what is signal from the model and what is noise from the XAI. We propose the use of spectral entropy as a measure of noise in XAI output. We demonstrate its usefulness in the context of classifying arrhythmias in an ECG dataset with different post hoc explainability techniques.

摘要：解釋性技術用於評估各種深度學習模型的輸出。這在醫療保健領域尤為重要，因為模型需要被信任，並且決策需要有理據。解釋性（XAI）工具使用的啟發式方法常常會為解釋的“核心”添加信號噪聲。從模型中分辨出信號和來自XAI的噪聲並不總是明顯。我們提出使用光譜熵作為XAI輸出中噪聲的衡量標準。我們展示了它在使用不同的事後解釋技術對ECG數據集中的心律不整進行分類時的實用性。

docs.title: Transformation Behavior of Images in Latent Space
docs.text:
2606.24430v1 by Christian Zöllner, Mozzam Motiwala, Aysel Ahadova, Gerrit Anders, Robert Hüneburg, Jacob Nattermann, Matthias Kloor

Training of neural networks for histopathology classification tasks typically relies on data encoding into latent space, which reduces complexity and improves performance. There are several encoder networks available, either pretrained on general image datasets such as ImageNET, or specifically on histopathological images. Training of encoder networks should be adapted to downstream tasks, allowing encoding of biologic/diagnostic content while rendering networks invariant to label-irrelevant transformations. This paper investigates the effect of classical image transformation on the latent space, using networks provided by Lunit Inc. and Bioptimus, both focusing on pathological images, and by Meta Research Team. We assess variance of embeddings resulting from standard data transformations by comparing original and transformed image embeddings and by contrasting them with random, unrelated embeddings, using image tiles from hematoxylin/eosin-stained sections available in a colorectal tissue dataset and the publicly accessible TCGA dataset. Our findings show that embeddings of original and transformed images are closer to each other than to random embeddings, indicating robustness to transformations. However, they are not fully invariant, revealing that the encoder networks do not completely neutralize transformation effects in latent space, explaining why transformation-mediated augmentation of datasets can improve performance. Significant differences were observed between general and histopathology-specific encoder networks.

摘要：訓練神經網絡以進行組織病理學分類任務通常依賴於將數據編碼到潛在空間，這樣可以減少複雜性並提高性能。可用的編碼器網絡有幾種，無論是預訓練於一般圖像數據集（如ImageNET），還是專門針對組織病理圖像進行訓練。編碼器網絡的訓練應該根據下游任務進行調整，允許編碼生物/診斷內容，同時使網絡對與標籤無關的變換保持不變。

本文研究了經典圖像變換對潛在空間的影響，使用了Lunit Inc.和Bioptimus提供的網絡，這兩者都專注於病理圖像，以及Meta研究團隊。我們通過比較原始和變換後的圖像嵌入，並將其與隨機無關的嵌入進行對比，來評估標準數據變換所產生的嵌入變異，使用來自結腸直腸組織數據集和公開可獲得的TCGA數據集的蘇木精/伊紅染色切片的圖像塊。

我們的研究結果顯示，原始圖像和變換後圖像的嵌入彼此之間比與隨機嵌入更接近，這表明對變換的穩健性。然而，它們並不是完全不變的，這揭示了編碼器網絡並未完全中和潛在空間中的變換效應，這解釋了為什麼通過變換介導的數據集增強可以提高性能。在一般編碼器網絡和專門針對組織病理學的編碼器網絡之間觀察到了顯著差異。

docs.title: Female-RHINO: A Real-Time Scanner-Integrated Framework for Automated Quantitative Uterine MRI Analysis and Structured Reporting
docs.text:
2606.24390v1 by Deepak Bhatia, Saad Ahmad, Smiti Tripathy, Maria Camila Bustos Vivas, Lieselotte Kratzsch, Anika Knupfer, Jordina Aviles Verdera, Susanne Schulz-Heise, Matthias May, Jana Hutter

Standardized assessment of uterine MRI remains challenging due to anatomical variability, observer dependence, and the lack of workflow-integrated automated analysis tools. This work presents Female-RHINO: (R)eproductive (H)ealth (I)maging A(N)alysis T(O)ol, a real-time AI-assisted framework for automated quantitative uterine MRI analysis and structured reporting during image acquisition. We present an end-to-end system that integrates inline communication with the MRI scanner and deep learning-based analysis to derive quantitative uterine biomarkers from sagittal T2-weighted pelvic MRI. The framework combines segmentation and anatomical landmark detection models trained and evaluated on more than 500 multi-center datasets spanning diverse protocols, vendors, and patient populations. It performs volumetry, detects and quantifies common incidental findings such as fibroids and Nabothian cysts, and extracts six anatomical landmarks for biometric assessment. Results are compiled into a structured clinician-oriented report with integrated visualizations, without manual interaction. Evaluation on independent retrospective and prospective cohorts demonstrated robust performance across varying acquisition settings. Mean Dice similarity coefficients were 0.82 for the uterus and 0.80 for fibroids, with lower but consistent agreement for Nabothian cysts. Landmark detection achieved a mean radial error of 3.7 mm. End-to-end processing was completed in under 70 seconds, enabling availability of results during the ongoing scan. Prospective deployment yielded immediate, standardized, and reproducible analyses supported by inter-observer agreement. The proposed system enables real-time scanner-integrated AI for automated uterine MRI analysis and reporting, with potential to improve standardization, efficiency, and clinical workflow in pelvic imaging.

摘要：標準化的子宮MRI評估仍然面臨挑戰，這是由於解剖變異性、觀察者依賴性以及缺乏工作流程整合的自動分析工具。這項工作展示了Female-RHINO: (R)eproductive (H)ealth (I)maging A(N)alysis T(O)ol，一個實時的AI輔助框架，用於自動定量子宮MRI分析和在影像獲取過程中的結構化報告。我們展示了一個端到端系統，該系統整合了與MRI掃描儀的即時通信和基於深度學習的分析，以從矢狀面T2加權骨盆MRI中推導定量子宮生物標記。該框架結合了在500多個多中心數據集上訓練和評估的分割和解剖標誌檢測模型，涵蓋了多種協議、供應商和患者群體。它進行體積測量，檢測並量化常見的偶然發現，如纖維瘤和納博氏囊腫，並提取六個解剖標誌以進行生物識別評估。結果被編纂成一份結構化的臨床醫生導向報告，並整合了可視化，無需手動互動。在獨立的回顧性和前瞻性隊列上的評估顯示，在不同的獲取設置下表現出穩健的性能。子宮的平均Dice相似性係數為0.82，纖維瘤為0.80，納博氏囊腫的協議較低但一致。標誌檢測的平均徑向誤差為3.7毫米。端到端處理在70秒內完成，使得在進行掃描時即可獲得結果。前瞻性部署產生了即時、標準化和可重複的分析，並得到了觀察者之間的一致性支持。所提出的系統實現了實時掃描儀整合的AI，用於自動子宮MRI分析和報告，具有改善骨盆影像標準化、效率和臨床工作流程的潛力。

docs.title: Enhancing Clinician Decision-Making via Uncertainty-Aware Multi-Expert Fusion for Stroke Rehabilitation
docs.text:
2606.24960v1 by Tamim Ahmed, Thanassis Rikakis

Tailoring stroke rehabilitation requires assessing how movements are organized, not merely if they succeed. Currently, this assessment is a rate-limiting bottleneck. Instruments like the Action Research Arm Test (ARAT) compress rich behavioral observations into single ordinal endpoints, discarding the movement-quality details that distinguish recovery from compensation. Automated alternatives typically chase accuracy on noisy, single-observer labels to output opaque scores - a technology-centric approach that rarely reaches clinical practice. To address this, we present xAARA: an engine designed to augment rather than replace clinical judgment. From multi-view video, xAARA returns ARAT assessments with calibrated uncertainty and explanations across task, movement-phase, and movement-quality levels. Treating clinical scoring as an ill-posed inference problem, xAARA composes 692 calibrated multimodal models via a Dynamic Bayesian Network with entropy-based gating. It qualifies results against clinical validity rules and defers low-confidence cases. In 105 stroke survivors (788 exercises), xAARA achieved 94.2% task accuracy (Cohen's kappa=0.934) and 81.3% movement-phase accuracy (kappa=0.727), reducing predictive uncertainty by 96.1% compared to single-clinician scoring. For subjective cases, it matched at least one rater 100% of the time and never returned out-of-range scores. Four independent clinicians validated the assessments and indicated willingness to adopt the system. We argue that principled uncertainty quantification and clinician-aligned explainability are the critical bridges moving automated assessment from technical demonstration to a deployable clinical tool.

摘要：量身定制的中風康復需要評估動作的組織方式，而不僅僅是評估它們是否成功。目前，這種評估是一個限制性瓶頸。像行動研究手臂測試（ARAT）這樣的工具將豐富的行為觀察壓縮為單一的序數端點，捨棄了區分恢復與補償的運動質量細節。自動化的替代方案通常追求在嘈雜的單一觀察者標籤上獲得準確性，以輸出不透明的分數——這是一種以技術為中心的方法，鮮少進入臨床實踐。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了xAARA：一個旨在增強而非取代臨床判斷的引擎。從多視角視頻中，xAARA返回帶有校準不確定性和解釋的ARAT評估，涵蓋任務、運動階段和運動質量等級別。將臨床評分視為一個不良定義的推斷問題，xAARA通過一個基於熵的動態貝葉斯網絡組合692個校準的多模態模型。它根據臨床有效性規則對結果進行質量檢查，並推遲低信心的案例。在105名中風倖存者（788次練習）中，xAARA達到了94.2%的任務準確率（Cohen's kappa=0.934）和81.3%的運動階段準確率（kappa=0.727），與單一臨床醫生評分相比，預測不確定性降低了96.1%。對於主觀案例，它100%與至少一位評分者匹配，並且從未返回超出範圍的分數。四位獨立臨床醫生驗證了這些評估並表示願意採用該系統。我們認為，原則性的不確定性量化和與臨床醫生對齊的可解釋性是將自動化評估從技術演示轉變為可部署臨床工具的關鍵橋樑。

docs.title: Prob-BBDM: a Probabilistic Brownian Bridge Diffusion Model for MRI sequence image-to-image translation
docs.text:
2606.24313v1 by Martin Valls, Pascal Bourdon, Christine Fernandez-Maloigne, Guillaume Herpe, David Helbert

AI-driven image-to-image synthesis is rapidly advancing, with growing applications in medical imaging. Multi-modal image analysis plays a crucial role in optimizing examination quality, yet acquiring multiple imaging modalities in clinical settings remains resource-intensive and time-consuming, especially for 3D imaging. To address this challenge, we propose a novel image-to-image translation model based on Brownian Bridge Diffusion Models (BBDM), which synthesizes magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) sequences from 2D axial slices. Our approach integrates a variational encoder-guided diffusion mechanism, leveraging probabilistic image distributions to enhance synthesis quality. Evaluated on the BraTS 2021 dataset, our Probabilistic-BBDM (Prob-BBDM) achieves superior performance across multiple translation tasks, reaching up to 88.46% SSIM and 26.09 dB PSNR, with consistent improvements over baselines. Notably, our diffusion process requires only 4 steps, making it computationally efficient while maintaining high-quality synthesis. To further validate generalizability, we test Prob-BBDM on an external third-party dataset, demonstrating consistent performance across domains. Additionally, we assess the clinical utility of the synthesized slices by using them as input to a pre-trained segmentation model. Tumor segmentation yields a Dice score of 88.71% and an HD95 of 3.49 mm, confirming that the synthesized slices preserve critical diagnostic information. These results highlight the potential of Prob-BBDM for high-quality, efficient, and generalizable MRI synthesis, offering a promising step toward improved medical image translation.

摘要：AI 驅動的影像到影像合成正在迅速發展，並在醫學影像中有著日益增長的應用。多模態影像分析在優化檢查質量中扮演著至關重要的角色，但在臨床環境中獲取多種影像模態仍然資源密集且耗時，特別是對於 3D 影像。為了解決這一挑戰，我們提出了一種基於布朗橋擴散模型 (BBDM) 的新型影像到影像翻譯模型，該模型從 2D 軸向切片合成磁共振影像 (MRI) 序列。我們的方法整合了一種變分編碼器引導的擴散機制，利用概率影像分佈來增強合成質量。在 BraTS 2021 數據集上的評估中，我們的概率-BBDM (Prob-BBDM) 在多個翻譯任務中達到了優越的性能，SSIM 高達 88.46% 和 PSNR 為 26.09 dB，並在基準線上持續改進。值得注意的是，我們的擴散過程僅需 4 步，這使其在計算上高效，同時保持高質量的合成。為了進一步驗證其通用性，我們在外部第三方數據集上測試了 Prob-BBDM，顯示出跨領域的一致性能。此外，我們通過將合成切片作為輸入到預訓練的分割模型來評估其臨床實用性。腫瘤分割的 Dice 分數為 88.71%，HD95 為 3.49 mm，確認合成切片保留了關鍵的診斷信息。這些結果突顯了 Prob-BBDM 在高質量、高效能和通用性 MRI 合成方面的潛力，為改善醫學影像翻譯提供了一個有前景的步驟。

docs.title: Ensemble Feature Selection and Harris Hawks Optimization for Explainable Mental Health Risk Prediction in Female Sex Workers
docs.text:
2606.24047v1 by Ahnaf Atef Choudhury, Md. Parvej Hoque Palash, Shahriar Siddique Ayon, Ramkrishna Saha, Abdullah Al Mamun

One of the significant mental health issues affecting female sex workers (FSWs) is mental disorders, especially depression. Exposure to violence, stigma, and economic hardship further increases their psychological risk. Current machine learning (ML) models are typically ineffective at capturing the high-dimensional and complex risk patterns that exist in this marginalized group. This paper suggests a hybrid predictive model that merges an ensemble feature selection strategy using ANOVA and mutual information and Harris Hawks optimization-tuned logistic regression and represents a new application of swarm intelligence to predict mental health in vulnerable groups. The explainable AI (XAI) methods can be used to understand the factors of trauma associated with model predictions. When applied to a group of 3,005 FSWs, it can be seen that the proposed model is more effective than traditional classifiers, with an accuracy of 95.78%, an F1 score of 95.77%, and an AUC of 0.96, and identifying post-traumatic stress, client-related violence, and occupational factors as major contributors to depression. This work bridges the gaps between conventional and ML approaches to develop an XAI tool that enables vulnerable groups to receive early assistance, evidence-based targeted psychosocial care, and health planning.

摘要：女性性工作者（FSWs）所面臨的一個重要心理健康問題是心理障礙，特別是憂鬱症。暴力、污名化和經濟困難的影響進一步增加了她們的心理風險。當前的機器學習（ML）模型通常無法有效捕捉這個邊緣化群體中存在的高維度和複雜風險模式。本文提出了一種混合預測模型，結合了使用ANOVA和互信息的集成特徵選擇策略以及經哈里斯獵鷹優化調整的邏輯回歸，並代表了群體智慧在預測脆弱群體心理健康方面的新應用。可解釋的人工智慧（XAI）方法可以用來理解與模型預測相關的創傷因素。當應用於3,005名FSWs時，可以看出所提出的模型比傳統分類器更有效，準確率為95.78%，F1分數為95.77%，AUC為0.96，並將創傷後壓力、與客戶相關的暴力和職業因素識別為憂鬱症的主要貢獻因素。這項工作填補了傳統方法與機器學習方法之間的空白，開發出一種XAI工具，使脆弱群體能夠獲得早期援助、基於證據的針對性心理社會護理和健康規劃。

docs.title: Can Language Model Agents be Helpful Circuit Explainers in Mechanistic Interpretability?
docs.text:
2606.24026v1 by Ayan Antik Khan, Harsh Kohli, Yuekun Yao, Huan Sun, Ziyu Yao

Mechanistic interpretability has made substantial progress in automatically localizing circuits, but explaining what localized components do remains labor-intensive and difficult to standardize. In this work, we study whether language model (LM) agents can assist with this explanation problem once a circuit has already been identified. We introduce AgenticInterpBench, a benchmark for circuit explanation built from 84 semi-synthetic transformer circuits with 163 component-level annotations. We propose HyVE (Hypothesize, Validate, Explain), an agentic explainer that analyzes each component through an iterative loop of observation, hypothesis generation, and causal validation, eventually producing a component-level explanation and a circuit-level task description. Across four LM backbones, HyVE recovers useful component- and task-level explanations, but no backbone is uniformly best. Our analysis shows that strong backbones usually form observation-grounded hypotheses, while failures more often arise later in the validation loop, through incomplete validation plans, code execution errors, or unresolved hypotheses. A case study on an arithmetic circuit in Llama-3-8B shows that the same formulation can extend beyond semi-synthetic benchmarks to naturally trained models. Overall, LM agents are promising circuit explainers, but reliable validation remains the key obstacle.

摘要：機械可解釋性在自動定位電路方面取得了顯著進展，但解釋已定位組件的功能仍然需要大量人力，且難以標準化。在本研究中，我們探討語言模型（LM）代理是否能在電路已被識別後協助解決這一解釋問題。我們介紹了AgenticInterpBench，這是一個基於84個半合成Transformer電路和163個組件級註釋構建的電路解釋基準。我們提出了HyVE（假設、驗證、解釋），這是一種代理解釋器，通過觀察、假設生成和因果驗證的迭代循環分析每個組件，最終產生組件級解釋和電路級任務描述。在四個LM骨幹中，HyVE恢復了有用的組件和任務級解釋，但沒有任何骨幹在所有方面都表現最佳。我們的分析顯示，強大的骨幹通常形成基於觀察的假設，而失敗則更常發生在驗證循環的後期，原因包括不完整的驗證計劃、代碼執行錯誤或未解決的假設。對Llama-3-8B中一個算術電路的案例研究顯示，同樣的公式可以超越半合成基準，擴展到自然訓練的模型。總體而言，LM代理是有前景的電路解釋者，但可靠的驗證仍然是主要障礙。

docs.title: Reinforcement Learning Towards Broadly and Persistently Beneficial Models
docs.text:
2606.24014v1 by Akshay V. Jagadeesh, Rahul K. Arora, Khaled Saab, Ali Malik, Mikhail Trofimov, Foivos Tsimpourlas, Johannes Heidecke, Karan Singhal

As AI systems are deployed across increasingly diverse and high-stakes settings, model alignment must generalize beyond the tasks and domains seen during training. This is especially important for reinforcement learning (RL), which can introduce unexpected misalignment through reward hacking, deception, or other unintended strategies. We study whether RL on beneficial behavior, instantiated in realistic domains, can produce broad and persistent alignment generalization beyond the training distribution.
