Experiments on ISIC2018, PH2, and HAM10000 demonstrate that MLFFM-SegDiff outperforms representative methods including DermoSegDiff, U-Net, and SwinUNETR across Accuracy, F1-score, Jaccard index, Recall, and Dice. In particular, it achieves an average Jaccard index of 0.8546 and Dice coefficient of 0.9207. These results validate the effectiveness of the proposed multi-level feature fusion strategy for improving lesion segmentation performance. The code will be released at https://github.com/Qacket/MLFFM-SegDiff.git after publication.

摘要：皮膚病變分割是電腦輔助皮膚科診斷中的一項關鍵任務，其準確性直接影響後續分析和疾病分類。然而，皮膚鏡圖像因邊界模糊、對比度低、形狀變化大以及毛髮和陰影等伪影而具有挑戰性。最近，擴散模型因其逐步去噪和分佈建模能力在醫學影像分割中顯示出強大的性能。然而，現有的基於擴散的方法仍然受到有限的跨層特徵互動和邊界細節恢復不足的困擾。為了解決這些問題，我們提出了MLFFM-SegDiff，一種用於皮膚病變分割的多層特徵融合擴散模型。該方法基於擴散框架，引入了雙路徑U-Net編碼器、多層特徵融合模塊（MLFFM）和邊界敏感損失函數。雙路徑編碼器增強了噪聲掩碼特徵與皮膚鏡圖像特徵之間的互動。MLFFM通過注意力、尺度對齊和自適應跨層融合來改善跳躍連接。這些設計使解碼器能夠共同利用淺層邊界線索和深層語義表示，提高了掩碼重建質量。在ISIC2018、PH2和HAM10000上的實驗表明，MLFFM-SegDiff在準確性、F1分數、Jaccard指數、召回率和Dice上超越了包括DermoSegDiff、U-Net和SwinUNETR在內的代表性方法。特別是，它達到了平均Jaccard指數0.8546和Dice係數0.9207。這些結果驗證了所提出的多層特徵融合策略在提高病變分割性能方面的有效性。代碼將在發表後於https://github.com/Qacket/MLFFM-SegDiff.git釋出。

docs.title: Automated brain tumor detection in MRI images using CNN and ResNet architectures
docs.text:
2606.27405v1 by Annapurna V K, Asha N, K Paramesha, Shabana Sultana, Kirankumar Humse

Deep learning has shown significant potential in medical image analysis, particularly for disease detection using MRI scans. Accurate and early diagnosis of brain tumors remains challenging due to the complexity of brain structures and reliance on manual interpretation. This work presents an automated deep learning-based approach for brain tumor detection from MRI images using Convolutional Neural Networks and Residual Networks. Transfer learning is applied with two pretrained architectures, ResNet18 and ResNet50, to classify MRI scans into tumor and non-tumor categories. Experiments are conducted on a dataset of 3,929 brain MRI images, evaluating the impact of model depth and fine-tuning strategies. The results show that ResNet18 achieves a higher accuracy of 97% compared to 96% for ResNet50, demonstrating better generalization on limited medical data. The proposed framework enables fast, accurate, and cost-effective brain tumor detection, supporting early diagnosis and clinical decision-making.

摘要：深度學習在醫學影像分析中顯示出顯著的潛力，特別是在使用 MRI 掃描進行疾病檢測方面。由於腦部結構的複雜性和對手動解釋的依賴，準確且早期的腦腫瘤診斷仍然具有挑戰性。這項工作提出了一種基於深度學習的自動化方法，利用卷積神經網絡和殘差網絡從 MRI 圖像中檢測腦腫瘤。使用兩種預訓練架構 ResNet18 和 ResNet50 應用遷移學習，將 MRI 掃描分類為腫瘤和非腫瘤類別。對 3,929 張腦部 MRI 圖像的數據集進行了實驗，評估模型深度和微調策略的影響。結果顯示，ResNet18 的準確率達到 97%，而 ResNet50 為 96%，在有限的醫療數據上顯示出更好的泛化能力。所提出的框架實現了快速、準確且具成本效益的腦腫瘤檢測，支持早期診斷和臨床決策。

docs.title: What the LLM Should Not Say: Boundary-Aware Context Grounding for A Seven-Channel EEG Agent
docs.text:
2606.26519v2 by Zhiyuan Xu, Yueqing Dai, Junling Li, Junwen Luo

Large language models (LLMs) can make scientific software easier to use. However, a general model does not automatically know which measurements a particular sensor can support, which algorithms are implemented in the current software, or which conclusions are justified by a computed result. These distinctions are especially important for low-channel electroencephalography (EEG), where sparse spatial coverage and variable signal quality make plausible but unsupported interpretations easy to produce. We present NeuraDock Agent, an open-source architecture that separates a deterministic local EEG engine from a hardware-aware language layer. The numerical engine parses recordings, performs quality control, executes reviewed spectral workflows, and writes machine-readable artifacts. The LLM receives only a compact, allowlisted summary and a versioned context pack. The context describes the seven-channel hardware, reviewed workflows, result fields, implementation boundaries, scientific limits, and reference cases. Raw EEG and dense per-sample arrays remain local We evaluate the system at three levels. First, 12 recordings produced identical structured results over ten numerical repetitions, and a complete Rest/Task run produced identical result, report, and figure hashes over three repetitions. Second, request-capture and failure-injection experiments confirmed the tested data boundary and preservation of local artifacts under HTTP, malformed-output, and connection failures. Third, a boundary-awareness benchmark tested 36 ordinary and adversarial questions under four context ablations and two LLMs, yielding 288 outputs.These results support hardware- and implementation-aware grounding as a practical mechanism for calibrating what an EEG agent accepts, qualifies, or refuses; they do not establish clinical validity or a validated absolute cognitive-load index.

摘要：大型語言模型（LLMs）可以使科學軟體更易於使用。然而，一個通用模型並不自動知道特定傳感器可以支持哪些測量，當前軟體中實現了哪些算法，或是計算結果所支持的結論。這些區別對於低通道腦電圖（EEG）尤其重要，因為稀疏的空間覆蓋和變化的信號質量使得可信但未經支持的解釋容易產生。我們提出了 NeuraDock Agent，一種開源架構，將確定性本地 EEG 引擎與硬體感知語言層分開。數值引擎解析錄音，執行質量控制，執行審核過的頻譜工作流程，並寫入機器可讀的文檔。LLM 只接收一個緊湊的、經允許的摘要和一個版本化的上下文包。上下文描述了七通道硬體、審核過的工作流程、結果字段、實施邊界、科學限制和參考案例。原始 EEG 和密集的每樣本數組保持在本地。

我們在三個層面上評估系統。首先，12 個錄音在十次數值重複中產生了相同的結構化結果，完整的休息/任務運行在三次重複中產生了相同的結果、報告和圖形哈希。其次，請求捕獲和故障注入實驗確認了測試數據邊界和在 HTTP、格式錯誤輸出和連接故障下本地文檔的保護。第三，邊界感知基準在四個上下文消融和兩個 LLM 下測試了 36 個普通和對抗性問題，產生了 288 個輸出。這些結果支持硬體和實施感知的基礎作為校準 EEG 代理接受、確認或拒絕的實用機制；它們並未建立臨床有效性或經驗證的絕對認知負荷指數。

docs.title: Clinical Harness for Governable Medical AI Skill Ecosystems
docs.text:
2606.26494v2 by Tianhan Xu, Lei Bao, Zhe Hu, Tian Shen, Yongxiang Wang

Medical AI remains organized around isolated models, whereas care requires accountable capabilities that persist across time. We define clinical AI skills and propose the Clinical Harness, a runtime governance architecture that registers, orchestrates, constrains and monitors them. Using osteoporosis as an exemplar, we show how knowledge-driven, data-driven and physics-enhanced skills can support lifecycle care and provide a governed substrate for future medical agents.

摘要：醫療人工智慧仍然圍繞著孤立的模型組織，而護理需要持續存在的可負責能力。我們定義了臨床人工智慧技能，並提出了臨床治理架構，這是一種運行時治理架構，用於註冊、協調、約束和監控這些技能。以骨質疏鬆症為例，我們展示了知識驅動、數據驅動和物理增強的技能如何支持生命周期護理，並為未來的醫療代理提供一個受治理的基礎。

docs.title: MKG-RAG-Bench: Benchmarking Retrieval in Multimodal Knowledge Graph-Augmented Generation
docs.text:
2606.26458v1 by Xiaochen Wang, Bao Hoang, Han Liu, Ting Wang, Fenglong Ma

Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) over knowledge graphs has emerged as a promising approach for grounding large language models, yet existing benchmarks largely overlook the challenges of retrieval in multimodal knowledge graph RAG (MKG-RAG). In practice, retrieval is a critical bottleneck: multimodal knowledge is heterogeneous, difficult to align across modalities, and often poorly served by retrievers designed for unstructured corpora. To address this gap, we introduce MKG-RAG-Bench, a cross-domain benchmark explicitly designed to evaluate retrieval in MKG-RAG. MKG-RAG-Bench is constructed from two multimodal knowledge graphs spanning general and medical domains, and includes carefully aligned question-answering datasets that support controlled evaluation of both retrieval and downstream generation. The benchmark is built using an LLM-based curation pipeline that filters low-utility knowledge, generates structurally grounded queries with exact supervision, and systematically covers diverse modality configurations. Through extensive experiments across representative retriever families and modality settings, we show that effective multimodal retrieval remains challenging yet crucial for end-to-end MKG-RAG performance, and that retrieval quality strongly determines generation outcomes. By isolating retrieval as a first-class evaluation target, MKG-RAG-Bench provides a principled foundation for diagnosing current limitations and advancing multimodal knowledge graph RAG systems.

摘要：檢索增強生成（RAG）在知識圖譜上的應用已成為為大型語言模型提供基礎的有前景方法，然而現有的基準在很大程度上忽視了多模態知識圖譜 RAG（MKG-RAG）中檢索的挑戰。在實踐中，檢索是一個關鍵瓶頸：多模態知識是異質的，難以在不同模態之間對齊，且通常不適合為設計用於非結構化語料庫的檢索器所服務。為了解決這一問題，我們介紹了 MKG-RAG-Bench，一個明確設計用於評估 MKG-RAG 中檢索的跨領域基準。MKG-RAG-Bench 是由兩個涵蓋一般和醫療領域的多模態知識圖譜構建而成，並包括精心對齊的問答數據集，以支持對檢索和下游生成的控制評估。該基準是使用基於 LLM 的策展管道構建的，該管道過濾低效用知識，生成具有精確監督的結構化查詢，並系統地涵蓋多樣的模態配置。通過在代表性檢索器家族和模態設置中進行廣泛實驗，我們顯示出有效的多模態檢索仍然具有挑戰性，但對於端到端的 MKG-RAG 性能至關重要，且檢索質量強烈影響生成結果。通過將檢索孤立為一個一級評估目標，MKG-RAG-Bench 為診斷當前限制和推進多模態知識圖譜 RAG 系統提供了一個原則性的基礎。

docs.title: Parametric Generalized Adaptive Moment Features (PG-AMF) for Bearing Fault Diagnosis and Machine Health Monitoring
docs.text:
2606.26317v1 by Rajeev Kumar

Accurate fault diagnosis of rolling element bearings in rotating machinery is considered essential for ensuring industrial safety and enabling predictive maintenance. Conventional statistical feature-based methods rely on predefined descriptors, whose diagnostic sensitivity is constrained by fixed configurations and limited adaptability across varying fault conditions. Although deep learning approaches offer strong representational capacity, their effectiveness is often restricted by high data requirements and reduced interpretability. In this work, a parametric adaptive feature extraction framework is proposed, in which feature characteristics are learned directly from data rather than being manually specified. Multiple complementary representations are extracted from vibration signals, including absolute features capturing signal energy distribution, signed moment features reflecting waveform asymmetry, and AC-coupled moment features emphasizing dynamic fluctuations, while interactions between multiple sensor channels are modeled through a structured fusion mechanism to enhance fault representation. The proposed approach is evaluated on a benchmark gearbox bearing dataset comprising five health conditions, including normal operation and multiple fault types. Improved classification performance is observed compared to conventional methods, with consistent results under cross-validation, indicating strong generalization capability. Additionally, enhanced feature separability is demonstrated through clearer clustering patterns in low-dimensional projections. The learned representations effectively capture a wide range of signal characteristics, supporting both improved diagnostic performance and practical applicability in industrial monitoring systems.

摘要：準確的滾動元件軸承故障診斷在旋轉機械中被認為對於確保工業安全和實現預測性維護至關重要。傳統的基於統計特徵的方法依賴於預定義的描述符，其診斷靈敏度受到固定配置和在不同故障條件下有限適應性的限制。雖然深度學習方法提供了強大的表徵能力，但其有效性往往受到高數據需求和解釋性降低的限制。在這項工作中，提出了一個參數自適應特徵提取框架，其中特徵特性是直接從數據中學習的，而不是手動指定的。從振動信號中提取多個互補的表徵，包括捕捉信號能量分佈的絕對特徵、反映波形不對稱的有符號矩特徵，以及強調動態波動的交流耦合矩特徵，同時通過結構化融合機制建模多個傳感器通道之間的交互，以增強故障表徵。所提出的方法在一個基準齒輪箱軸承數據集上進行評估，該數據集包含五種健康狀態，包括正常運行和多種故障類型。與傳統方法相比，觀察到改進的分類性能，在交叉驗證下結果一致，顯示出強大的泛化能力。此外，通過在低維投影中更清晰的聚類模式，顯示出增強的特徵可分離性。學習到的表徵有效捕捉了廣泛的信號特徵，支持了改進的診斷性能和在工業監控系統中的實際應用。

docs.title: Governing Actions, Not Agents: Institutional Attestation as a Governance Model for Autonomous AI Systems
docs.text:
2606.26298v1 by Jakob Salfeld-Nebgen

Autonomous AI agents may begin to perform consequential, irreversible actions such as clinical prescribing and production software deployment. This paper observes that human institutions have governed powerful autonomous actors not by monitoring their reasoning but by requiring independently attested evidence at the point of consequential action. We formalise this institutional pattern as a computational governance model for AI agent systems. Under the proposed model, an agent retains full autonomy over planning and reasoning but holds no execution authority over designated high-risk actions. Execution is conditional on preconditions that are each independently attested by a separate authoritative source, cryptographically bound to a declared intent, and evaluated by a deterministic policy. Decisions are recorded in a tamper-evident log amenable to independent re-verification. We present a proof-of-concept implementation and illustrate the model with examples from software deployment and clinical prescribing.

摘要：自主 AI 代理可能開始執行有重大影響且不可逆的行動，例如臨床處方和生產軟體部署。本文觀察到，人類機構並不是通過監控其推理來管理強大的自主行為者，而是通過在有重大行動的時刻要求獨立證實的證據。我們將這種制度模式正式化為 AI 代理系統的計算治理模型。在所提出的模型下，代理在計劃和推理方面保持完全自主，但對指定的高風險行動沒有執行權限。執行條件取決於每個由獨立權威來源獨立證實的前提條件，這些前提條件以加密方式綁定於聲明的意圖，並由確定性政策進行評估。決策記錄在一個可防篡改的日誌中，便於獨立重新驗證。我們展示了一個概念驗證實現，並用軟體部署和臨床處方的例子來說明該模型。

docs.title: Knowledge-augmented Agentic AI for Mental Health Medication Information Seeking
docs.text:
2606.26205v1 by Huizi Yu, Jian Liu, Wenkong Wang, Lingyao Li, Jiayan Zhou, Zhaoqian Xue, Xiang Li, Xinxin Lin, Zhiying Liang, Zhuoru Wu, Siyuan Ma, Xin Ma, Lizhou Fan

Patients increasingly seek medication information online, yet safety knowledge for psychiatric drugs is split between regulatory adverse-event records, which are authoritative but abstract, and patient narratives, which are experience-near but unvalidated. Integrating them without conflating evidence and anecdote is especially consequential in psychiatry, where poorly contextualised information can amplify fear, nocebo responses, and non-adherence. Here we develop a provenance-aware, knowledge-graph-based multi-agent framework unifying 466,525 Reddit posts, 60,782 WebMD reviews, and twenty years of U.S. FDA Adverse Event Reporting System records for nine antidepressants. A large-language-model entity-recognition pipeline benchmarked against physician annotations reached highest F1 scores of 0.969 for medications and 0.973 for conditions. The two community platforms were far more concordant with each other (overlap up to a Jaccard similarity of 0.905) than with regulatory reports, indicating that patient-generated data form a partly independent safety signal. For sertraline, many adverse events appeared in community sources hundreds of days before the corresponding FDA date. A Neo4j knowledge graph grounded in ATC-N, ICD-10, and MedDRA vocabularies preserves provenance, keeping every claim traceable and regulatory facts distinct from patient experience. These results establish source-aware integration as a route to more auditable psychiatric medication information, with usefulness and patient benefit to be tested prospectively.

摘要：患者越來越多地在網上尋求藥物資訊，但精神科藥物的安全知識卻分為兩部分：一方面是權威但抽象的監管不良事件記錄，另一方面是接近經驗但未經驗證的患者敘述。在精神科中，將這兩者整合而不混淆證據與轶事尤其重要，因為缺乏情境的資訊可能會加劇恐懼、負面反應和不遵從治療。在這裡，我們開發了一個基於知識圖譜的多代理框架，整合了466,525條Reddit帖子、60,782條WebMD評論，以及美國FDA不良事件報告系統的二十年記錄，針對九種抗抑鬱藥物。一個基於大型語言模型的實體識別管道，與醫生標註進行基準測試，對藥物和病症的F1分數分別達到0.969和0.973。這兩個社區平台之間的相符程度遠高於與監管報告的相符程度（重疊達到0.905的Jaccard相似度），這表明患者生成的數據形成了部分獨立的安全信號。對於舍曲林，許多不良事件在社區來源中出現的時間早於相應的FDA日期數百天。一個基於ATC-N、ICD-10和MedDRA詞彙的Neo4j知識圖譜保留了來源，保持每個主張可追溯，並將監管事實與患者經驗區分開來。這些結果確立了源感知整合作為獲得更可審計的精神科藥物資訊的途徑，其實用性和患者利益將在前瞻性研究中進行測試。

docs.title: Pulmonary Embolism Risk Stratification from CTPA and Medical Records: Vascular Graphs Are Not All You Need
docs.text:
2606.25956v2 by Nathan Painchaud, Tristan Habémont, Morgane des Ligneris, Allan Serva, Pierre Croisille, Laurent Bertoletti, Thomas Lampert, Johannes F. Lutzeyer, Odyssée Merveille

Risk stratification for pulmonary embolism (PE) is critical for clinical decision-making. Stratification guidelines are based on patient medical records, parameters measured from computed tomography pulmonary angiography (CTPA), and blood tests. However, blood tests are often missing in routine practice. This work studies whether state-of-the-art models can accurately classify risk stratification from only medical records and biomarkers extracted from CTPA images. We benchmark different approaches to combine medical records and cardiac biomarkers with rich pulmonary vascular information; we add vascular biomarkers to tabular models and apply graph neural networks (GNNs) on the vascular tree's intrinsic graph representation. We use a private dataset (n=353) with uniquely complete data for PE risk stratification. Our results show that, among global features, medical records and cardiac biomarkers are the most significant predictors, while vascular biomarkers do not further improve stratification. Even more surprising, even GNNs on vascular graphs fail to outperform strong tabular baseline on global features. We consider hypotheses, on both models and data, that could explain this suboptimal performance. Our investigation suggests that, counter-intuitively, vascular graphs might hold no discriminative information for PE risk stratification. Code is available from https://github.com/creatis-myriad/GENESIS.

摘要：風險分層對於肺栓塞 (PE) 的臨床決策至關重要。分層指導方針基於患者的醫療記錄、從計算機斷層肺動脈造影 (CTPA) 測量的參數以及血液檢查。然而，常規實踐中血液檢查往往缺失。本研究探討最先進的模型是否能僅根據醫療記錄和從CTPA影像提取的生物標記準確分類風險分層。我們基準不同的方法來結合醫療記錄和心臟生物標記，並利用豐富的肺血管信息；我們將血管生物標記添加到表格模型中，並在血管樹的內在圖形表示上應用圖神經網絡 (GNN)。我們使用一個私有數據集 (n=353)，該數據集對於PE風險分層具有獨特的完整數據。我們的結果顯示，在全球特徵中，醫療記錄和心臟生物標記是最重要的預測因子，而血管生物標記並未進一步改善分層。更令人驚訝的是，即使在血管圖上的GNN也未能超越強大的表格基準在全球特徵上的表現。我們考慮了可能解釋這一次優化性能的假設，包括模型和數據。我們的調查表明，反直覺地，血管圖可能不包含對PE風險分層的區分信息。代碼可從 https://github.com/creatis-myriad/GENESIS 獲得。

docs.title: Enhancing Brain MRI Anomaly Detection and Reasoning with ROI Rethink and Synthetic Data
docs.text:
2606.25894v1 by Shangkun Li, Jie Xu, Yi Guo, Zeju Li, Yuanyuan Wang

Medical vision-language models typically generate diagnoses through single-pass inference without indicating which image regions support their conclusions. This lack of spatial grounding limits clinical utility: outputs cannot be audited, and models may hallucinate findings on normal scans. We present BrReMark (Brain Rethink via ROI Marking), a framework that introduces explicit region marking into brain MRI diagnosis. The model first generates hypotheses about potential abnormalities and grounds them through explicit bounding box marking, then verifies conclusions by re-examining the marked evidence. Training combines supervised fine-tuning on structured reasoning trajectories with reinforcement learning using a composite reward over localization accuracy and diagnostic reasoning. Furthermore, we integrate a domain randomization-based pathology synthesis augmentation strategy to improve the model's generalizability to out-of-distribution (OOD) data. On internal benchmark, BrReMark improves mAP50 from 0.74% to 37.54% compared to the base model, while achieving 21.57% Clinical F1 and 45.26% diagnostic accuracy. On NOVA OOD benchmark, it also achieves competitive overall performance with a 45.7% reduction in false positives compared to the state-of-the-art, indicating reduced hallucination on rare pathologies. These findings suggest that explicit hypothesis-verification grounding is a practical path toward trustworthy open-ended brain MRI diagnosis across both in-distribution and OOD settings.

摘要：醫療視覺語言模型通常通過單次推理生成診斷，而不指明哪些影像區域支持其結論。這種缺乏空間基礎的情況限制了臨床實用性：輸出無法被審核，模型可能在正常掃描中產生幻覺結果。我們提出了 BrReMark（透過 ROI 標記的腦部重新思考），這是一個將明確區域標記引入腦部 MRI 診斷的框架。該模型首先生成有關潛在異常的假設，並通過明確的邊界框標記將其基礎化，然後通過重新檢查標記的證據來驗證結論。訓練結合了對結構化推理軌跡的監督微調與使用複合獎勵的強化學習，該獎勵基於定位準確性和診斷推理。此外，我們整合了一種基於領域隨機化的病理合成增強策略，以提高模型對分佈外（OOD）數據的泛化能力。在內部基準測試中，BrReMark 將 mAP50 從 0.74% 提高到 37.54%，相比基礎模型，同時達到 21.57% 的臨床 F1 和 45.26% 的診斷準確率。在 NOVA OOD 基準測試中，它的整體表現也具有競爭力，與最先進技術相比，假陽性減少了 45.7%，顯示在罕見病理上減少了幻覺。這些發現表明，明確的假設驗證基礎化是一條實用的途徑，朝著在分佈內和 OOD 環境中可信的開放式腦部 MRI 診斷邁進。

docs.title: KG-TRACE: A Neuro-Symbolic Framework for Mechanistic Grounding in Antimicrobial Resistance Prediction
docs.text:
2606.26179v1 by Naman Garg, Sarika Jain, Sourav Yadav, Bharat K. Bhargava, Ghanapriya Singh, Abhishek Srivastava, Parimal Kar

While WGS-based AMR prediction has reached high accuracy, existing models lack a mechanism to ground neural attributions in established biological pathways. We present KG-TRACE, a novel neuro-symbolic framework that integrates the WHO mutation knowledge graph (KG) as a structured biological constraint on a neural genomic model. Unlike existing methods that learn statistical patterns in isolation, KG-TRACE fuses genomic features and RotatE-based KG embeddings through a learned epistemic trust gate, dynamically weighting neural evidence against symbolic biological knowledge. Evaluated on the CRyPTIC M. tuberculosis cohort, KG-TRACE achieves an AUROC of 0.9760 for isoniazid, achieving competitive accuracy while its primary value lies in symbolic grounding, not predictive uplift. More importantly, we introduce the Biological Grounding Ratio (BGR), a dataset-level metric that quantifies alignment between neural attributions and established biology. Our framework achieves a 92.5% symbolic coverage of isoniazid-resistant predictions and effectively identifies MDR co-occurrence artifacts by issuing laboratory follow-up flags for 'UNCERTAIN' cases. We demonstrate that neuro-symbolic grounding provides a verifiable audit trail for clinicians, bridging the gap between predictive accuracy and clinical trust.

摘要：雖然基於全基因組測序（WGS）的抗藥性預測已達到高準確度，但現有模型缺乏將神經歸因與既定生物途徑相結合的機制。我們提出了KG-TRACE，一個新穎的神經符號框架，將世界衛生組織（WHO）突變知識圖（KG）作為對神經基因組模型的結構性生物約束。與現有方法孤立學習統計模式不同，KG-TRACE通過學習的認知信任閘融合基因組特徵和基於RotatE的KG嵌入，動態加權神經證據與符號生物知識之間的關係。在CRyPTIC結核分枝桿菌（M. tuberculosis）隊列上進行評估，KG-TRACE對異煙肼的AUROC達到0.9760，實現了競爭性的準確性，而其主要價值在於符號基礎，而非預測提升。更重要的是，我們引入了生物基礎比率（BGR），這是一個數據集級別的指標，用於量化神經歸因與既定生物學之間的對齊。我們的框架對異煙肼抗藥性預測實現了92.5%的符號覆蓋率，並通過對“未確定”案例發出實驗室後續標記，有效識別多重耐藥共現伪影。我們展示了神經符號基礎提供了可驗證的審計軌跡，為臨床醫生搭建了預測準確性與臨床信任之間的橋樑。

docs.title: Expresso-AI: Explainable Video-Based Deep Learning Models for Depression Diagnosis
docs.text:
2606.25606v1 by Felipe Moreno, Sharifa Alghowinem, Hae Won Park, Cynthia Breazeal

Given the widespread prevalence of depression and its consequential impact on individuals and society, it is crucial to obtain objective measures for early diagnosis and intervention. As a multidisciplinary topic, these objective measures should be interpretable and accessible to health care professionals, ensuring effective collaboration and treatment planning in the realm of mental health care. Even though current automated depression diagnosis approaches improved over the last decade, a critical gap exists as they often lack affect-specificity and interpretability, limiting their practical application and potential impact on mental health care. In particular, interpretability from temporal activities from videos when deep models are used is not fully explored. In this study, we present a novel framework for analyzing Deep Neural Networks' decisions when trained on facial videos, specifically focusing on automatic depression severity diagnosis. By fine-tuning Deep Convolutional Neural Networks (DCNN) pre-trained on Action Recognition datasets on depression severity facial videos from AVEC depression dataset, our framework is able to interpret the model's saliency maps by examining face regions and temporal expression semantics. Our approach generates both visual and quantitative explanations for the model's decisions, providing greater insight into its reasoning. In addition to this interpretability, our video-based modeling has improved upon previous single-face benchmarks for visual depression diagnosis, resulting in enhanced predictive performance. Overall, our work demonstrates the successful development of a framework capable of generating hypotheses from a facial model's decisions while simultaneously improving depression's predictive capabilities.

摘要：考慮到憂鬱症的廣泛流行及其對個人和社會的影響，獲得客觀的早期診斷和干預措施至關重要。作為一個多學科的主題，這些客觀措施應該能夠被醫療專業人員解釋和訪問，以確保在心理健康護理領域的有效合作和治療計劃。儘管目前自動化的憂鬱症診斷方法在過去十年有所改善，但仍存在一個關鍵的缺口，因為它們往往缺乏情感特異性和可解釋性，限制了其實際應用和對心理健康護理的潛在影響。特別是，使用深度模型時，來自視頻的時間活動的可解釋性尚未得到充分探索。在本研究中，我們提出了一個新穎的框架，用於分析深度神經網絡在面部視頻上訓練時的決策，特別專注於自動憂鬱症嚴重程度診斷。通過對在行為識別數據集上預訓練的深度卷積神經網絡（DCNN）進行微調，並應用於來自 AVEC 憂鬱症數據集的憂鬱症嚴重程度面部視頻，我們的框架能夠通過檢查面部區域和時間表情語義來解釋模型的顯著性圖。我們的方法為模型的決策生成了視覺和定量的解釋，提供了對其推理的更深入見解。除了這種可解釋性，我們基於視頻的建模在視覺憂鬱症診斷方面改進了以前的單面基準，從而提高了預測性能。總體而言，我們的工作展示了一個成功開發的框架，能夠從面部模型的決策中生成假設，同時提高了憂鬱症的預測能力。

docs.title: Interpretable Concept-Guided Polynomial Tabular Kolmogorov-Arnold Network for EEG-Based Mild Cognitive Impairment Detection
docs.text:
2606.25434v1 by Yosef Bernardus Wirian, Qiang Cheng

Early and scalable detection of mild cognitive impairment (MCI) remains an unresolved clinical challenge. Existing EEG-based screening approaches are constrained by handcrafted feature pipelines that discard neurophysiologically meaningful domain structure and deep learning classifiers that sacrifice interpretability for performance. No existing work unifies physiologically organized concept encoders, cross-concept interaction modeling, and nonlinear tabular classification in a sleep EEG-based MCI detection framework. This study proposes Concept-guided Polynomial-transformed Tabular learning using Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (CPTabKAN), which maps heterogeneous EEG-derived features into domain-informed concept representations, expands them via degree-2 polynomial transformation to expose first- and second-order interactions, and applies a Fourier-parameterized TabKAN classifier to learn nonlinear decision boundaries. CPTabKAN was evaluated on the Study of Osteoporotic Fractures cohort (372 subjects, overnight polysomnography), using 1,379 features organized into ten physiologically motivated concept groups. Under 10-fold cross-validation, CPTabKAN-Second Order achieved a weighted F1-score of 0.9038 (SD 0.034), outperforming GradientBoosting by 5.65 percentage points (t(9)=1.934,p=0.043, one-sided paired test), with advantages persisting under SMOTE-based balancing. Ablation analysis confirmed independent contributions from each component. Concept importance analysis revealed that power spectral density, multi-scale entropy, and Hjorth parameters dominated first-order weights, while cross-concept interactions involving Lempel-Ziv-Welch complexity, statistics, demographics, and slow oscillations exceeded all first-order scores. These results demonstrate that concept-structured, interaction-aware tabular learning surfaces physiologically coherent reasoning, supporting clinical trust.

摘要：早期且可擴展的輕度認知障礙（MCI）檢測仍然是一個未解決的臨床挑戰。現有的基於腦電圖（EEG）的篩查方法受到手工特徵管道的限制，這些管道忽略了神經生理學上有意義的領域結構，以及深度學習分類器在性能上犧牲可解釋性。現有的研究沒有將生理組織的概念編碼器、跨概念互動建模和非線性表格分類統一到基於睡眠EEG的MCI檢測框架中。本研究提出了使用Kolmogorov-Arnold網絡的概念引導多項式變換表格學習（CPTabKAN），該方法將異質的EEG衍生特徵映射到領域知情的概念表示中，通過二次多項式變換擴展它們以揭示一級和二級互動，並應用傅里葉參數化的TabKAN分類器來學習非線性決策邊界。CPTabKAN在骨質疏鬆性骨折研究隊列（372名受試者，過夜多導睡眠檢查）上進行了評估，使用了1,379個特徵，這些特徵組織成十個生理驅動的概念組。在10倍交叉驗證下，CPTabKAN-二級達到了0.9038的加權F1分數（標準差0.034），比GradientBoosting高出5.65個百分點（t(9)=1.934,p=0.043，單側配對檢驗），在基於SMOTE的平衡下仍然保持優勢。消融分析確認了每個組件的獨立貢獻。概念重要性分析顯示，功率譜密度、多尺度熵和Hjorth參數主導了一級權重，而涉及Lempel-Ziv-Welch複雜性、統計數據、人口統計學和慢振盪的跨概念互動超過了所有一級分數。這些結果表明，結構化的概念、互動感知的表格學習展現了生理上連貫的推理，支持臨床信任。

docs.title: BrainAgent: A Large Language Model-Driven Multi-Agent Framework for Autonomous Brain Signal Understanding
docs.text:
2606.25400v1 by Yangxuan Zhou, Sha Zhao, Jiquan Wang, Shijian Li, Gang Pan

Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCIs) and brain signal understanding are pivotal for clinical health and next-generation interactions. Despite this significance, its widespread adoption in real-world scenarios remains restricted, primarily because current analytical paradigms lack sufficient agentic intelligence. First, existing methodologies impose prohibitive technical barriers, requiring extensive specialized expertise. Second, they remain inherently static and task-specific, failing to execute the complex, long-horizon workflows essential for real-world deployment. To accelerate the democratization of brain signal understanding, we draw inspiration from Large Language Models (LLMs) to introduce BrainAgent, an LLM-driven multi-agent framework designed to ground abstract natural language intent into rigorous, executable, and end-to-end processing pipelines. BrainAgent employs a hierarchical architecture where a central supervisor orchestrates specialized sub-agents for adaptive task decomposition and execution. Furthermore, we establish a comprehensive, systematic benchmark for evaluating agentic systems in brain signal analysis. Empirical results demonstrate that BrainAgent effectively automates complex workflows with superior reliability, marking a paradigm shift toward democratized brain signal understanding.

摘要：腦-電腦介面（BCIs）和腦信號理解對於臨床健康和下一代互動至關重要。儘管這一重要性，實際場景中的廣泛採用仍然受到限制，主要是因為當前的分析範式缺乏足夠的代理智能。首先，現有的方法論施加了禁止性的技術障礙，需要廣泛的專業知識。其次，它們本質上是靜態的和特定任務的，無法執行對於實際部署至關重要的複雜長期工作流程。為了加速腦信號理解的民主化，我們受到大型語言模型（LLMs）的啟發，推出了BrainAgent，一個基於LLM的多代理框架，旨在將抽象的自然語言意圖轉化為嚴謹、可執行的端到端處理管道。BrainAgent採用層次架構，其中中央監督者協調專門的子代理進行自適應任務分解和執行。此外，我們建立了一個全面的系統基準，用於評估腦信號分析中的代理系統。實證結果表明，BrainAgent能有效自動化複雜工作流程，並具有更高的可靠性，標誌著向民主化腦信號理解的範式轉變。

docs.title: Anatomically-conditioned Latent Diffusion Model for Data-Efficient Few-Shot Cross-Domain 3D Glioma MRI Synthesis
docs.text:
2606.25390v1 by Salman Shaik, Truong Thanh Hung Nguyen, Hung Cao

Accurate classification of diffuse gliomas is often hindered by domain shifts across centers and a lack of large, annotated datasets. We propose the Anatomically-conditioned Latent Diffusion Model (ALDM), a novel framework for data-efficient, few-shot 3D volumetric MRI synthesis. ALDM utilizes a two-stage approach: a 3D variational autoencoder learns anatomical priors from a data-rich source domain, while a conditional latent diffusion model, guided by tumor masks via a ControlNet, generates structurally coherent volumes for a data-scarce target domain. Evaluated in an extreme few-shot setting with only 16 target images, ALDM outperformed GAN and hybrid baselines, achieving a superior Frechet Inception Distance (FID) of 85.40 and a downstream classification AUC of 0.987. Qualitative results confirm that the model preserves sharp pathology boundaries and cross-modal consistency, with visual fidelity improving progressively during training. By capturing essential diagnostic features, ALDM provides a robust tool for clinical data augmentation in low-resource settings. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/Analytics-Everywhere-Lab/anatomically-conditioned-LDM.

摘要：準確分類擴散性膠質瘤常常受到中心之間領域轉變和缺乏大型標註數據集的阻礙。我們提出了「解剖條件潛在擴散模型」（ALDM），這是一種新穎的框架，用於數據高效、少量樣本的3D體積MRI合成。ALDM採用兩階段的方法：3D變分自編碼器從數據豐富的源域學習解剖先驗，而由腫瘤掩碼指導的條件潛在擴散模型，通過ControlNet生成結構上連貫的體積，適用於數據稀缺的目標域。在只有16張目標圖像的極端少量樣本設置中，ALDM的表現超過了GAN和混合基準，獲得了優越的Frechet Inception Distance (FID) 85.40和下游分類AUC 0.987。定性結果確認該模型能夠保持清晰的病理邊界和跨模態一致性，視覺真實感在訓練過程中逐步改善。通過捕捉重要的診斷特徵，ALDM為低資源環境中的臨床數據增強提供了一個穩健的工具。我們的實現可以在https://github.com/Analytics-Everywhere-Lab/anatomically-conditioned-LDM上獲得。

docs.title: Beyond Visual Forensics: Auditing Multimodal Robustness for Synthetic Medical Image Detection
docs.text:
2606.25375v1 by Ching-Hao Chiu, Hao-Wei Chung, Gelei Xu, Xueyang Li, Pin-Yu Chen, John Kheir, Meysam Ghaffari, Carlos Morato, Ahmed Abbasi, Yiyu Shi

With the rapid adoption of generative AI, synthetic medical images pose growing risks, including diagnostic deception and insurance fraud. Although prior work has explored vision-language model (VLM)-based synthetic image detection, these evaluations typically consider images in isolation. In clinical practice, however, images are interpreted alongside structured records and metadata, and VLMs are increasingly deployed under joint image-record inputs. We uncover a previously underexamined multimodal vulnerability: when given both modalities, VLMs may overweight record context in authenticity judgments, such that the same image receives different predictions solely due to changes in its accompanying text. This raises concerns about robustness in real-world deployment. To systematically characterize this effect, we reformulate synthetic medical image detection as an audit of multimodal robustness at the image-record interface and introduce a paired benchmark that holds the image fixed while swapping controlled metadata variants. Across multiple imaging modalities, we evaluate diverse open-weight and frontier API VLMs and quantify how metadata alone shifts authenticity predictions. Our benchmark provides a standardized tool for assessing and improving multimodal robustness beyond image-only settings. The code is available at https://github.com/chiuhaohao/Beyond-Visual-Forensics.

摘要：隨著生成式人工智慧的快速採用，合成醫學影像帶來了日益增長的風險，包括診斷欺騙和保險詐欺。雖然先前的研究探討了基於視覺-語言模型（VLM）的合成影像檢測，但這些評估通常是將影像孤立地考量。然而，在臨床實踐中，影像是與結構化記錄和元數據一起解釋的，且 VLM 正在越來越多地在聯合影像-記錄輸入下部署。我們揭示了一種先前未被充分檢視的多模態脆弱性：當同時提供這兩種模態時，VLM 可能在真實性判斷中過度重視記錄的上下文，以至於同一影像僅因其伴隨文本的變化而獲得不同的預測。這引發了對於實際部署中穩健性的擔憂。為了系統性地描述這一效應，我們將合成醫學影像檢測重新定義為影像-記錄介面的多模態穩健性審核，並引入一個配對基準，該基準在固定影像的同時更換受控的元數據變體。在多種影像模態下，我們評估了多樣的開放權重和前沿 API VLM，並量化了僅元數據如何改變真實性預測。我們的基準提供了一個標準化工具，用於評估和改善超越僅影像設定的多模態穩健性。代碼可在 https://github.com/chiuhaohao/Beyond-Visual-Forensics 獲得。

docs.title: Phoneme-Level Mispronunciation Screening in Polish-Speaking Children with an Explainable Assistant
docs.text:
2606.25181v1 by Milosz Dudek, Daria Hemmerling, Kamil Kwarciak, Maciej Stroinski, Maria Pensko, Mateusz Kowalewski, Leonid Pavlovskyi, Sebastian Jurczak, Anna-Mariia Vitkovska, Zuzanna Miodonska, Natalia Mocko, Michal Krecichwost

Early identification of speech sound errors in children is often limited by access to specialists, motivating lightweight screening tools that can operate outside the clinic. We present a screening pipeline for Polish-speaking children focused on sibilant substitutions, coupling a wav2vec2-based CTC token recognizer with alignment-based error typing and a template-grounded caregiver assistant for screening, not diagnosis. On a held-out test set of 10 unseen children comprising 559 utterances, the recognizer achieves 88.7 percent exact sequence match. As a conservative screening proxy, we flag a mismatch when the system emits substitution-evidence bracketed tokens at the target segment, yielding 72.9 percent precision, 61.4 percent recall, F1 = 0.67, and a 2.7 percent false-alarm rate on target-correct items. We describe the assistant's safety boundaries and outline a clinician-in-the-loop validation plan for future deployment.

摘要：早期識別兒童語音錯誤常常受到專家可及性的限制，這促使了可以在診所外運作的輕量篩檢工具的需求。我們提出了一個針對說波蘭語兒童的篩檢流程，專注於齒擦音的替代，將基於wav2vec2的CTC標記識別器與基於對齊的錯誤類型和模板基礎的照顧者助手結合，用於篩檢，而非診斷。在一組包含559個發音的10名未見兒童的保留測試集中，該識別器達到了88.7%的精確序列匹配。作為保守的篩檢代理，當系統在目標片段發出替代證據括號標記時，我們標記為不匹配，產生72.9%的精確度、61.4%的召回率、F1 = 0.67，以及在目標正確項目上2.7%的誤報率。我們描述了助手的安全邊界，並概述了未來部署的臨床醫生參與驗證計劃。

docs.title: Reducing Redundancy in Whole-Slide Image Patching for Scalable Indexing and Retrieval
docs.text:
2606.26157v1 by Jialiang Geng, Ghazal Alabtah, Saghir Alfasly, Wataru Uegami, H. R. Tizhoosh

The rapid growth of digital pathology has created an urgent need for efficient indexing and retrieval of whole slide images (WSIs). This need is intensified by emerging generative AI workflows, particularly retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), which require dependable similarity search to support high-stakes clinical decision-making. Yet the substantial cost of high-performance storage limits the scalability and accessibility of WSI indexing for many healthcare institutions. Consequently, methods that can reduce storage demands while preserving retrieval accuracy have become a critical research priority. We propose ARReST (Antithetical Redundancy Reduction Strategy), a principled oppositional framework that leverages redundancy across dissimilar tissue classes to markedly decrease the number of patches that must be indexed from each WSI. Instead of eliminating only within-class duplicates, ARReST identifies antithetical patches-those whose representations contribute minimally to cross-class discrimination-and prunes them from the searchable archive. This targeted reduction substantially compresses the index without sacrificing morphological diversity or retrieval fidelity. By minimizing superfluous patch representations, ARReST reduces storage footprint, lowers computational overhead, and accelerates similarity search across large pathology repositories. Extensive experiments on TCGA repository (The Cancer Genome Atlas with 21 organs) demonstrate that ARReST achieves significant index compression while maintaining competitive retrieval performance. The observed storage savings of 3% to 60% (14%$\pm$13%) can be reliably achieved without compromising retrieval performance for many organs. The proposed strategy enables scalable, cost-efficient WSI indexing and is well-suited for next-generation retrieval-driven clinical AI systems.

摘要：數位病理學的快速增長創造了對整張幻燈片影像（WSIs）高效索引和檢索的迫切需求。這一需求因新興的生成性人工智慧工作流程，特別是增強檢索生成（RAG），而加劇，這些工作流程需要可靠的相似性搜索來支持高風險的臨床決策。然而，高性能存儲的可觀成本限制了許多醫療機構對WSI索引的可擴展性和可及性。因此，能夠在保持檢索準確性的同時減少存儲需求的方法已成為一項關鍵的研究優先事項。我們提出了ARReST（對立冗餘減少策略），這是一個原則性的對立框架，利用不同組織類別之間的冗餘，顯著減少每個WSI中必須索引的補丁數量。ARReST不僅僅是消除類內重複，而是識別對立補丁——那些其表徵對類間區分貢獻最小的補丁——並將其從可搜索的檔案中修剪掉。這種針對性的減少在不犧牲形態多樣性或檢索保真度的情況下，顯著壓縮了索引。通過最小化多餘的補丁表徵，ARReST減少了存儲佔用，降低了計算開銷，並加速了在大型病理資料庫中的相似性搜索。在TCGA資料庫（癌症基因組圖譜，涵蓋21個器官）上的廣泛實驗顯示，ARReST在保持競爭性檢索性能的同時，實現了顯著的索引壓縮。觀察到的存儲節省為3%到60%（14%$\pm$13%），在許多器官中可以可靠地實現，而不會妥協檢索性能。所提出的策略實現了可擴展、成本效益高的WSI索引，並非常適合下一代以檢索為驅動的臨床人工智慧系統。

docs.title: BCoughBench: Benchmarking Respiratory Acoustic Foundation Models Under Body-Coupled Wearable Sensor Conditions
docs.text:
2606.25116v1 by Mayur Sanap, Prasanna Desikan, Edgar Lobaton

Respiratory acoustic foundation models (FMs) are benchmarked exclusively on smartphone recordings, yet clinical deployment increasingly targets body-coupled (BC) wearables whose sensors attenuate high-frequency content through tissue and bone, leaving FM reliability uncharacterised. We introduce BCoughBench, evaluating five FMs (OPERA-CT/CE/GT, HeAR, M2D+Resp) on nine classification tasks (AUROC, sensitivity at 95% specificity, Expected Calibration Error) and three age regression tasks (MAE vs. a mean-predictor baseline) across five EBEN-simulated BC sensor conditions on five labeled cough datasets. Mean AUROC declines from 0.785 (smartphone) to 0.689-0.723, degrading most under temple vibration pickup ($Δ$ = -0.096) and least under the soft in-ear ($Δ$ = -0.062). No FM meets the clinical sensitivity threshold (Se@Sp95 $\geq$ 0.20) on most disease tasks under any BC sensor. Sex classification on the CIDRZ cohort collapses (AUROC 0.954 to 0.596-0.628, $Δ$ = -0.341) while COVID detection is nearly unaffected ($Δ$ = -0.004). Age regression is robust, improving under the forehead accelerometer on CoughVID (MAE 9.61 to 8.97 yr); HeAR leads on regression and demographic tasks, M2D+Resp on disease and characteristic tasks. BCoughBench provides a reproducible framework for FM evaluation under wearable conditions.

摘要：呼吸聲學基礎模型（FMs）僅在智能手機錄音上進行基準測試，但臨床部署越來越多地針對身體耦合（BC）可穿戴設備，這些設備的傳感器通過組織和骨骼衰減高頻內容，導致FM的可靠性未被特徵化。我們介紹了BCoughBench，評估五個FMs（OPERA-CT/CE/GT、HeAR、M2D+Resp）在九個分類任務（AUROC、在95%特異性下的敏感性、期望校準誤差）和三個年齡回歸任務（MAE與平均預測基線）上的表現，這些任務在五個EBEN模擬的BC傳感器條件下，使用五個標記的咳嗽數據集。平均AUROC從0.785（智能手機）下降到0.689-0.723，在寺廟振動拾音下降幅最大（$Δ$ = -0.096），在柔軟耳內降幅最小（$Δ$ = -0.062）。在任何BC傳感器下，沒有一個FM滿足臨床敏感性閾值（Se@Sp95 $\geq$ 0.20）的大多數疾病任務。CIDRZ隊列中的性別分類崩潰（AUROC從0.954降至0.596-0.628，$Δ$ = -0.341），而COVID檢測幾乎不受影響（$Δ$ = -0.004）。年齡回歸穩健，在CoughVID的前額加速度計下有所改善（MAE從9.61降至8.97年）；HeAR在回歸和人口統計任務中領先，M2D+Resp在疾病和特徵任務中表現最佳。BCoughBench提供了一個可重複的框架，用於在可穿戴條件下評估FM。

docs.title: The Clinician's Veto: Navigating Trust, Liability, and Uncertainty in Autonomous AI Prescribing
docs.text:
2606.25108v1 by Eileanor LaRocco, Sarah Tan, Adarsh Subbaswamy, Anne Andrews, Andrew Taylor, Cree Gaskin, Chirag Agarwal

Autonomous AI systems are transitioning from advisory to autonomous roles for medication prescriptions. Recent United States bill H.R. 238 and Utah's prescription-renewal pilot both authorize AI to prescribe medications in an agentic capacity. While some regulatory guidelines suggest aggregate model performance metrics for clearance, they do not require i) calibrated per-prediction confidence for action-gated thresholds, ii) differentiated communication of uncertainty arising from model ignorance (epistemic) versus genuine clinical ambiguity (aleatoric), and iii) inferential transparency at the moment of decision that allows for liability allocation. Here, we present a regulatory and technical argument (tested with a survey of 136 U.S. prescribing clinicians) positioning these as minimum architectural requirements for safe autonomous prescribing. Our results suggest prescribing clinicians i) would not permit autonomous prescribing without a calibrated confidence-based escalation mechanism, ii) preferred a competing-options summary when uncertainty was aleatoric but shifted to abstention when uncertainty was epistemic, and iii) were only willing to accept additional liability when inferential transparency enabled a substantive judgment under acknowledged uncertainty. These findings indicate our recommended architectural features would encourage higher rates of clinician adoption, largely through collapsing much of what "autonomy" conventionally means. A system meeting these requirements would function less as an autonomous agent and more as a heavily supervised decision-support tool. As legislation and state pilots proceed, our technical argument backed by clinician perspectives provides opportunities for regulation to constrain the degree of autonomy ethically granted to AI in prescribing while aligning liability with the institutional actors who control system design and deployment.

摘要：自主 AI 系統正在從建議角色轉變為自主藥物處方角色。最近的美國法案 H.R. 238 和猶他州的處方續期試點都授權 AI 以代理身份開立藥物。雖然一些監管指導方針建議使用總體模型性能指標來進行批准，但它們並不要求 i) 針對行動門檻的每次預測進行校準的信心，ii) 區分由模型無知（認識論的）引起的不確定性與真正臨床模糊性（隨機的）之間的溝通，以及 iii) 在決策時的推理透明度，以便進行責任分配。在這裡，我們提出了一個監管和技術論點（通過對 136 名美國處方臨床醫師的調查進行測試），將這些視為安全自主處方的最低架構要求。我們的結果表明，處方臨床醫師 i) 不會允許在沒有基於校準信心的升級機制的情況下進行自主處方，ii) 在不確定性為隨機時偏好競爭選項摘要，但在不確定性為認識論時則轉向放棄，iii) 只有在推理透明度使得在承認不確定性的情況下能夠進行實質判斷時，才願意接受額外的責任。這些發現表明，我們推薦的架構特徵將促進臨床醫師的更高採納率，主要是通過縮減「自主性」的傳統意義。滿足這些要求的系統將更像是一個受到嚴格監督的決策支持工具，而不是一個自主代理。隨著立法和州試點的推進，我們基於臨床醫師觀點的技術論點為監管提供了機會，以倫理地限制授予 AI 在處方中的自主性程度，同時將責任與控制系統設計和部署的機構行為者對齊。

docs.title: RADIANT-PET: Reasoning-Augmented PET/CT Lesion Segmentation with Large Language Models and Reinforcement Learning
docs.text:
2606.28392v1 by Jiasheng Wang, Tanun Jitwatcharakomol, Piyawadee Jongpradubgiat, Simeng Zhu

Accurate lesion segmentation in PET/CT is critical for oncology, yet remains challenging because physiologic tracer uptake and artifacts can mimic malignant signal. We present RADIANT-PET, a reasoning-augmented framework that couples a high-sensitivity voxel-level segmentation model with lesion-level large language model (LLM) adjudication. Candidate uptake regions are generated with a deliberately permissive segmentation stage, then converted into structured textual descriptions that summarize uptake intensity, morphology, and regional and global anatomical context. An LLM classifies each candidate as true lesion vs. false positive, optionally leveraging the radiology report as additional clinical context. To strengthen lesion-level reasoning, we further optimize a local LLM via reinforcement learning using Group Relative Policy Optimization, rewarding correct lesion classification and anatomically concordant site assignment. Across AutoPET and an OSU test cohort, RADIANT-PET consistently outperforms strong image-only baselines, with the largest improvements observed when radiology reports are provided. Overall, these results demonstrate that LLM-based lesion-level reasoning adds a novel reasoning layer beyond conventional segmentation, suppressing physiologic false positives and aligning voxel-level predictions with clinical interpretation. The project repository is available at: https://github.com/jwang-580/RADIANT-PET.

摘要：在PET/CT中準確的病變分割對腫瘤學至關重要，但仍然具有挑戰性，因為生理示蹤劑的攝取和伪影可能模仿惡性信號。我們提出了RADIANT-PET，一個增強推理的框架，將高靈敏度的體素級分割模型與病變級的大型語言模型（LLM）裁定相結合。候選攝取區域通過一個故意寬鬆的分割階段生成，然後轉換為結構化的文本描述，總結攝取強度、形態以及區域和全局解剖背景。LLM將每個候選者分類為真病變與假陽性，並可選擇利用放射科報告作為額外的臨床背景。為了加強病變級的推理，我們進一步通過強化學習使用群體相對政策優化來優化本地LLM，獎勵正確的病變分類和解剖一致的部位分配。在AutoPET和OSU測試隊列中，RADIANT-PET始終超越強大的僅影像基準，當提供放射科報告時，觀察到最大的改進。總體而言，這些結果表明，基於LLM的病變級推理在傳統分割之上增加了一層新穎的推理，抑制生理假陽性，並將體素級預測與臨床解釋對齊。項目庫可在以下網址獲得：https://github.com/jwang-580/RADIANT-PET。

docs.title: Noise-Aware Boundary-Enhanced Generative Learning for Ultrasound Speckle Reduction
docs.text:
2606.25009v2 by Yuexi Gu, Mengqi Wu, Yongheng Sun, Virginie Papadopoulou, Mingxia Liu, Maureen Kohi

Ultrasound is a non-invasive, real-time, and cost-effective imaging technique widely used in clinical diagnosis. However, its diagnostic efficacy is often compromised by inherent speckle noise that degrades image quality and obscures underlying anatomical structures. Existing speckle reduction methods tend to over-smooth tissue boundaries and generalize poorly to heterogeneous noise levels. To address these limitations, we propose a Noise-Aware Boundary-Enhanced Generative Learning (NBGL) framework for ultrasound speckle reduction, which simultaneously preserves annotated anatomical boundaries and adapts to varying noise levels. The NBGL framework consists of a speckle reduction branch and a boundary enhancement branch. The former leverages generative learning to suppress speckle noise, while the latter learns boundary-sensitive representations to preserve target anatomical structures. Furthermore, a noise-aware interaction weight generation (NIWG) module estimates the speckle noise level via 3D Laplacian filtering and a median absolute deviation estimator, and translates it into an adaptive interaction weight. This weight is incorporated into a weighted feature-wise linear modulation (wFiLM) module to adaptively modulate cross-branch feature coupling, thereby improving robustness to varying noise levels. Extensive evaluations on 141 3D transvaginal ultrasound volumes demonstrate that NBGL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in speckle reduction and structural preservation across six noise levels, while maintaining consistency with annotated anatomical boundaries.

摘要：超聲波是一種非侵入性、實時且具成本效益的影像技術，廣泛應用於臨床診斷。然而，其診斷效能常常受到固有的斑點噪聲影響，這會降低影像質量並掩蓋潛在的解剖結構。現有的斑點減少方法往往過度平滑組織邊界，且對異質噪聲水平的泛化能力較差。為了解決這些限制，我們提出了一種噪聲感知邊界增強生成學習（NBGL）框架，用於超聲斑點減少，該框架同時保留標註的解剖邊界並適應不同的噪聲水平。NBGL框架由斑點減少分支和邊界增強分支組成。前者利用生成學習來抑制斑點噪聲，而後者則學習邊界敏感的表示，以保留目標解剖結構。此外，噪聲感知互動權重生成（NIWG）模塊通過3D拉普拉斯濾波和中位數絕對偏差估計器來估算斑點噪聲水平，並將其轉換為自適應互動權重。這個權重被納入加權特徵線性調制（wFiLM）模塊中，以自適應地調節跨分支特徵耦合，從而提高對不同噪聲水平的穩健性。在141個3D經陰道超聲體積上的廣泛評估顯示，NBGL在六種噪聲水平下在斑點減少和結構保留方面始終優於最先進的方法，同時保持與標註的解剖邊界的一致性。

docs.title: Few-class Fidelity: Evaluating Explanations of Real-conditions CNN classifiers with Optimized Perturbations
docs.text:
2606.28391v1 by Wistan Marchadour, Pedro Soto Vega, Franck Vermet, Mathieu Hatt

The wide use of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) in numerous domains and real-world classification applications is justified by their high precision and automation speed, helping users concentrate on higher-expertise tasks. To better understand the models and avoid bias during deployment, eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) techniques can be used after training. But as the list of XAI solutions expand, comparisons between them diverge, and consensus over their evaluation cannot be reached. This paper proposes a variation of Fidelity-based XAI metrics, with a focus on real-conditions applications, where the number of classes is often low. The approach generates in-distribution, uncertainty-provoking perturbations, to ensure proper measurement of the XAI methods faithfulness. As demonstration of the evaluation framework usefulness, it is compared with human-centric object localization and segmentation metrics. Once applied to both medical and natural imaging applications, it highlights the intricate correlation between domain, data curation, and XAI solution choices in order to validate training of a new CNN model.

摘要：卷積神經網絡（CNN）在眾多領域和現實世界分類應用中的廣泛使用，得益於其高精度和自動化速度，幫助用戶專注於更高專業性的任務。為了更好地理解模型並在部署過程中避免偏見，可以在訓練後使用可解釋人工智慧（XAI）技術。但隨著XAI解決方案的列表不斷擴展，它們之間的比較出現分歧，對於其評估的共識無法達成。本文提出了一種基於忠實度的XAI指標變體，重點關注實際條件下的應用，其中類別數量通常較少。該方法生成分佈內的、不確定性引發的擾動，以確保對XAI方法忠實度的正確測量。作為評估框架有效性的示範，將其與以人為中心的物體定位和分割指標進行比較。一旦應用於醫療和自然影像應用，該方法突顯了領域、數據策展和XAI解決方案選擇之間的複雜關聯，以驗證新CNN模型的訓練。

docs.title: Accuracy and Satisfaction in Multi-Turn LLM Dialogues for NFR Assessment
docs.text:
2606.24834v1 by Ali Pourghasemi Fatideh, Wilder Baldwin, Maria Dhakal, Collin McMillan, Sepideh Ghanavati

LLM-based dialogue assistants have become mainstream tools for software developers, yet current evaluation benchmarks focus exclusively on functional correctness. This leaves a critical gap in assessing the quality and accuracy of these conversations when handling Non-Functional Requirements (NFRs), which are inherently vague, context-dependent, and involve many parts of a program. Evaluating how well these systems support collaborative reasoning about NFRs requires methods that go beyond single-turn accuracy to capture both the correctness of the system's outputs and the quality of the multi-turn interaction. In this paper, we investigate the accuracy and quality of multi-turn conversations between developers and an LLM-based agent in the domain of Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA) regulatory compliance. We hired 49 programmers to interact with GitHub Copilot to assess 148 HIPAA-derived NFRs against the iTrust codebase, a system designed to comply with HIPAA regulations, across three dimensions: requirement satisfaction level, reasoning, and code localization. We find that developers tend to agree with LLM assessments, but accuracy against expert ground truth is low. We model user satisfaction and find that longer system responses and more information-providing turns negatively affect user satisfaction, whereas proactive interactions positively affect it. Our findings provide insights for designing LLM-based dialogue systems that support NFR assessment.

摘要：LLM 基礎的對話助手已成為軟體開發者的主流工具，然而目前的評估基準僅專注於功能正確性。這在評估這些對話在處理非功能性需求（NFRs）時的質量和準確性方面留下了重要的空白，因為 NFR 本質上是模糊的、依賴於上下文的，並涉及程序的許多部分。評估這些系統在支持關於 NFR 的協作推理方面的表現需要超越單次回合的準確性的方法，以捕捉系統輸出的正確性和多回合互動的質量。在本文中，我們調查了開發者與基於 LLM 的代理之間在健康保險攜帶與責任法案（HIPAA）合規領域的多回合對話的準確性和質量。我們聘請了 49 名程序員與 GitHub Copilot 互動，以評估 148 個源自 HIPAA 的 NFR，這些 NFR 針對 iTrust 代碼庫進行評估，該系統旨在遵守 HIPAA 規範，涵蓋三個維度：需求滿足程度、推理和代碼本地化。我們發現開發者傾向於同意 LLM 的評估，但與專家真實情況的準確性較低。我們對用戶滿意度進行建模，發現較長的系統回應和提供更多信息的回合會對用戶滿意度產生負面影響，而主動互動則會對其產生正面影響。我們的研究結果為設計支持 NFR 評估的基於 LLM 的對話系統提供了見解。

docs.title: DeepBD: A Grounded Agentic Workflow for Variant Prioritization and Diagnosis of Genetic Birth Defects
docs.text:
2606.24779v1 by Shiyu Li, Ziqi Yan, Zhihao Wu, Jielong Lu, Weiran Liao, Jiajun Yu, Genjie Li, Zeyu Chu, Jiajun Bu, Haishuai Wang

Birth defects are a major cause of fetal loss, neonatal morbidity and long-term disability. In the subset with suspected genetic etiologies, exome and genome sequencing have moved many cases from variant detection to post-sequencing interpretation: clinicians must rank patient-specific candidate variants under incomplete fetal or infant phenotypes and heterogeneous evidence from population genetics, variant-effect prediction, gene-disease validity, phenotype ontologies, cellular and pathway context, protein structure and clinical literature. We present DeepBD, a grounded agentic workflow for variant prioritization and diagnostic interpretation of genetic birth defects. DeepBD organizes the workflow into LLM-assisted case structuring, a pretrained evidence engine, specialist evidence modules and a grounded diagnostic review layer. The evidence engine learns patient-specific variant scores from structured rule evidence, sequence and variant-effect representations and phenotype-conditioned biological context, whereas specialist modules and the agentic layer provide tool-based refinement, candidate-pool review and diagnosis-oriented synthesis from ranked candidates. Developed using an in-house fetal and infant cohort comprising 18,622 cases, DeepBD achieved Recall@1/3/5/10 of 0.658/0.882/0.912/0.929 on an internal held-out solved-case benchmark, outperforming standalone Exomiser, DeepRare and prompted LLM reranking baselines evaluated on Exomiser-derived top-20 candidate variants. Ablation and overlap analyses show that rule evidence, mechanistic context, and specialist refinement provide complementary signals. These findings support a grounded agentic workflow that separates evidence integration, tool-based refinement, and LLM-assisted diagnostic review for retrospective variant prioritization in genetic birth defects.

摘要：出生缺陷是胎兒喪失、新生兒發病率和長期殘疾的主要原因。在懷疑有遺傳病因的子集中，外顯子組和基因組測序已將許多案例從變異檢測轉移到後續的解釋：臨床醫生必須在不完整的胎兒或嬰兒表型和來自群體遺傳學、變異效應預測、基因疾病有效性、表型本體論、細胞和通路背景、蛋白質結構及臨床文獻的異質證據下，對患者特定的候選變異進行排名。我們介紹了DeepBD，一個針對遺傳出生缺陷的變異優先排序和診斷解釋的基於實證的代理工作流程。DeepBD將工作流程組織為LLM輔助的案例結構、一個預訓練的證據引擎、專家證據模塊和一個基於實證的診斷審查層。證據引擎從結構化規則證據、序列和變異效應表示以及表型條件的生物學背景中學習患者特定的變異分數，而專家模塊和代理層則提供基於工具的精煉、候選池審查和基於診斷的排名候選合成。DeepBD在一個由18,622個案例組成的內部胎兒和嬰兒隊列中開發，並在內部保留的解決案例基準上實現了0.658/0.882/0.912/0.929的Recall@1/3/5/10，超越了獨立的Exomiser、DeepRare和基於提示的LLM重新排序基準，這些基準是在Exomiser衍生的前20個候選變異上評估的。消融和重疊分析顯示，規則證據、機制背景和專家精煉提供了互補信號。這些發現支持一個基於實證的代理工作流程，該流程將證據整合、基於工具的精煉和LLM輔助的診斷審查分開，用於遺傳出生缺陷的回顧性變異優先排序。

docs.title: When CQs Go Wrong: Challenges in CQ Verification with OE-Assist
docs.text:
2606.24619v1 by Anna Sofia Lippolis, Mohammad Javad Saeedizade, Robin Keskisärkkä, Aldo Gangemi, Eva Blomqvist, Andrea Giovanni Nuzzolese

Competency Questions (CQs) are the central component of CQ-verification, an established process in which an ontology is evaluated against a set of natural language questions to determine whether the intended purpose of the ontology has been properly modelled. However, CQ-verification is often time-consuming and error-prone, as it requires careful interpretation of linguistic nuances and precise alignment with formal ontology constructs. Ambiguities and complexity in CQs can further complicate this process, leading to inconsistent modelling decisions and verification outcomes. In this paper, we investigate what makes a CQ challenging and possible solutions to enhance the users' performance in the CQ-verification process. We experimented with the data of 19 participants who performed CQ-verification on 20 tasks using an LLM assistant to support ontology evaluation. The results show the necessity of a tool to refine CQs before publishing them to avoid ambiguity or excessive complexity in later phases of the ontology engineering process.

摘要：能力問題（CQs）是CQ驗證的核心組成部分，這是一個已建立的過程，在這個過程中，對本體進行評估，以確定其是否正確地建模了預期的目的，這是通過一組自然語言問題來實現的。然而，CQ驗證往往耗時且容易出錯，因為它需要對語言細微差別進行仔細解釋，並與正式本體結構進行精確對齊。CQs中的模糊性和複雜性可能進一步使這個過程變得複雜，導致不一致的建模決策和驗證結果。在本文中，我們研究了什麼使得CQ具有挑戰性以及可能的解決方案，以提高用戶在CQ驗證過程中的表現。我們對19名參與者的數據進行了實驗，這些參與者使用LLM助手在20個任務上執行CQ驗證，以支持本體評估。結果顯示，在將CQs發佈之前，使用工具來精煉CQs的必要性，以避免在本體工程過程的後續階段出現模糊性或過度複雜性。

docs.title: Uncertainty-Aware Longitudinal Forecasting of Alzheimer's Disease Progression Using Deep Learning
docs.text:
2606.24604v1 by Arya Hariharan, Shreyank N Gowda, Anala M R

Longitudinal modelling of Alzheimer's disease progression is clinically useful only if it can describe not just the most likely next diagnosis, but how a patient may evolve over time and how reliable that forecast is. Most deep learning approaches reduce this problem to single-step classification, treating cognitively normal, mild cognitive impairment, and dementia as flat categories while providing limited insight into how uncertainty accumulates across future visits. We propose a probabilistic framework that combines ordinal diagnosis prediction, multi-horizon trajectory generation, and decomposed uncertainty estimation. A Temporal Fusion Transformer encoder is adapted with a CORAL ordinal output layer, asymmetric loss weighting, and converter oversampling to respect disease-stage ordering and improve sensitivity to MCI-to-dementia transitions. Conditioned on the learned patient-context representation, an autoregressive Mixture Density Network generates five-year probabilistic trajectories for diagnosis state, CDR Sum of Boxes, MMSE orientation, and hippocampal volume. On ADNI, the model outperforms linear, recurrent, and transformer baselines for next-visit diagnosis prediction, with the strongest gains on MCI-versus-dementia discrimination. Generated trajectories achieve near-nominal 90% credible interval coverage, widening uncertainty across the forecast horizon, and biomarker dynamics consistent with expected Alzheimer's disease progression. We further separate aleatoric from epistemic uncertainty using analytic mixture variance and a five-member bootstrap ensemble, which provides the strongest encoder diversity and output-level epistemic signal. Epistemic uncertainty is higher for rare progression archetypes, MCI and dementia patients, and under external evaluation on OASIS-3, where it increases alongside prediction error.

摘要：長期模型化阿茲海默症進展的臨床用途僅在於它能夠描述不僅是最可能的下一診斷，還有患者隨時間演變的方式以及該預測的可靠性。大多數深度學習方法將這個問題簡化為單步分類，將認知正常、輕度認知障礙和癡呆視為平面類別，同時對未來訪問中不確定性如何累積提供有限的洞見。我們提出了一個概率框架，結合了序數診斷預測、多時間範圍軌跡生成和分解不確定性估計。一個時間融合Transformer編碼器被調整為具有CORAL序數輸出層、不對稱損失加權和轉換器過採樣，以尊重疾病階段排序並提高對輕度認知障礙到癡呆過渡的敏感性。在學習到的患者上下文表示的條件下，自回歸混合密度網絡生成五年概率軌跡，用於診斷狀態、CDR總和盒、MMSE方向感和海馬體體積。在ADNI上，該模型在下一次訪問診斷預測中超越了線性、遞歸和Transformer基準，對於輕度認知障礙與癡呆的區分獲得了最強的增益。生成的軌跡實現了接近名義的90%可信區間覆蓋，隨著預測範圍的擴大而加寬不確定性，並且生物標記動態與預期的阿茲海默症進展一致。我們進一步使用解析混合方差和五成員自助集成來區分隨機不確定性和認知不確定性，這提供了最強的編碼器多樣性和輸出層認知信號。對於稀有進展典型、輕度認知障礙和癡呆患者，認知不確定性較高，並且在OASIS-3的外部評估中，隨著預測誤差的增加而增加。

docs.title: A specialized reasoning large language model for accelerating rare disease diagnosis: a randomized AI physician assistance trial
docs.text:
2606.24510v1 by Haichao Chen, Songchi Zhou, Zhengyun Zhao, Shikai Hu, Xianghong Jin, Hongwei Ji, Li He, Shuli Li, Yiming Qin, Xin Tan, Runfeng Shi, Yih Chung Tham, Jiaye Zhu, Ye Li, Ye Jin, Longhao Cao, Dawei Li, Honghan Wu, Hongqiu Gu, Guanqiao Li, Tudor Groza, Chunying Li, Dian Zeng, Weihong Yu, Gareth Baynam, Saumya Shekhar Jamuar, Min Shen, Shuyang Zhang, Bin Sheng, Sheng Yu, Tien Yin Wong

Rare diseases affect millions of individuals worldwide, yet timely diagnosis remains a major public health challenge due to scarcity of specialized clinical expertise. While large language models (LLMs) show promise to support rare disease diagnosis, current models are constrained by insufficient clinical deployability, limited clinically grounded evidence, and scarcity of training data. Here we present RaDaR (Rare Disease navigatoR), an open-source, compact reasoning LLM (32B parameters) for rare disease diagnosis. RaDaR was trained with 49,170 publicly available free-text cases and 104,666 synthetic cases with reasoning-enhanced training. RaDaR showed the strongest performance among evaluated open-source models, including the 671B DeepSeek-R1, across public benchmarks and four external validation centers. In a retrospective cohort, RaDaR prioritized the final diagnosis before documented clinical suspicion in 61.06 percent of cases, corresponding to a potential lead time of 1.87 months and 50.18 percent of the within-center interval. In a randomized physician-assistance trial, RaDaR assistance improved physicians' rare-disease diagnostic accuracy by 21.44 percentage points compared with internet search alone. Synthetic-data ablations suggested that phenotype-anchored narratives provide useful training signal for long-tail rare diseases, with a monotonic scaling trend within the tested data range. Together, RaDaR and its development and validation framework provide a deployable rare-disease reasoning model and a reproducible development framework for diagnostic AI under data scarcity.

摘要：罕見疾病影響著全球數百萬人，但由於缺乏專業的臨床專長，及時診斷仍然是一個主要的公共衛生挑戰。雖然大型語言模型（LLMs）在支持罕見疾病診斷方面顯示出潛力，但目前的模型受到臨床可部署性不足、臨床基礎證據有限和訓練數據稀缺的限制。在這裡，我們介紹RaDaR（罕見疾病導航器），這是一個開源的、緊湊的推理LLM（32B參數）用於罕見疾病診斷。RaDaR使用49,170個公開可用的自由文本案例和104,666個合成案例進行了推理增強的訓練。RaDaR在評估的開源模型中顯示出最強的表現，包括671B的DeepSeek-R1，在公共基準和四個外部驗證中心中均如此。在一項回顧性隊列研究中，RaDaR在61.06%的案例中優先考慮了最終診斷，這對應於潛在的提前時間為1.87個月和50.18%的中心內間隔。在一項隨機醫生協助試驗中，RaDaR的協助使醫生的罕見疾病診斷準確性提高了21.44個百分點，相較於僅依賴互聯網搜索。合成數據的消融實驗表明，基於表型的敘事為長尾罕見疾病提供了有用的訓練信號，在測試的數據範圍內呈現單調增長的趨勢。總之，RaDaR及其開發和驗證框架提供了一個可部署的罕見疾病推理模型和一個可重複的診斷AI開發框架，適用於數據稀缺的情況。

docs.title: RetiSEM: Generalising Causal Models for Fragmented Biomedical Data
docs.text:
2606.24488v1 by Inam Ullah, Imran Razzak, Shoaib Jameel

Learning causal models from fragmented biomedical data is challenging because clinical, molecular, and imaging variables are often incomplete or not jointly observed. We propose RetiSEM, a domain-constrained structural equation modelling (SEM) framework for causal graph recovery and mediation analysis under limited multimodal resources. This proposed work organises variables into biologically informed blocks, applies forbidden-edge constraints, and decomposes pathway-level effects into TE, NDE, and NIE components. We evaluate RetiSEM across ten synthetic benchmark scenarios that vary in dimensionality, nonlinearity, causal depth, and pathway structure, together with a fragmented real-world setting that combines NHANES clinical variables with externally derived retinal representations. This approach achieves lower structural error and higher causal accuracy than unconstrained baselines across the synthetic benchmarks. In the real-data analysis, retinal variables behave mainly as downstream biomarker-like indicators, with smaller but detectable indirect effects. These findings support our strategy as an interpretable framework for testing structured causal hypotheses in limited-resource biomedical AI. The code and resources for this work are publicly available at: https://github.com/Inamullah-Colab/ReitSEM.

摘要：從碎片化的生物醫學數據中學習因果模型是具有挑戰性的，因為臨床、分子和影像變數往往是不完整的或未共同觀察到的。我們提出了RetiSEM，一種受限於領域的結構方程模型（SEM）框架，用於在有限的多模態資源下進行因果圖恢復和中介分析。這項提議的工作將變數組織成生物學上有意義的區塊，應用禁止邊約束，並將路徑層級效應分解為TE、NDE和NIE組件。我們在十個合成基準場景中評估RetiSEM，這些場景在維度、非線性、因果深度和路徑結構上各不相同，並結合了一個碎片化的真實世界設置，該設置將NHANES臨床變數與外部推導的視網膜表示結合在一起。這種方法在合成基準中實現了比不受限基準更低的結構誤差和更高的因果準確性。在真實數據分析中，視網膜變數主要作為下游生物標誌物類似的指標，具有較小但可檢測的間接效應。這些發現支持我們的策略作為一個可解釋的框架，用於在資源有限的生物醫學AI中測試結構化的因果假設。這項工作的代碼和資源可在以下網址公開獲得：https://github.com/Inamullah-Colab/ReitSEM。

docs.title: MedPCFM: Improving Medical Point Cloud Completion by Integrating Point Transformers and Flow Matching
docs.text:
2606.24433v1 by Kamil Kwarciak, Marek Wodzinski

Medical point cloud completion is important for anatomical reconstruction and downstream clinical workflows, yet generative modeling in this setting remains insufficiently studied. We investigate completion through continuous-time generative modeling and introduce PCFM, a PTv3-backed flow matching approach for medical point cloud completion. We evaluate on SkullFix and SkullBreak, and additionally on the more recent Mandibular Defect dataset. We build strong baselines by adapting PTv3 to a deterministic encoder-decoder completion model and by instantiating diffusion completion (PCDiff) with both PVCNN and PTv3 denoisers. PCFM with PTv3 is competitive with the deterministic PTv3 baseline and achieves state-of-the-art generative performance across datasets, while requiring substantially fewer sampling steps than diffusion. At the best operating points, PTv3 also yields clear throughput gains, providing up to a 7$\times$ speed-up for PCFM compared to a PVCNN backbone. Finally, we study empirical scaling trends by varying model size and point cardinality, showing consistent gains with higher point resolution and informative trade-offs across model scales.

摘要：醫療點雲補全對於解剖重建和下游臨床工作流程非常重要，但在這一領域的生成建模仍然研究不足。我們通過連續時間生成建模來研究補全，並介紹了PCFM，一種基於PTv3的流匹配方法，用於醫療點雲補全。我們在SkullFix和SkullBreak上進行評估，並額外在較新的下頜缺損數據集上進行評估。我們通過將PTv3適配到確定性編碼-解碼補全模型以及通過用PVCNN和PTv3去噪器實例化擴散補全（PCDiff）來建立強基準。使用PTv3的PCFM在確定性PTv3基準上具有競爭力，並在各數據集上實現了最先進的生成性能，同時所需的取樣步驟顯著少於擴散。在最佳操作點上，PTv3還顯示出明顯的吞吐量增益，為PCFM提供了與PVCNN骨幹相比高達7$\times$的加速。最後，我們通過改變模型大小和點數量來研究實證擴展趨勢，顯示出隨著點解析度的提高和模型規模之間的信息權衡，始終獲得一致的增益。

docs.title: ATRIA: Adaptive Traceable ECG Reporting with Iterative Agents
docs.text:
2606.24392v2 by Donggyun Hong, Kyuhwan Lee, Junmyung Kwon, Yong-Yeon Jo

Existing ECG report generation is tightly coupled -- interpretation and reporting fused end-to-end, so errors propagate without stage-level recourse -- while agent-based systems decouple tasks but remain single-pass, never revisiting earlier outputs. Clinical ECG reporting instead unfolds iteratively, requiring progressive context integration and bidirectional editing. We present \textsc{ATRIA}, a multi-agent ECG reporting system that mirrors the clinician's iterative workflow: it binds every report claim to its supporting evidence, flags statements unsupported by that evidence, incorporates additional context mid-session, and lets clinicians verify and revise individual findings rather than accept one opaque output. Because its agents use ECG analysis models already in clinical use, the underlying findings are clinically trustworthy; and as a cloud-based web service, \textsc{ATRIA} is ready for immediate deployment. We demonstrate \textsc{ATRIA} through four interaction cases, with a live demo and video available.

摘要：現有的 ECG 報告生成緊密耦合——解釋和報告端到端融合，因此錯誤會在沒有階段性補救的情況下傳播——而基於代理的系統則解耦任務，但仍然是單次通過，從不重新訪問早期的輸出。臨床 ECG 報告則以迭代方式展開，要求逐步整合上下文和雙向編輯。我們提出 \textsc{ATRIA}，一個多代理 ECG 報告系統，反映臨床醫生的迭代工作流程：它將每個報告主張與其支持證據綁定，標記未被該證據支持的陳述，在會議中期整合額外的上下文，並讓臨床醫生驗證和修訂個別發現，而不是接受一個不透明的輸出。因為其代理使用已在臨床上使用的 ECG 分析模型，基礎發現是臨床上可信的；並且作為一個基於雲的網絡服務，\textsc{ATRIA} 隨時可以部署。我們通過四個互動案例展示 \textsc{ATRIA}，並提供現場演示和視頻。

docs.title: Female-RHINO: A Real-Time Scanner-Integrated Framework for Automated Quantitative Uterine MRI Analysis and Structured Reporting
docs.text:
2606.24390v1 by Deepak Bhatia, Saad Ahmad, Smiti Tripathy, Maria Camila Bustos Vivas, Lieselotte Kratzsch, Anika Knupfer, Jordina Aviles Verdera, Susanne Schulz-Heise, Matthias May, Jana Hutter

Standardized assessment of uterine MRI remains challenging due to anatomical variability, observer dependence, and the lack of workflow-integrated automated analysis tools. This work presents Female-RHINO: (R)eproductive (H)ealth (I)maging A(N)alysis T(O)ol, a real-time AI-assisted framework for automated quantitative uterine MRI analysis and structured reporting during image acquisition. We present an end-to-end system that integrates inline communication with the MRI scanner and deep learning-based analysis to derive quantitative uterine biomarkers from sagittal T2-weighted pelvic MRI. The framework combines segmentation and anatomical landmark detection models trained and evaluated on more than 500 multi-center datasets spanning diverse protocols, vendors, and patient populations. It performs volumetry, detects and quantifies common incidental findings such as fibroids and Nabothian cysts, and extracts six anatomical landmarks for biometric assessment. Results are compiled into a structured clinician-oriented report with integrated visualizations, without manual interaction. Evaluation on independent retrospective and prospective cohorts demonstrated robust performance across varying acquisition settings. Mean Dice similarity coefficients were 0.82 for the uterus and 0.80 for fibroids, with lower but consistent agreement for Nabothian cysts. Landmark detection achieved a mean radial error of 3.7 mm. End-to-end processing was completed in under 70 seconds, enabling availability of results during the ongoing scan. Prospective deployment yielded immediate, standardized, and reproducible analyses supported by inter-observer agreement. The proposed system enables real-time scanner-integrated AI for automated uterine MRI analysis and reporting, with potential to improve standardization, efficiency, and clinical workflow in pelvic imaging.

摘要：標準化的子宮MRI評估仍然面臨挑戰，這是由於解剖變異性、觀察者依賴性以及缺乏工作流程整合的自動分析工具。這項工作展示了Female-RHINO: (R)eproductive (H)ealth (I)maging A(N)alysis T(O)ol，一個實時的AI輔助框架，用於自動定量子宮MRI分析和在影像獲取過程中的結構化報告。我們展示了一個端到端系統，該系統整合了與MRI掃描儀的即時通信和基於深度學習的分析，以從矢狀面T2加權骨盆MRI中推導定量子宮生物標記。該框架結合了在500多個多中心數據集上訓練和評估的分割和解剖標誌檢測模型，涵蓋了多種協議、供應商和患者群體。它進行體積測量，檢測並量化常見的偶然發現，如纖維瘤和納博氏囊腫，並提取六個解剖標誌以進行生物識別評估。結果被編纂成一份結構化的臨床醫生導向報告，並整合了可視化，無需手動互動。在獨立的回顧性和前瞻性隊列上的評估顯示，在不同的獲取設置下表現出穩健的性能。子宮的平均Dice相似性係數為0.82，纖維瘤為0.80，納博氏囊腫的協議較低但一致。標誌檢測的平均徑向誤差為3.7毫米。端到端處理在70秒內完成，使得在進行掃描時即可獲得結果。前瞻性部署產生了即時、標準化和可重複的分析，並得到了觀察者之間的一致性支持。所提出的系統實現了實時掃描儀整合的AI，用於自動子宮MRI分析和報告，具有改善骨盆影像標準化、效率和臨床工作流程的潛力。

docs.title: MVG-KAN: Multi-View Geo-Wind Guided KAN for PM$_{2.5}$ Forecasting
docs.text:
2606.24347v1 by Cheng Huang, Muyao Guan, Jairus Yougui Railey, Ning Xu, Honghui Xu, Changjiang Zhang, Zhen Zhang, Shiqing Zhang, Cong Bai

Accurate short-term PM${2.5}$ forecasting is important for public health protection, air-quality early warning, and urban environmental management. However, PM$$ variation is driven by multiple coupled factors, including stable periodic changes induced by human activities and meteorological regularity, station-specific short-term concentration evolution, and meteorology-driven pollutant dispersion among monitoring stations. Existing spatio-temporal forecasting methods may capture station relationships to some extent, but distance-only, correlation-based, or purely adaptive graphs are often insufficient to comprehensively represent these heterogeneous factors, especially wind-direction-dependent pollutant transport. To address this problem, we propose a Multi-View Geo-Wind Guided KAN model for PM${2.5}$ forecasting, named \textbf{MVG-KAN}, which models station-level PM$$ residuals and historical multi-pollutant sequences, thereby enhancing the modeling of local residual inertia and pollutant co-variation.}$ evolution from three complementary views: local periodic regularity, station-wise residual temporal dynamics, and meteorological-environment-guided spatial dispersion. Specifically, the periodic-residual forecasting backbone first separates stable daily and weekly patterns from non-periodic residual variations. A Geo-Wind Graph is constructed by combining geographic distance decay with wind-direction- and wind-speed-aware transport, providing a lightweight physically motivated directed spatial prior for residual propagation among stations. In addition, a temporal Kolmogorov-Arnold network (TKAN) residual head is then introduced to learn station-wise nonlinear autoregressive correction from de-periodized PM$_{2.5

摘要：準確的短期 PM${2.5}$ 預測對於公共健康保護、空氣質量預警和城市環境管理至關重要。然而，PM$$ 的變化受到多個耦合因素的驅動，包括人類活動引起的穩定週期性變化和氣象規律、特定站點的短期濃度演變以及氣象驅動的污染物在監測站之間的擴散。現有的時空預測方法在某種程度上可能捕捉到站點之間的關係，但僅基於距離的、相關性基礎的或純粹自適應的圖形往往不足以全面代表這些異質因素，特別是依賴風向的污染物運輸。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了一種多視角地理風引導 KAN 模型，用於 PM${2.5}$ 預測，命名為 \textbf{MVG-KAN}，該模型從三個互補的視角建模站點級 PM$$ 殘差和歷史多污染物序列中學習站點特定的非線性自回歸修正，從而增強對局部殘差慣性和污染物共變化的建模。}$ 演變：局部週期性規律、站點特定的殘差時間動態以及氣象環境引導的空間擴散。具體而言，週期-殘差預測骨幹首先將穩定的日常和每週模式與非週期性殘差變化分開。通過結合地理距離衰減與風向和風速感知的運輸，構建了一個地理風圖，為站點之間的殘差傳播提供了一個輕量級的、物理驅動的有向空間先驗。此外，然後引入一個時間科爾莫哥洛夫-阿諾德網絡（TKAN）殘差頭，以從去週期化的 PM$_{2.5

docs.title: Enhancing Clinician Decision-Making via Uncertainty-Aware Multi-Expert Fusion for Stroke Rehabilitation
docs.text:
2606.24960v1 by Tamim Ahmed, Thanassis Rikakis

Tailoring stroke rehabilitation requires assessing how movements are organized, not merely if they succeed. Currently, this assessment is a rate-limiting bottleneck. Instruments like the Action Research Arm Test (ARAT) compress rich behavioral observations into single ordinal endpoints, discarding the movement-quality details that distinguish recovery from compensation. Automated alternatives typically chase accuracy on noisy, single-observer labels to output opaque scores - a technology-centric approach that rarely reaches clinical practice. To address this, we present xAARA: an engine designed to augment rather than replace clinical judgment. From multi-view video, xAARA returns ARAT assessments with calibrated uncertainty and explanations across task, movement-phase, and movement-quality levels. Treating clinical scoring as an ill-posed inference problem, xAARA composes 692 calibrated multimodal models via a Dynamic Bayesian Network with entropy-based gating. It qualifies results against clinical validity rules and defers low-confidence cases. In 105 stroke survivors (788 exercises), xAARA achieved 94.2% task accuracy (Cohen's kappa=0.934) and 81.3% movement-phase accuracy (kappa=0.727), reducing predictive uncertainty by 96.1% compared to single-clinician scoring. For subjective cases, it matched at least one rater 100% of the time and never returned out-of-range scores. Four independent clinicians validated the assessments and indicated willingness to adopt the system. We argue that principled uncertainty quantification and clinician-aligned explainability are the critical bridges moving automated assessment from technical demonstration to a deployable clinical tool.

摘要：量身定制的中風康復需要評估動作的組織方式，而不僅僅是評估它們是否成功。目前，這種評估是一個限制性瓶頸。像行動研究手臂測試（ARAT）這樣的工具將豐富的行為觀察壓縮為單一的序數端點，捨棄了區分恢復與補償的運動質量細節。自動化的替代方案通常追求在嘈雜的單一觀察者標籤上獲得準確性，以輸出不透明的分數——這是一種以技術為中心的方法，鮮少進入臨床實踐。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了xAARA：一個旨在增強而非取代臨床判斷的引擎。從多視角視頻中，xAARA返回帶有校準不確定性和解釋的ARAT評估，涵蓋任務、運動階段和運動質量等級別。將臨床評分視為一個不良定義的推斷問題，xAARA通過一個基於熵的動態貝葉斯網絡組合692個校準的多模態模型。它根據臨床有效性規則對結果進行質量檢查，並推遲低信心的案例。在105名中風倖存者（788次練習）中，xAARA達到了94.2%的任務準確率（Cohen's kappa=0.934）和81.3%的運動階段準確率（kappa=0.727），與單一臨床醫生評分相比，預測不確定性降低了96.1%。對於主觀案例，它100%與至少一位評分者匹配，並且從未返回超出範圍的分數。四位獨立臨床醫生驗證了這些評估並表示願意採用該系統。我們認為，原則性的不確定性量化和與臨床醫生對齊的可解釋性是將自動化評估從技術演示轉變為可部署臨床工具的關鍵橋樑。

docs.title: Prob-BBDM: a Probabilistic Brownian Bridge Diffusion Model for MRI sequence image-to-image translation
docs.text:
2606.24313v1 by Martin Valls, Pascal Bourdon, Christine Fernandez-Maloigne, Guillaume Herpe, David Helbert

AI-driven image-to-image synthesis is rapidly advancing, with growing applications in medical imaging. Multi-modal image analysis plays a crucial role in optimizing examination quality, yet acquiring multiple imaging modalities in clinical settings remains resource-intensive and time-consuming, especially for 3D imaging. To address this challenge, we propose a novel image-to-image translation model based on Brownian Bridge Diffusion Models (BBDM), which synthesizes magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) sequences from 2D axial slices. Our approach integrates a variational encoder-guided diffusion mechanism, leveraging probabilistic image distributions to enhance synthesis quality. Evaluated on the BraTS 2021 dataset, our Probabilistic-BBDM (Prob-BBDM) achieves superior performance across multiple translation tasks, reaching up to 88.46% SSIM and 26.09 dB PSNR, with consistent improvements over baselines. Notably, our diffusion process requires only 4 steps, making it computationally efficient while maintaining high-quality synthesis. To further validate generalizability, we test Prob-BBDM on an external third-party dataset, demonstrating consistent performance across domains. Additionally, we assess the clinical utility of the synthesized slices by using them as input to a pre-trained segmentation model. Tumor segmentation yields a Dice score of 88.71% and an HD95 of 3.49 mm, confirming that the synthesized slices preserve critical diagnostic information. These results highlight the potential of Prob-BBDM for high-quality, efficient, and generalizable MRI synthesis, offering a promising step toward improved medical image translation.

摘要：AI 驅動的影像到影像合成正在迅速發展，並在醫學影像中有著日益增長的應用。多模態影像分析在優化檢查質量中扮演著至關重要的角色，但在臨床環境中獲取多種影像模態仍然資源密集且耗時，特別是對於 3D 影像。為了解決這一挑戰，我們提出了一種基於布朗橋擴散模型 (BBDM) 的新型影像到影像翻譯模型，該模型從 2D 軸向切片合成磁共振影像 (MRI) 序列。我們的方法整合了一種變分編碼器引導的擴散機制，利用概率影像分佈來增強合成質量。在 BraTS 2021 數據集上的評估中，我們的概率-BBDM (Prob-BBDM) 在多個翻譯任務中達到了優越的性能，SSIM 高達 88.46% 和 PSNR 為 26.09 dB，並在基準線上持續改進。值得注意的是，我們的擴散過程僅需 4 步，這使其在計算上高效，同時保持高質量的合成。為了進一步驗證其通用性，我們在外部第三方數據集上測試了 Prob-BBDM，顯示出跨領域的一致性能。此外，我們通過將合成切片作為輸入到預訓練的分割模型來評估其臨床實用性。腫瘤分割的 Dice 分數為 88.71%，HD95 為 3.49 mm，確認合成切片保留了關鍵的診斷信息。這些結果突顯了 Prob-BBDM 在高質量、高效能和通用性 MRI 合成方面的潛力，為改善醫學影像翻譯提供了一個有前景的步驟。

docs.title: MMed-Bench-IR: A Heterogeneous Benchmark for Multilingual Medical Information Retrieval
docs.text:
2606.24200v1 by Junhyeok Lee, Han Jang, Hyeonjin Goh, Kyu Sung Choi

Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) in clinical settings increasingly requires multilingual retrieval against predominantly English evidence corpora. Multilingual medical retrieval demands three capabilities: cross-lingual alignment, concept discrimination, and evidence retrieval. However, existing benchmarks evaluate these only in isolation, leaving the interaction between biomedical expertise and multilingual coverage unmeasured. We introduce MMed-Bench-IR, a benchmark designed to disentangle these axes across 6 languages and three structurally heterogeneous tasks: (1) cross-lingual medical QA retrieval with 6,127 queries grounded in the Unified Medical Language System (UMLS), (2) concept discrimination over 4,975 confusion sets at three difficulty tiers, and (3) multilingual evidence retrieval for RAG with 2,040 quality-assured queries. The three tasks share zero concept and query overlap by design, ensuring that aggregate scores reflect genuine capability breadth. Evaluation of ten systems across six paradigm families reveals severe cross-lingual failure: biomedical encoders that score 0.818 nDCG@10 in English drop to 0.056 in Japanese, a gap that English-only benchmarks cannot detect.

摘要：檢索增強生成（RAG）在臨床環境中越來越需要針對主要為英語的證據語料庫進行多語言檢索。多語言醫療檢索需要三項能力：跨語言對齊、概念區分和證據檢索。然而，現有的基準僅孤立地評估這些能力，未能測量生物醫學專業知識與多語言覆蓋之間的互動。我們介紹了MMed-Bench-IR，這是一個旨在拆解這些軸的基準，涵蓋6種語言和三個結構異質的任務：（1）基於統一醫學語言系統（UMLS）的6,127個查詢的跨語言醫療問答檢索，（2）在三個難度層級上對4,975個混淆集進行概念區分，以及（3）針對RAG的多語言證據檢索，包含2,040個經質量保證的查詢。這三個任務在設計上沒有任何概念和查詢的重疊，確保總體得分反映真實的能力廣度。在六個範式家族中評估十個系統顯示出嚴重的跨語言失敗：在英語中得分為0.818 nDCG@10的生物醫學編碼器在日語中降至0.056，這一差距是僅基於英語的基準無法檢測到的。

docs.title: Co-occurring associated retained concepts in Diffusion Unlearning
docs.text:
2606.24192v1 by Miso Kim, Georu Lee, Yunji Kim, Hoki Kim, Jinseong Park, Woojin Lee

Unlearning has emerged as a key technique to mitigate harmful content generation in diffusion models. However, existing methods often remove not only the target concept, but also benign co-occurring concepts. As illustrated in Fig.1, unlearning nudity can unintentionally suppress the concept of person, preventing a model from generating images with person. We define these undesirably suppressed co-occurring concepts that must be preserved CARE (Co-occurring Associated REtained concepts). Then, we introduce the CARE score, a general metric that directly quantifies their preservation across unlearning tasks. With this foundation, we propose ReCARE (Robust erasure for CARE), a framework that explicitly safeguards CARE while erasing only the target concept. ReCARE automatically constructs the CARE-set, a curated vocabulary of benign co-occurring tokens extracted from target images, and leverages this vocabulary during training for stable unlearning. Extensive experiments across various target concepts (Nudity, Van Gogh style, and Tench object) demonstrate that ReCARE achieves overall state-of-the-art performance in balancing robust concept erasure, overall utility, and CARE preservation.

摘要：去學習已成為減少擴散模型中有害內容生成的關鍵技術。然而，現有的方法往往不僅去除目標概念，還會去除良性的共現概念。如圖1所示，去學習裸體概念可能無意中抑制了「人」的概念，從而阻止模型生成包含「人」的圖像。我們將這些不希望被抑制的共現概念定義為CARE（共現關聯保留概念）。接著，我們介紹了CARE分數，這是一個通用指標，直接量化它們在去學習任務中的保留情況。在此基礎上，我們提出了ReCARE（針對CARE的穩健抹除），這是一個明確保護CARE的框架，同時僅抹除目標概念。ReCARE自動構建CARE集，這是一個從目標圖像中提取的良性共現標記的策劃詞彙，並在訓練過程中利用這個詞彙以實現穩定的去學習。在各種目標概念（裸體、梵谷風格和十ch物體）上的廣泛實驗表明，ReCARE在平衡穩健的概念抹除、整體效用和CARE保留方面達到了整體最先進的性能。

docs.title: Lightweight Transformer Models for On-Device Fault Detection: A Benchmark Study on Resource-Constrained Deployment
docs.text:
2606.24173v1 by Disha Patel

On-device fault detection enables real-time diagnostics without cloud dependency, but deploying machine learning models on resource-constrained hardware demands careful tradeoffs between accuracy, latency, and model size. We present a benchmark comparing traditional ML methods (Random Forest, XGBoost, SVM, Logistic Regression) against lightweight transformer architectures (DistilBERT, TinyBERT-6L, TinyBERT-4L, MobileBERT) for binary fault detection across three public datasets: NASA C-MAPSS turbofan degradation, SECOM semiconductor manufacturing, and UCI AI4I 2020 predictive maintenance. We evaluate classification performance (F1-score, AUC), model size, and CPU inference latency, and further assess INT8 dynamic quantization and a two-stage adaptive inference pipeline. Our results reveal that on well-separated sensor data (C-MAPSS), lightweight transformers match traditional ML at 87.8% F1 but at 100x the model size and 9000x the latency. TinyBERT-4L emerges as the most deployment-friendly transformer at 55 MB and 18 ms CPU latency. INT8 quantization reduces size by 25% while preserving 86.9% F1. Our adaptive pipeline, routing 97.9% of predictions through a quantized triage model and only 2.1% to a larger expert, achieves 87.6% F1 at 19.5 ms average latency. On severely imbalanced datasets (SECOM, UCI-PM), both traditional and transformer methods struggle significantly, highlighting fundamental limitations of current approaches for extreme class imbalance in fault detection. All code is publicly available.
